data.problem: <p>一般法人郑商所上报的时候提示附加问题没填写</p>
data.solution: <p>历史开户客户，一般法人郑商所需要额外上报经营范围，这部分数据在迁移至账户中心时不见了，所以修改上报时提示附件问题未填写，需要后台增加</p><p>update CF_ACCOUNT.T_FINAL_REGISTRATIONAGROOT t</p><p>set t.czce_hold='I'</p><p>where  t.client_no='90360022';</p><p>update CF_ACCOUNT.t_Registrationaggregationroot t</p><p>set t.czce_hold='I'</p><p>where  t.client_no='90360022'</p><p>and t.process_status&lt;&gt;'2';</p><p>commit;</p><p>/*      &lt;option option_id="A" option_content="涉棉"/&gt;</p><p>      &lt;option option_id="B" option_content="涉糖"/&gt;</p><p>      &lt;option option_id="C" option_content="涉化"/&gt;</p><p>      &lt;option option_id="D" option_content="涉粮"/&gt;</p><p>      &lt;option option_id="E" option_content="其他"/&gt;</p><p>      &lt;option option_id="F" option_content="油脂油料"/&gt;</p><p>      &lt;option option_id="G" option_content="涉煤"/&gt;</p><p>      &lt;option option_id="H" option_content="建材"/&gt;</p><p>      &lt;option option_id="I" option_content="冶金"/&gt;</p><p>      &lt;option option_id="J" option_content="果品"/&gt;*/</p>

data.problem: <p>一般法人做适当性，经营范围填写信托公司保存返回后在审核界面发现填入资料为空<br /></p>
data.solution: <p>根据监管要求，一般法人开户不能选择106-金融业及以下范围的经营范围，只能选择106以上的，特法选择的是106及以下的。</p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/575181253/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902528%3B1774075388%26q-key-time%3D1773902528%3B1774075388%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D32ae2ee149c2c4f5161156034718f5ff92851195&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="575181253"><img hb_type="file" file_id="575181253" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/575181253/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902528%3B1774075388%26q-key-time%3D1773902528%3B1774075388%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D42e807b8a1aa2ca66b2e95a7dd72f5aacf153050&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a><br /></p>

data.problem: <p>系统号，交易所成交号，报单号等的含义</p>
data.solution: <p>实时成交里面的委托号和成交号，是本地编号，是交易中心根据每笔委托和成交按序编的<br /></p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/574672712/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902528%3B1774075388%26q-key-time%3D1773902528%3B1774075388%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D1c6cbbce6175cef41e83d34a3fca4034e4047e52&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22image.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27image.png" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="574672712"><img hb_type="file" file_id="574672712" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/574672712/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902528%3B1774075388%26q-key-time%3D1773902528%3B1774075388%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D588e86f351a9809276d4f2189df6d4410cd54d60&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22image.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27image.png&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a><br /></p><p>实时成交里面的系统号和交易所成交号，是交易所给回来的，其中系统号是针对委托的，委托回报带回来的，交易所成交号是针对成交的，成交回报带回来<br /></p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/574672872/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902528%3B1774075388%26q-key-time%3D1773902528%3B1774075388%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3De75aee5c89013ee69fb42cec0845069f8ea94020&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22image.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27image.png" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="574672872"><img hb_type="file" file_id="574672872" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/574672872/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902528%3B1774075388%26q-key-time%3D1773902528%3B1774075388%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D216e140592d3894f50f500817fc413bbb5584494&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22image.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27image.png&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a><br /></p><p>金仕达系统监控中心格式文件生成是直接取交易所成交文件给的交易所成交号和报单号，其中只有中金所会在交易所成交文件中提供报单号，其中交易所成交号叫TRADEID，报单号叫orderid。结算文件中的交易所成交号，和实时成交里面的交易所成交号是可以一一对应的。<br /></p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/574673032/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902528%3B1774075388%26q-key-time%3D1773902528%3B1774075388%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D6e16c1c4aa2dbe85bcf69b3cd1ee211029a05a7a&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22image.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27image.png" data.problem: <p>批量导入交易所成交文件不成功</p>
data.solution: <p>批量导入交易所成交文件，主要涉及三方面配置：</p><p>一、柜台配置文件里面新增了drtp的配置项，可以与上方原始的drtp配置项配置一致即可</p><p>二、数据分发服务器增加了bu的配置项，需要按照升级说明进行配置，主要标签项之类不要填错</p><p>三、linux服务器需要可以执行dos2unix命令，否则生成不出动态.sh语句</p>

data.problem: <p>V8T初始化之后产生了浮动保证金</p>
data.solution: <p>那么主要影响浮保产生的因素就是价格、期权标的的保证金率和组合优惠比率这三个<br /></p><p>如果V8T初始化过程中，报盘、cmds和行情写库一直是开着的，交易所给了废行情过来，初始化时的资金试算就会以交易所给的行情来做最新价进行计算，这样的计算结果肯定会跟结算的老仓保证金不一致，多出来的差额就会以浮动保证金来体现。<br /></p><p>如果V6S结算后调整了期权标的保证金率，这样分发给V8T初始化试算时使用的保证金率和结算时的保证金率不一样，试算出来的实时保证金必然和结算的持仓保证金也不一样，多出的差额就会以浮动保证金的方式体现。<br /></p><p>MARPERDIS——组合保证金比率优惠。这个参数如果交易系统和结算系统设的不一致，比如说结算系统设为席位和客户都优惠，交易系统设为席位优惠，客户不优惠。那么V8T初始化试算的保证金数值就会高于结算的持仓保证金数值，从而产生浮动保证金来展示多出来的保证金数值。<br /></p>

data.problem: <p>有个客户用掌厅登录修改密码，身份证模糊要重新上传怎么办</p>
data.solution: <p>在档案管理里面的档案废弃把身份证正反面档案废弃掉，然后客户重新做</p>

data.solution: <p>账户设置系统参数里面有个操作员命名规范的参数被他们打开了</p>

data.problem: <p>交易结算单模块，超户登录就能选择逐日逐笔，非超户登录就不能选择逐日逐笔<br /></p>
data.solution: <p><font>非超户不能选择逐日逐笔是因为结算参数中的JYJSD_DYLX参数<font>交易结算单打印结算类型</font>，默认为逐日钉市。</font></p><p><font>其参数配置为1、逐日钉市；2、逐笔对冲；0、按当前设置；</font></p><p><font>另外<font>强平告警标准</font>也是一样的，根据结算参数中的<font>JYJSD_QPBZ</font><font>交易结算单打印强平告警标准</font>，默认为交易所标准。</font></p><p><font>其参数配置为0、交易所标准；1、风险度标准。<br /></font></p>

data.problem: <p>下游客户说金仕达结算数据导出的文件里面报单号跟成交对不上</p>
data.solution: <p>实时成交里面的委托号和成交号，是本地编号，是交易中心根据每笔委托和成交按序编的</p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/573804639/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902528%3B1774075388%26q-key-time%3D1773902528%3B1774075388%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D649c353de4aeeab72c853d13165f7c245d3fb3b3&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22image.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27image.png" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="573804639"><img hb_type="file" file_id="573804639" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/573804639/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902528%3B1774075388%26q-key-time%3D1773902528%3B1774075388%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D26a30bee6b2add32a60c4a94cd99eed06356ae9c&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22image.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27image.png&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a><br /></p><p>实时成交里面的系统号和交易所成交号，是交易所给回来的，其中系统号是针对委托的，委托回报带回来的，交易所成交号是针对成交的，成交回报带回来</p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/573804717/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902528%3B1774075388%26q-key-time%3D1773902528%3B1774075388%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D3b8c8e52dfdc8d77b030ef26b45b0a43ce5aa63e&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22image.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27image.png" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="573804717"><img hb_type="file" file_id="573804717" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/573804717/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902528%3B1774075388%26q-key-time%3D1773902528%3B1774075388%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3Dfb264a0d394dfbd9ebad1d4e6543b735cc1c0317&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22image.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27image.png&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a><br /></p><p>金仕达系统监控中心格式文件生成是直接取交易所成交文件给的交易所成交号和报单号，其中只有中金所会在交易所成交文件中提供报单号，其中交易所成交号叫TRADEID，报单号叫orderid。结算文件中的交易所成交号，和实时成交里面的交易所成交号是可以一一对应的。</p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/573804909/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902528%3B1774075388%26q-key-time%3D1773902528%3B1774075388%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D9277ab6342a50bbd660619a3222cc3f468e677c1&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22image.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27image.png" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="573804909"><img hb_type="file" file_id="573804909" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/573804909/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902528%3B1774075388%26q-key-time%3D1773902528%3B1774075388%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D222b7e2c3a230ef76447640debc2872a4315a912&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22image.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27image.png&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a><br /></p><p>上期能源结算文件项目</p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/573805042/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902528%3B1774075388%26q-key-time%3D1773902528%3B1774075388%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D042aeb42db1bd9ee2af9b3c644396de15645b1d0&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22image.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27image.png" data.problem: <p>账户表结构</p>
data.solution: <p>select * from  CF_ACCOUNT.T_CLIENT where ADDITIONAL_CODE = 'A2023S005977'</p><p>select * from CF_ACCOUNT.T_CLIENT_BUSINESS where client_id = '1000029229'</p><p>select * from CF_ACCOUNT.T_REGISTRATIONAGGREGATIONROOT where client_id = '1000029229'</p><p>select * from CF_ACCOUNT.T_FINAL_CLIENT  WHERE client_id = '1000029229'</p>

data.problem: <p>测试系统银期监控打开提示登陆失败，recvdata超时</p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/573533230/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902528%3B1774075388%26q-key-time%3D1773902528%3B1774075388%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3De751e18d0a8904ca6ed9034bfb9390cea79a370a&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="573533230"><img hb_type="file" file_id="573533230" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/573533230/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902528%3B1774075388%26q-key-time%3D1773902528%3B1774075388%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3Dc6f27a7de917ced056269b31750a9d2b0587f7f5&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a><br /></p>
data.solution: <p>过程太漫长不赘述了。</p><p>最终定位下来的话，是由于app的ksmbcc.ini中有以下两端配置</p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/573533799/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902528%3B1774075388%26q-key-time%3D1773902528%3B1774075388%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D7389543c112bf0f32b88c4120d35410f78f32081&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="573533799"><img hb_type="file" file_id="573533799" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/573533799/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902528%3B1774075388%26q-key-time%3D1773902528%3B1774075388%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D35100f2cd305bb1beec3a3d5b311b836fca4943a&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a></p><p>解决方式是把上面两个参数注释掉，就好了。</p><p>——————以下探讨原因——————<br /></p><p>PNACHK参数是用来检查推送确认包，如果长时间收不到，就断开连接，默认配置30秒，这里配置30是默认值，所以与该参数无关。</p><p>DIRECTPM0参数用来决定app使用的是直接推送的方式还是保存到本地pdf文件后，再由另外的进程去调用这个pdf进行推送。</p><p>当参数设置为0时，讲推送请求落地到pdf文件，再由另一个进程读取pdf进行推送，该方式为默认方式，可认为时异步方式。</p><p>当参数设置为1时，直接推送给相关功能号，可认为是同步方式。</p><p>当参数为1时，如果推送失败，则造成该条请求处理失败，后续处理不会继续进行，当参数设置为0时，推送请求的成功与否和请求应答无关。</p><p>在通惠这个案例中，由于测试系统未开启系统监控程序，导致操作员登录推送给系统监控的推送处理异常了（见下图，其中30007为系统监控的功能号），同步方式的情况下，推送处理失败，则整条请求处理失败，故而程序登录就会失败了。</p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/573537932/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902528%3B1774075388%26q-key-time%3D1773902528%3B1774075388%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D5a1006e0b94a98fd05f723b60d93da95edca9d8b&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="573537932"><img hb_type="file" file_id="573537932" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/573537932/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902528%3B1774075388%26q-key-time%3D1773902528%3B1774075388%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D7f1f56cc4f0e7775e342d8c513f0e90dd20bcd17&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a><br /></p>

data.problem: <p>V6S操作日志中记录的客户资料维护等记录的修改，想了解该客户资料的变更是怎么做的？以及当时操作这个数据的时候是处于什么目的。</p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/573141161/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902528%3B1774075388%26q-key-time%3D1773902528%3B1774075388%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3Dff8c436d8e70820491a481c6d038835c2af66aac&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="573141161"><img hb_type="file" file_id="573141161" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/573141161/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902528%3B1774075388%26q-key-time%3D1773902528%3B1774075388%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D5dd3dab3270a6d17773ac75b62c96cb532aaf0b0&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a><br /></p>
data.solution: <p>首先操作目的具有主观性，从操作日志等记录中是无法推算该操作当时的操作意图的。</p><p>然后根据操作日志中的操作员与账户中心系统管理→系统设置→系统配置→同步柜台设置→V6S配置中的V6S操作员进行匹配，如果能匹配上则标识该记录是账户中心操作完后同步给V6S的。</p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/573141577/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902528%3B1774075388%26q-key-time%3D1773902528%3B1774075388%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D4a205d231c7cf843d9ab13f56dad7858d4ba359c&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="573141577"><img hb_type="file" file_id="573141577" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/573141577/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902528%3B1774075388%26q-key-time%3D1773902528%3B1774075388%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D9f70a818978ab7de6ca698a18b31fe38732c8dc7&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a><br /></p><p>此时根据客户号以及相关日期， 到账户中心业务流水查询中查找相关记录即可的到，该记录的资料处理人就是对这个客户资料进行修改的人员，修改意图可以与该业务人员沟通。</p><p>另外在同步记录查询中也能得到相关同步记录。<br /></p>

data.problem: <p>2022年11月份在账户中心做的适当性资料录入的一个资管户资料，客户号为空<br /></p>
data.solution: <p>在适当性流水里通过证件号查询记录，该证件号码的客户在录入时有客户号的流水被废弃了，而没有客户号的记录被审核通过了。就造成了适当性查询里这条记录变成客户号为空的记录了。</p><p>通过适当性查询中的修改客户号对该记录进行调整会提示“客户号已存在”的提示，此时可通过适当性资料变更对该条记录的客户号信息做调整，审核通过后即可。<br /></p>

data.problem: <p>刷Set_yhzzfhdm_bcc.sql，但是相关的银行返回错误代码刷不到数据库里<br /></p>
data.solution: <p>脚本里有个@mi_force_flag传参，--强制覆盖标志  '0': 不覆盖原银行参数  '1': 覆盖原银行对应关系，刷脚本时给的默认值0</p><p>在调用set_bank_para时，就会给不覆盖原银行参数的0参数<br /></p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/571422805/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902528%3B1774075388%26q-key-time%3D1773902528%3B1774075388%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D030e7542d72671390c45a39f7855a1f99cfa3495&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="571422805"><img hb_type="file" file_id="571422805" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/571422805/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902528%3B1774075388%26q-key-time%3D1773902528%3B1774075388%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3Ddae5114a6b376c65228b965c88cab289bee1e30a&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a><br /></p><p>只有当参数为1的时候，才会将原表数据删掉<br /></p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/571423616/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902528%3B1774075388%26q-key-time%3D1773902528%3B1774075388%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D8e8957d5c00c50f2fb6eb211b7fa61143e148f26&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="571423616"><img hb_type="file" file_id="571423616" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/571423616/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902528%3B1774075388%26q-key-time%3D1773902528%3B1774075388%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D91d38080df8ae470ccf9b6446a09f8ce3f000e93&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a></p><p>不删除的情况下，只会增加原表中没有的对应关系<br /></p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/571423900/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902528%3B1774075388%26q-key-time%3D1773902528%3B1774075388%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3Dd8c1289c4fef79774069bb15d32adeeef181e77f&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="571423900"><img hb_type="file" file_id="571423900" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/571423900/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902528%3B1774075388%26q-key-time%3D1773902528%3B1774075388%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3Da2dfb67d3cc7e918d19e82489e7788247c87fe83&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a><br /></p><p>如果原来对应关系是错误的，那么就代表着永远都更新不进去了</p><p>故而需要将此处的@mi_force_flag改成'1'，才能确保银行返回代码表能够全部更新成新的</p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/571424301/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902528%3B1774075388%26q-key-time%3D1773902528%3B1774075388%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D0f31e84bf9d308bebed985b66a6a236e31cf606e&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png" data.problem: <p>账户中心新开户客户附加码填错了，需要怎么处理<br /></p>
data.solution: <p>如果遇到无法直接连到数据库直接修改数据的话，可以用以下方法流程通过界面进行调整<br /></p><p>1、业务流水查询里把这个客户的那条上报驳回的记录，修改流程状态到审批完成 <br /></p><p>2、通过信息变更的功能把附加码调整成正确的 <br /></p><p>3、到申请上报管理里把原来那条上报失败的开户上报记录做重新上报 <br /></p><p>4、生成的修改上报的记录在申请上报管理里做废弃</p><p>需要注意，废弃修改信息的记录需要在开户上报完成后进行调整，否则信息变更就白做了。<br /></p>

data.problem: <p>升级8509以后，大连交易报盘起不来<br /></p>
data.solution: <p>agent的日志里一直提示进程自己消失<br /></p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/570525209/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902530%3B1774075390%26q-key-time%3D1773902530%3B1774075390%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D02ebceff75a6699279f1589eeb0e589ea4334ca7&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="570525209"><img hb_type="file" file_id="570525209" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/570525209/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902530%3B1774075390%26q-key-time%3D1773902530%3B1774075390%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3Dba7373f4c3a232e6d6d2d62650b6a778cf748144&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a></p><p>一开始还没感觉日志里有什么问题，怀疑是8509升级那个ftok的事情，但发现改完以后还是起不来</p><p>那就是个新问题了</p><p>最后发现agent配置启动大连交易报盘的<br /></p><p>exe_name是offer_dce，那问题就出在这里了，从挺久的一个版本开始就都已经调整为offer了</p><p>针对这个问题，以下几个地方需要调整</p><p>1、agent.xml里大连交易所交易报盘配置需要调整</p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/570526880/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902530%3B1774075390%26q-key-time%3D1773902530%3B1774075390%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D11c77be9304921d51a8466a87ef17c24bb799ce6&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="570526880"><img hb_type="file" file_id="570526880" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/570526880/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902530%3B1774075390%26q-key-time%3D1773902530%3B1774075390%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3Da05941f2af578e518563f8d5a287af19281ac176&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a><br /></p><p>涉及到的项目可能有以上框出来的这些，根据实际情况调整</p><p>2、TMC的<font>Linux</font><font>报盘监控</font><font>-</font><font>报盘服务器管理</font>，也需要将offer_dce改成offer</p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/570527683/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902530%3B1774075390%26q-key-time%3D1773902530%3B1774075390%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D9fa7facdd957c80327c8b4e70bc0439a75182a31&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="570527683"><img hb_type="file" file_id="570527683" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/570527683/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902530%3B1774075390%26q-key-time%3D1773902530%3B1774075390%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D9595e7a0a4e2cc621ef0fa90c298dbbff2218e98&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a><br /></p><p>这个修改需要用到GenerateKey.exe，<font>可使用</font><font>8509升级包“相关终端”文件夹里的 </font><font>“</font><font>获取</font><font>TMC登录key</font>\ GenerateKey.exe<font>”。</font></p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/570528248/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902530%3B1774075390%26q-key-time%3D1773902530%3B1774075390%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D6525334dde0f0cc624c3a0ba1ac65c6eff177f22&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png" /></p><p><font>该工具具体使用方式可参考8509升级手册。<br /></font></p>

data.problem: <p>为什么V8T的个人户的客户类型都是个人发起<br /></p>
data.solution: <p>V6S做V8T初始化数据导出时，当数据分发版本大于等于6.4版本时，会对客户的客户类型进行转换</p><p>对应脚本为v8_init_deal.sql，转换内容如下<br /></p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/569877468/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902530%3B1774075390%26q-key-time%3D1773902530%3B1774075390%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D17d9b2b3140d804912e6183fd85ac305c22fdc23&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="569877468"><img hb_type="file" file_id="569877468" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/569877468/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902530%3B1774075390%26q-key-time%3D1773902530%3B1774075390%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3Da0796a264439b5bc43c08e6aa2046ce7d0f6c52e&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a><br /></p><p>V8T在初始化插入tt_cust_info时，cust_type取的是v8_pre_cffe_cust_basic的cust_type，所以在V8T上查到的客户类型为个人发起。<br /></p>

data.problem: <p>由于修改公司名称可能还会牵涉到其他终端授权的情况，如果只是想调整账单中显示的公司名称，可以做哪些调整？<br /></p>
data.solution: <p>1、修改数据字典1000中的BillName，61008中增加的改字典项，中文账单输出时公司名称取的时这个</p><p>2、英文账单的话，需要修改配置文件dic_system.ini，其中的DIC_ENG下的1000，将FullName-后的CompanyName修改为实际要生成的公司名称即可。如下图。</p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/569857077/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902530%3B1774075390%26q-key-time%3D1773902530%3B1774075390%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D64274b44f557b6b9185ac07fdf19c1c45e29499b&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="569857077"><img hb_type="file" file_id="569857077" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/569857077/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902530%3B1774075390%26q-key-time%3D1773902530%3B1774075390%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D48bd3e6bb87aace6a21bb9315aef53b5286d4e26&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a><br /></p>

data.problem: <p>发现当日结算后，席位资金情况中，大连交易所的席位手续费与交易所提供的总手续费不一致，相差1500元左右。<br /></p>
data.solution: <p>经排查下来，是因为系统中大连交易所生猪品种的席位手续费中保值平今费率与交易所不一致，交易所日内保值平今优惠按每手1元收取，系统设置了生猪保值平今按每手2元的。</p><p>修改之后，重做结算，大连席位手续费就与交易所对上了。<br /></p>

data.problem: <p>大连结算完手续费比交易所多收</p>
data.solution: <p>大商所品种很容易出现交易所其实保值的平今不加收，而投机的平今加收的情况，如果系统里面保值和投机的平今费率设的一样，就会出现多收的情况。</p>

data.problem: <p>8508升级8509后，交易核心B起不来了，其他启动都正常，到tools_back目录下手工执行./start_trade_agent报错如下<br /></p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/569480378/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902530%3B1774075390%26q-key-time%3D1773902530%3B1774075390%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D877f5088e3a70f8572602b27fe7e65067d7edc6d&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="569480378"><img hb_type="file" file_id="569480378" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/569480378/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902530%3B1774075390%26q-key-time%3D1773902530%3B1774075390%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3Dffa7fa3616c8fdcd3140e33be2b4225d0aa9254f&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a><br /></p>
data.solution: <p>首先从报错上来看是打开文件/tr_b_mdb//tradememorydb88.data失败(2)</p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/569481794/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902530%3B1774075390%26q-key-time%3D1773902530%3B1774075390%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D370b274ae61a5b99fd1b66e4f17b71c3ce90ad85&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="569481794"><img hb_type="file" file_id="569481794" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/569481794/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902530%3B1774075390%26q-key-time%3D1773902530%3B1774075390%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D692aeb84bc57c23306bee3a45546863a59289c87&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a><br /></p><p>(2)这个错误码的意义是No such file or directory，也就是没有这个目录或文件</p><p>其他linux error code参考下述文档<br /></p><p><a href="https://blog.csdn.net/wangcg123/article/details/51218408" target="_blank">https://blog.csdn.net/wangcg123/article/details/51218408</a></p><p>而No such file or directory的原因是因为内存库加载失败了，失败的原因是已经有一个程序在运行</p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/569487006/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902530%3B1774075390%26q-key-time%3D1773902530%3B1774075390%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D286da9f3adb092ae611588f18339e5912a9d3b1d&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="569487006"><img hb_type="file" file_id="569487006" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/569487006/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902530%3B1774075390%26q-key-time%3D1773902530%3B1774075390%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3Dbbf0e432885e63d3867ddd847ba94064db1ea603&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a></p><p>由于客户操作linux服务器使用的是xshell工具，当xshell启用X11连接会开启图形化界面的情况下，会默认连接到服务器的6011端口（当连续建立会话时，会持续打开60XX端口，XX为从11开始向后依次+1），而6011端口恰好是交易内存库的使用端口，于是就导致交易内存库开启是会判断6011已经被占用，导致内存库启动失败，于是也就无法正常启动了。</p><p>是否已经被占用的话，可以用root用户登录后通过下述命令判断端口是否被ssh占用</p><p>lsof -i|grep sshd</p><p>红框内容重点关注</p><p>TCP LOCALHOST:6011(LISTEN)就代表6011端口被xshell的X11占用了</p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/569489265/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902530%3B1774075390%26q-key-time%3D1773902530%3B1774075390%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D804c79528580bbf9a9c3ea1b09a3d47dbaa54759&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="569489265"><img hb_type="file" file_id="569489265" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/569489265/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902530%3B1774075390%26q-key-time%3D1773902530%3B1774075390%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3De08c5f16775abe3183869f585bdfe7b93a23a79d&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a><br /></p><p>可以关闭绘画或者kill掉相关的UID进程（此处是31948）即可。</p><p>另外也可以通过关闭xshell的X11连接配置来规避这个问题，关闭方式见下图</p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/569489782/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902530%3B1774075390%26q-key-time%3D1773902530%3B1774075390%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D5ee9b13362905b5752fc36cb5a356d6a520bfcb9&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="569489782"><img hb_type="file" file_id="569489782" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/569489782/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902530%3B1774075390%26q-key-time%3D1773902530%3B1774075390%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3Db112252264568421c22c4e60b6e91c7eebbe7dcd&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a><br /></p>

data.problem: <p>账户中心客户中金所销户，上报返回提示中金营业部为空<br /></p>
data.solution: <p>让客户在系统管理里面的客户营业部变更进行中金营业部修改之后再上报<br /></p>

/></p>
data.solution: <p>这个问题的原因是客户开户填写的资料中有不规范的字符</p><p>f12查看报错json，然后复制报错信息到json在线解析看是那个字段值有问题</p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/568993904/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902530%3B1774075390%26q-key-time%3D1773902530%3B1774075390%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D228cce0afdb0b8b59ba4daf82d2ce93c6d6dbe6c&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="568993904"><img hb_type="file" file_id="568993904" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/568993904/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902530%3B1774075390%26q-key-time%3D1773902530%3B1774075390%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D45019777986ebde837896940cd1ae999bce8b625&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a><br /></p><p>在json在线解析中点校验，截图中2是有问题的字段数据，里面的双引号应该是中文的，客户那边填写的是英文的双引号，将英文双引号好改成中文的双引号即可</p><p>先查询客户数据：select * from cf_account.t_specialcompany where root_id in (select id from cf_account.t_registrationaggregationroot where client_no='1000035')</p><p>修改客户数据：update cf_account.t_specialcompany set hold_assets_name='瑞达期货太保财险海南省白沙县天然橡胶“保险+期货”项目'  --该字段中双引号要是中文的双引号，客户是英文的双引号</p><p>where id='FC92A68FF55A7ACAE055000000000001'</p>

data.problem: <p>V8T交易参数MAX_JOIN_NUM如果设置为0是不是就不限制客户登录多少个连接了<br /></p>
data.solution: <p>MAX_JOIN_NUM设置为0后，所有通过B2C，api方式接入的终端，都会导致登录不上，具体报错为：超过最大允许连接数，登录失败。</p><p>此时只有B2B的无状态连接才能不受限制的登入系统。<br /></p>

data.problem: <p>新设置的掌厅操作员在掌厅后台管理/任务管理下面的菜单里看不到查询数据<br /></p>
data.solution: <p>首先要在管理工具→用户账户中检查该操作员的各个权限设置情况</p><p>1、账户审核角色下是否给了对应的初审/复审角色</p><p>审核流程是是一级的话，就给只给复审就可以了，二级的话看，如果只给复审，相关记录没有初审的话，复审的操作员也是看不到的</p><p>2、业务角色是否给了期货经纪，如果没给可能查询不到数据</p><p>3、数据角色有没有给，比如营业部数据角色或者总部数据角色，如果没给的话也是看不到相关数据的</p><p>以上设置都完成后，操作员才能正常操作。</p><p>另外，新设置权限的操作员是看不到之前的数据的，系统在提交/初审的时候，会给到有权限能审核的操作员，只有这些操作员能看到相关数据，当时没有权限的操作员事后无法对之前的业务进行查询和操作。<br /></p>

data.problem: <p>特法开户后想做信息变更，提示该客户未进行开户 </p>
data.solution: <p>该客户开户的时候，开户流程在开户流水里面状态卡在了上报驳回，操作员在操作时，把这条开户流水做了废弃，导致业务流水表里面的记录没有了，虽然之后又将开户流水的状态改成了审批完成，但因为cf_account.t_client_business表里面记录没有了，所以在做投资者信息变更时关联不到流水信息提示未进行开户。后台在cf_account.t_client_business表里面插入流水信息，再做信息变更就可以了。</p>

data.problem: <p>倍特期货反馈中金所报盘频繁出现下午两点多的时候出现与交易所断连，然后几秒钟之后有自动连上交易所了</p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/466967326/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902530%3B1774075390%26q-key-time%3D1773902530%3B1774075390%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3Dbdfa26330838b53ad61b90462e2a5b3cdc586241&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22QQ%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%258720230517094311.jpg%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27QQ%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%258720230517094311.jpg" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="466967326"><img hb_type="file" file_id="466967326" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/466967326/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902530%3B1774075390%26q-key-time%3D1773902530%3B1774075390%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D1fc90b62b752c815740295eb0baa0a1c814941cf&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22QQ%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%258720230517094311.jpg%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27QQ%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%258720230517094311.jpg&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a><br /></p>
data.solution: <p>检查中金所报盘所在的机器的系统日志发现，中金所报盘与交易所断连的时候系统做了时间同步，系统时间修改了会导致报盘与交易所心跳校验出错，进而导致与交易所断连，建议客户将windows盘中做的时间同步关掉。</p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/466969633/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902530%3B1774075390%26q-key-time%3D1773902530%3B1774075390%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D77269e85412ba000a77bbb2dc4b93e1bd757faae&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22QQ%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%258720230517094603.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27QQ%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%258720230517094603.png" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="466969633"><img hb_type="file" file_id="466969633" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/466969633/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902530%3B1774075390%26q-key-time%3D1773902530%3B1774075390%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3Dae44662eaf35374ef1c253d7839b7396358f14cb&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22QQ%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%258720230517094603.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27QQ%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%258720230517094603.png&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a><br /></p>

data.problem: <p>升级8509后，用新的TMC中的linux报盘监控点开后提示已经有一个进程在运行了<br /></p>
data.solution: <p>关闭TMC后，在进程里要看NGTF.TMC.LinuxOfferMonitor.exe这个进程，只看LinuxOfferMonitor.exe是没有的，把这个进程杀掉才可以。<br /></p>

data.problem: <p>升级8508P1包里大连Linux报盘时，发现\linux_offer\ks_offer\offer_dce目录下的Config.ini.sample配置里少了mdu_name配置项，8509包里大连linux报盘Config.ini.sample也是如此，此项mdu_name在原有linux报盘配置项里是有的，不知为何会取消。<br /></p>
data.solution: <p>经和linux报盘开发确认，此项mdu_name代码还是需要的，发布包里的Config.ini.sample作为配置文件模板来发布，里面规范了部分配置的默认值，可能开发提交升级包时漏掉了mdu_name,后续开发会加上。</p><p>当前如果客户是增量大连Linux报盘升级，确定升级包里Config.ini.sample模板配置里参数项在客户当前在用linux报盘配置里是完全有的，即可，如果是全量安装，需要客户手工增加mdu_name的。<br /></p>

data.problem: <p>重启服务器后，测试环境V6 的 sybase 数据库无法启动<br /></p>
data.solution: <p>是内存参数的问题</p><p>/proc/sys/kernel/randomize_va_space</p><p>默认值是1，需将该值该为0 ，方可启动sybase</p><p>root用户执行命令</p><p>sysctl -w kernel.randomize_va_space=0</p>

data.problem: <p>账户中心要修改已销户特法客户的证件有效期为长期<br /></p>
data.solution: <p>--已销户客户前台没法调整，只能后台改</p><p>首先是 cf_account.t_final_client表里的证件有效期和是否长期的标志<br /></p><p>update cf_account.t_final_client t set t.id_end_date = ''，t.longterm = ‘’ where t.client_id = 690733;</p><p>--然后是cf_account.t_final_domesticcompany里的证件有效期和是否长期的标志</p><p>--标志<br /></p><p>update cf_account.t_final_domesticcompany f set f.license_no_longterm = '1' ,</p><p>f.tax_longterm = '1' ,</p><p>f.instrepr_eid_longterm = '1'</p><p>where f.client_id = '721685';</p><p>--日期<br /></p><p>update cf_account.t_final_domesticcompany f </p><p>set f.license_no_end_date = '',f.tax_end_date = '',f.instrepr_eid_end_date = ''</p><p>where f.client_id = '721685';</p>

data.problem: <p>客户使用掌厅修改证件截止日产生了身份信息修改上报<br /></p>
data.solution: <p>证件截止日不属于身份信息，是掌厅把流程类型搞错了，证件截止日不需要上报，让客户直接在业务流水里面把流程状态改为审核完成，账户里面证件截止日已经变更过来就可以了<br /></p>

data.problem: <p>TMC的zookeeper监控里提示Exception of type 'ZooKeeperNet.keeperException_ConnectionLossException' was thrown.</p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/461976661/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902531%3B1774075391%26q-key-time%3D1773902531%3B1774075391%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3Ddcb013e8d8c098bc3389f826e58dc92d23682b3f&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="461976661"><img hb_type="file" file_id="461976661" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/461976661/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902531%3B1774075391%26q-key-time%3D1773902531%3B1774075391%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D34ab97efeb639314712208bcbe01abdd410f0be3&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a><br /></p>
data.solution: <p>连接异常了。</p><p>如果是一直运行没问题的环境，没有做过任何调整，可以考虑重启菜单或者重启TMC。</p><p>如果是新部署或者是迁移过环境等做过环境调整和变更了，则需要检查TMC的zookeeper配置，检查网络，检查防火墙是否关闭等。<br /></p>

data.problem: <p>郑州windows报盘记录的exch日志名称都是exch_cffex+日期.klg</p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/460992503/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902531%3B1774075391%26q-key-time%3D1773902531%3B1774075391%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D83c80af382417123569ebfd6054738f6b49301b1&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="460992503"><img hb_type="file" file_id="460992503" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/460992503/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902531%3B1774075391%26q-key-time%3D1773902531%3B1774075391%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D0314fdb117d44b11d92f6427edfb32bd5490c7fb&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a><br /></p>
data.solution: <p>检查接口配置文件config.ini，里面有一段app=exch_cffex，改成对应接口的名字就行，比如exch_czce</p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/460992630/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902531%3B1774075391%26q-key-time%3D1773902531%3B1774075391%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3Deb1bb64e3cbcf4b07ad9cbdeaeeb075355912a8f&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="460992630"><img hb_type="file" file_id="460992630" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/460992630/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902531%3B1774075391%26q-key-time%3D1773902531%3B1774075391%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D57543e7eb61480e66a694551b30e357ecd669985&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a><br /></p>

data.problem: <p>开户云上做了适当性评测，没有同步到账户中心</p>
data.solution: <p>在适当性管理——开户云适当性同步——单个客户同步，选择该客户号进行适当性重新同步</p>

data.problem: <p>V8T盘中平仓处理规则和结算时的区别</p>
data.solution: <table><colgroup><col width="587" /></colgroup><tbody><tr><td>大商所</td> </tr><tr><td>先普通后组合，先开先平，平仓的投保属性要与持仓投保属性一致，投机平投机，保值平保值。结算时先开先平，投机平投机，保值平保值</td> </tr></tbody></table><table><colgroup><col width="712" /></colgroup><tbody><tr><td>中金所</td> </tr><tr><td>中金盘中只有平仓指令，但盘后导入成交文件会有平今标记。针对数据字典“5005-中金所调整平今手续费品种”中维护的品种，盘中平仓规则是优先平今仓，今仓平完平老仓，平今部分和平昨部分遵循先开先平。不在5005里的只是先开先平。所有品种结算时都是先开先平。</td> </tr></tbody></table><table><colgroup><col width="184" /></colgroup><tbody><tr><td>能交所</td> </tr><tr><td>同上期一致</td> </tr></tbody></table><table><colgroup><col width="387" /></colgroup><tbody><tr><td>上期所</td> </tr><tr><td>上期严格区分今仓和昨仓，指令也分平今和平仓，持仓对应指令遵循先开先平原则</td> </tr></tbody></table><table><colgroup><col width="497" /></colgroup><tbody><tr><td>郑商所</td> </tr><tr><td>先投机后保值，先单腿后对锁再组合，先开先平。结算时先开先平</td> </tr></tbody></table><table><colgroup><col width="103" /></colgroup><tbody><tr><td>广期所</td> </tr><tr><td>同大商一致<br /></td> </tr></tbody></table>

data.problem: <p>云开户上增加了营业部后，在账户中心中有哪些界面需要对应设</p><p>                        </p>
data.solution: <p>首先要在账户中心的管理工具→部门管理中增删改对应营业部信息</p><p>然后到账户管理→系统管理→开户云客户默认配置以及营业部反向映射云开户配置中增加对应关系</p><p>如有中金营业部的变更的话，同时要在中金营业部配置中增加相关数据</p><p>客户的营业部变更可以在账户管理→系统管理→客户营业部变更界面进行调整<br /></p>

data.problem: <p>咨询账户系统适当性管理-电子档案管理-电子档案维护菜单下面的添加了档案变更按钮的权限，但是没有对应的按钮，咨询原因<br /></p>
data.solution: <p>此按钮需要在点击查询按钮之后，选中审批完成记录之后会显示。<br /></p>

data.problem: <p>仿真v6s系统结算，提示“207002临时表中结算价数据存在为空的记录”报错，咨询原因<br /></p>
data.solution: <p>排查发现，是由于有许多期权品种没有在v6s仿真系统里做设置，解决方法是将品种和合约信息补全。</p><p>——————20230907增补——————</p><p>如果很多的情况下，补全合约明显不是合理的解决方案</p><p>可先使用下述语句查询缺的合约，如果就几个，那可以手工补一下<br /></p><blockquote><p>SELECT contract_code1 FROM my_settle_split_contract</p><p>WHERE contract_code1 NOT IN (SELECT contract_code FROM settle_price WHERE tx_date = '20230804')	--改日期</p><p>union</p><p>SELECT contract_code2 FROM my_settle_split_contract</p><p>WHERE contract_code2 NOT IN (SELECT contract_code FROM settle_price WHERE tx_date = '20230804')	--改日期</p></blockquote><p>但如果有很多，比如漏加品种之类的，可能一缺缺一片，那么可以用下述语句直接删除</p><blockquote><p>delete FROM his_comb_split_contract</p><p>WHERE contract_code1 NOT IN (SELECT contract_code FROM settle_price WHERE tx_date = '20230804')	--改日期</p><p>delete  FROM his_comb_split_contract</p><p>WHERE contract_code2 NOT IN (SELECT contract_code FROM settle_price WHERE tx_date = '20230804')	--改日期</p></blockquote><p>——————20231106更新一下脚本——————</p><p>提示持仓结算-获取品种保证金算法出错，查合约表里没有保证金优惠参数表里有的记录<br /></p><blockquote><p>SELECT contract_code1 FROM his_comb_split_contract    </p><p>WHERE tx_date = '20231106'</p><p>AND contract_code1 NOT IN (SELECT contract_code FROM trade_contract)</p><p>union</p><p>SELECT contract_code2 FROM his_comb_split_contract    </p><p>WHERE tx_date = '20231106'</p><p>AND contract_code2 NOT IN (SELECT contract_code FROM trade_contract)</p><p>union</p><p>SELECT contract_code3 FROM his_comb_split_contract    </p><p>WHERE tx_date = '20231106'</p><p>AND contract_code3 NOT IN (SELECT contract_code FROM trade_contract)</p><p>union</p><p>SELECT contract_code4 FROM his_comb_split_contract    </p><p>WHERE tx_date = '20231106'</p><p>AND contract_code4 NOT IN (SELECT contract_code FROM trade_contract)</p></blockquote><p>删掉</p><blockquote><p></p></blockquote><blockquote><p>DELETE FROM his_comb_split_contract    </p><p>WHERE tx_date = '20231130'</p><p>AND contract_code1 NOT IN (SELECT contract_code FROM trade_contract)</p><p>AND isnull(contract_code1,'') &lt;&gt; ''</p><p>DELETE FROM his_comb_split_contract    </p><p>WHERE tx_date = '20231130'</p><p>AND contract_code2 NOT IN (SELECT contract_code FROM trade_contract)</p><p>AND isnull(contract_code2,'') &lt;&gt; ''</p><p>DELETE FROM his_comb_split_contract    </p><p>WHERE tx_date = '20231130'</p><p>AND contract_code3 NOT IN (SELECT contract_code FROM trade_contract)</p><p>AND isnull(contract_code3,'') &lt;&gt; ''</p><p>DELETE FROM his_comb_split_contract    </p><p>WHERE tx_date = '20231130'</p><p>AND contract_code4 NOT IN (SELECT contract_code FROM trade_contract)</p><p>AND isnull(contract_code4,'') &lt;&gt; ''</p></blockquote><blockquote><p></p></blockquote>

data.problem: <p>咨询v6s柜台-经纪人返佣设置，能否仅对交易所手续费产生的返还金额做相应设置<br /></p>

data.problem: <p>进行v8s的测试，咨询手续费率是否可以自动同步<br /></p>
data.solution: <p>v8s的1070版本加入了ctp采集程序，可以实现从ctp系统采集相关客户的保证金率和手续费率<br /></p>

data.problem: <p>上了sybase15以后导交易所成交文件以及全部确认速度变慢<br /></p>
data.solution: <p>除了像sybase12一样要把设备的dsync属性off掉，还需要额外把directio也off掉。</p><p></p><p>dsyncon/off表示ASE是否保证把数据写入到设备上面去。</p><p>directioon/off表示ASE是否跳过操作系统的文件系统缓存。</p><p>目前sybase15的三种模式：</p><p>1、dsyncon和directiooff表示ASE的写操作直接在存储介质上进行，能够保证数据完全写入到设备上以及数据库的可恢复性；</p><p>2、dsyncoff和directioon表示ASE的写操作跳过操作系统缓冲区高速缓存，直接将数据传输到磁盘，不能保证数据真正写入到设备上；</p><p>3、dsyncoff和directiooff表示使用文件系统的缓存。</p><p>注：dsync和directio是互斥的，也就是：dsync on对应directio off,directio on对应dsync off。dsync和directio不能同时启用，但是可以同时关闭。</p><p>语句参考如下</p><p>ksqhdb数据文件设备模式修改命令：</p><p>sp_deviceattr ksqhdb_part3,directio,false//需要修改所有数据设备</p><p>ksqhdb日志文件设备模式修改命令：</p><p>sp_deviceattr ksqhdblog,directio,false//需要修改所有日志设备</p><p>tempdb数据文件</p><p>sp_deviceattr tempdb_adddev1,directio,false//需要修改所有数据设备</p><p>tempdb日志文件</p><p>sp_deviceattr tempdb_addlog1,directio,false//需要修改所有日志设备</p><p>效果怎么样呢？中钢的仿真库原来导广期的文件直接把库干死了，directio也关掉以后，5分钟内吧，用批量导入成交文件的方式，从导入文件导全部确认都干完了。<br /></p>

data.problem: <p>什么是上海/能源交易所的大笔交易<br /></p>
data.solution: <p>大笔交易指上期、能源的，期货公司在会服上替投资者申请，2个投资者就某个合约（交易所允许进行大笔交易的合约）达成一致意见，一买一卖，约定撮合，期货公司柜台系统会收到对应的成交回报。</p><p>大笔交易目前交易所统筹的情况是不参与看穿式报送，所以不需要在线下委托的记录里增加对应数据。</p><p>大笔交易在成交里的体现为成交类型为DB-大笔交易，在交易所的成交文件里其持仓来源为6-大笔交易<br /></p>

data.solution: <p>大概率是vcsbu运行异常所致</p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/458652959/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902531%3B1774075391%26q-key-time%3D1773902531%3B1774075391%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D5f572e00814f4f583ca8d0aafa1650e34e7367bf&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="458652959"><img hb_type="file" file_id="458652959" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/458652959/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902531%3B1774075391%26q-key-time%3D1773902531%3B1774075391%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D576db37e1d489ba2b0f6f9581b83048f98de450a&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a><br /></p><p>界面上一般会有报错，bu的日志里应该也有，大概率是和一线通登录失败了。</p><p>——————20230412更新——————</p><p>确实是vcsbu的事情，但结果令人乍舌</p><p>折腾了2天多还是不行，然后银行尝试发起了一次银期请求，处理居然成功了……</p><p>然后想着是不是打包一下程序和日志过来看看，结果关闭接口复制文件夹的时候提示程序被占用，查看系统进程发现还有一个vcsbu卡在进程里，杀掉以后再把程序拉起来，问题就解决了……<br /></p>

data.problem: <p>风控终端上查客户风险通知只能查到近几天的数据<br /></p>
data.solution: <p>V8T会根据交易参数DATA_CLEAR_CIRCLE-数据清理周期去清理历史数据，清理时保留的数据天数以交易参数DATA_KEEP_PERIOD-数据保留天数来进行控制，通常这两个参数设置一致。</p><p>最近一次的清理日期在交易参数LAST_CLEAN_DATE-最近清理日期中体现。</p><p>清理时的表在tt_clean_history_data表中，截至到8509时，清理表如下</p><table><colgroup><col width="252" /><col width="238" /><col width="119" /></colgroup><tbody><tr><td>表</td>  <td>表名</td>  <td>日期参照字段</td> </tr><tr><td>th_his_quote</td>  <td>历史报价表</td>  <td>entrust_date</td> </tr><tr><td>tr_cust_risk_notify_info</td>  <td>客户风险通知信息表</td>  <td>notify_date</td> </tr><tr><td>tt_oper_log</td>  <td>系统操作日志表</td>  <td>oper_date</td> </tr><tr><td>th_entrust</td>  <td>历史委托表</td>  <td>entrust_date</td> </tr><tr><td>th_his_combination_entrust</td>  <td>历史组合委托表</td>  <td>entrust_date</td> </tr><tr><td>th_his_original_entrust</td>  <td>历史原始委托表</td>  <td>entrust_date</td> </tr><tr><td>th_his_force_offset_entrust</td>  <td>历史强平委托表</td>  <td>entrust_date</td> </tr><tr><td>th_his_error_entrust</td>  <td>历史错误委托表</td>  <td>entrust_date</td> </tr><tr><td>th_his_cust_done</td>  <td>历史成交表</td>  <td>done_date</td> </tr><tr><td>th_pre_entrust</td>  <td>预埋委托</td>  <td>pre_date</td> </tr><tr><td>tt_report_affirm_io</td>  <td>结算单确认流水表</td>  <td>report_date</td> </tr><tr><td>tt_account_money_io</td>  <td>帐户实时出入金表</td>  <td>tx_date</td> </tr><tr><td>tt_init_log</td>  <td>交易初始化流水表</td>  <td>init_date</td> </tr><tr><td>tt_close_log</td>  <td>盘后处理流水表</td>  <td>close_date</td> </tr><tr><td>th_pending_deal_cancel</td>  <td>待处理撤单回报信息表</td>  <td>tx_date</td> </tr><tr><td>th_pending_deal_done</td>  <td>待处理平仓成交信息表</td>  <td>done_date</td> </tr><tr><td>tt_sys_bulletin</td>  <td>系统公告信息表</td>  <td>send_date</td> </tr><tr><td>tr_cust_risk_notify</td>  <td>客户风险通知表</td>  <td>notify_date</td> </tr><tr><td>tt_cust_notify</td>  <td>客户通知消息临时表</td>  <td>note_end_date</td> </tr><tr><td>tt_sync_jour_deal_log</td>  <td>实时同步流水处理结果</td>  <td>sync_tx_date</td> </tr><tr><td>tt_sync_jour</td>  <td>系统实时同步流水信息</td>  <td>sync_tx_date</td> </tr><tr><td>tt_guide_message</td>  <td>业务向导的交互信息</td>  <td>oper_date</td> </tr><tr><td>tt_pledge_io</td>  <td>质押流水表</td>  <td>tx_date</td> </tr><tr><td>th_non_trade_entrust</td>  <td>非交易委托表</td>  <td>entrust_date</td> </tr><tr><td>tt_cust_currency_swap</td>  <td>换汇流水表</td>  <td>tx_date</td> </tr><tr><td>tt_custterminal_collectinfo</td>  <td>客户接入终端采集信息表(密文)</td>  <td>oper_date</td> </tr><tr><td>tt_custterminal_collectinfo2</td>  <td>客户接入终端采集信息表(明文)</td>  <td>oper_date</td></tr></tbody></table><p>其中客户风险通知相关的表也在清理的范围内</p><p>瑞奇期货DATA_CLEAR_CIRCLE和DATA_KEEP_PERIOD设置的都是5，也就是每隔5天清理5天前的历史数据，LAST_CLEAN_DATE上一次清理日期时20230407，所以在V8T上没有办法查到4月份以前的客户风险通知数据了。<br /></p>

data.problem: <p>成交单管理，中金所平今的客户手续费和上交手续费精度是怎么处理的</p>
data.solution: <p>成交单管理：</p><p>客户手续费：平今手续费按手数+平今手续费按金额，然后round2</p><p>上交手续费：先用round2(开平手续费按手数+开平手续费按金额)，然后乘以round2（交易所平今手续费/开平手续费）比值，最后的结果再做round2</p>

data.problem: <p>账户中心内部银行代码和报送银行代码关系以及和V6S对应关系怎么查？<br /></p>
data.solution: <p>以下语句是账户中心和V6S银行卡映射关系的表<br /></p><p>select* from cf_account.v_dict_subentry_map</p><p>   where entry_no = 'u_bankcode'</p><p>     and data_source = 'v6s';</p><p>另外需要注意，这张表里的SUBENTRY字段值与银行的对应关系需要与账户中心的银行代码枚举值做对应</p><p>select * from wolf.wb_key where key_name = 'acc_open_bank'</p><p>否则也会有异常。</p><p>V6S的对应关系可以用下述语句来检查<br /></p><p>SELECT b.dict_value,a.yhjc,b.dict_caption FROM yhdm a,dictionary b</p><p>WHERE b.dict_value = a.yhdm</p><p>AND b.dict_no = 1231</p><p>根据这几个语句输出的数据修改账户中心的映射关系表cf_account.v_dict_subentry_map</p><p>——————20240111更新——————</p><p>版本更新后，可以在账户中心系统间枚举映射配置里，账户枚举代码填入u_bankcode查询显示的结果就是现有和V6S银行对应的关系，如新上银行，可以在查询后在这个界面进行增加。</p><p>select * from wolf.wb_key where key_name = 'acc_open_bank'</p><p>这个脚本执行出来如果缺少相关银行枚举，可以打开下面的完整包里的这个sql，找到对应的银行枚举记录单独刷那一条即可。<br /></p><p>\\10.253.48.161\releases\releases_acc\账户中心全量包\unicenter_1.0.14-4全量包\数据库\wolf\tablechanges_core.sql</p><p>增加枚举和增加对应关系操作昨晚都需要重启环境<br /></p>

data.problem: <p>升级8508P1包的cmds增量包后，狗头会刷屏提示DNSserver连接超时</p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/457610143/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902532%3B1774075392%26q-key-time%3D1773902532%3B1774075392%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D0594a09cc4a93846c1d359f9376c1a7da34c4062&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="457610143"><img hb_type="file" file_id="457610143" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/457610143/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902532%3B1774075392%26q-key-time%3D1773902532%3B1774075392%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3Df4f8a6ed742324acaa8a631d1c1178df5dbf29cf&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a><br /></p>
data.solution: <p>8508P1包里有界面版本的dns升级后的NDSSERVER超时问题，已经在8509中修复了，可以直接升级8509有界面版本的dnsserver中的内容（dns_modify.txt不用更新），也可以先回退上一个版本的dnsserver.exe。<br /></p>

data.problem: <p>账户中心升级到1015-hotfix1，上报时报如下错误<br /></p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/457051503/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902532%3B1774075392%26q-key-time%3D1773902532%3B1774075392%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D39db18c9a10e370289d52de89d0224aef159123c&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%229cd2658e40c2bc990c855a0218b42b4a.jpg%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%279cd2658e40c2bc990c855a0218b42b4a.jpg" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="457051503"><img hb_type="file" file_id="457051503" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/457051503/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902532%3B1774075392%26q-key-time%3D1773902532%3B1774075392%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D0e3b6f3e48b317bd6bfbddc3c3f36c443b66e77b&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%229cd2658e40c2bc990c855a0218b42b4a.jpg%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%279cd2658e40c2bc990c855a0218b42b4a.jpg&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a><br /></p>
data.solution: <p>需要单独刷服务群里面的p_acc19020_e.prc，</p><p>如果已经报这个错了需要 去给这个表cf_account.t_trade_authority的lastmodifiedtime字段赋个值  select a.*,a.rowid from cf_account.t_trade_authority a</p><p>where a.root_id in (select id from </p><p>cf_account.t_registrationaggregationroot where client_no='') --填入客户号<br /></p><p>——以下语句用于更新——</p><p>--中间表<br /></p><p>update   cf_account.t_trade_authority a set a.lastmodifiedtime=a.createdtime</p><p>where a.root_id in (select id from </p><p>cf_account.t_registrationaggregationroot where client_no='') --填入客户号<br /></p><p>and a.lastmodifiedtime is null</p><p>--落地表<br /></p><p>update   cf_account.t_final_trade_authority a set a.lastmodifiedtime=a.createdtime</p><p>where a.root_id in (select id from </p><p>cf_account.t_final_registrationagroot where client_no='')  --填入客户号</p><p>and a.lastmodifiedtime is null</p>

data.problem: <p>中金国债期货每手数量要设置为多少<br /></p>
data.solution: <p>一般是合约标的面值÷报价方式</p><p>比如合约标的是面值100万人民币，报价方式是百元净价报价，所以系统里的每手数量就是1000000÷100=10000<br /></p>

data.problem: <p>V6S和账户中心对于客户类的调整，有哪些是能做同步的？<br /></p>
data.solution: <p>1、对V6S增删改的客户类（设置各级客户类中增删改的客户类），账户中心默认会在每天晚上十点同步（1016后所有客户都有，之前部分2022年10月份之后新上线的客户才有）。</p><p>2、通过信息变更单独修改客户的客户类，会同步给V6S。</p><p>其他的诸如在账户中心系统管理-客户属性设置中调整的客户类，是不会反向同步给V6S的，这里可以作为V6S盘中改完客户类，需要马上在账户中心上修改客户类继而保持两边客户类一致的应急操作。</p><p>通过投资者管理-客户类修改界面进行的客户类整体修改、单个客户客户类修改和导入文件修改都不会同步给V6S。</p><p>在V6S修改的客户的客户类，也不会同步给账户中心。</p><p>——————20231121更新——————</p><p>1017支持投资者管理-客户类修改界面进行的客户类变更自动同步<br /></p>

data.problem: <p>郑州组合冻结保证金如何计算，为什么两套V8T里面未成交组合委托的冻结保证金不一样</p>
data.solution: <p>V8T计算郑州组合的冻结保证金，买腿：先看最新价，若无，则看昨结价</p><p>卖腿：先看max(最新价和买一价)，若无，则取昨结价</p><p>保证金体现在腿一上</p><p>两套V8T因为一套是委托出去的交易中心，一套是收委托回报的交易中心，因为两边委托派生出来的时间上会有时间差，行情一直在刷新，所以两边实际计算冻结保证金时，行情会有差别，导致两边的冻结保证金也会不一样。成交了之后收取的保证金是一致的。</p>

data.problem: <p>怎么看数据库占用空间、表占用空间和剩余空间</p>
data.solution: <p>1、查看数据库空间情况</p><p>sp_spaceused --库空间<br /></p><p>sp_spaceused syslogs --日志空间</p><p>sp_spaceused table_name --表空间<br /></p><p>2、查看数据库设备各段空间情况</p><p>sp_helpsegment</p><p>sp_helpsegment index_segment --索引剩余空间</p><p>sp_helpsegment system --系统剩余空间</p><p>sp_helpsegment logsegment --日志剩余空间</p><p>3、查询sybase DB中占用空间最多的前N张表</p><p>-----按照已使用空间查询</p><p>Select top 250 name,used_pages(db_id(),id)/(1024.0/(@@maxpagesize/1024.0)) as "Used MB"</p><p>from sysobjects</p><p>order by used_pages(db_id(),id) desc --需要的话修改top后面的数字展示<br /></p><p>-------按照数据行数查询</p><p>Select top 20 name, row_count(db_id(), id)</p><p>from sysobjects</p><p>order by row_count(db_id(),id) desc --需要的话修改top后面的数字展示<br /></p><p>-------按照分配的空间查询</p><p>Select top 20 name, reserved_pages(db_id(),id)/(1024.0 / (@@maxpagesize/1024.0) ) as "Allocated MB"</p><p>from sysobjects</p><p>order by reserved_pages(db_id(),id) desc --需要的话修改top后面的数字展示<br /></p>

src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/452546466/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902532%3B1774075392%26q-key-time%3D1773902532%3B1774075392%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D765c622d426c30b4de6b4143859acf728df5c86a&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a></p><p>哎，他就查询出来了</p><p>2、到客户属性管理中查一下这部分客户的属性中的第三条“不打印结算单”是不是勾上了</p><p>哎，就确认是勾上的，那就确认是这个原因导致的。</p><p>截至到目前为止，结算单查询提示没有查询结果的问题结束了，然后发现后面这些客户都是通过账户中心开户的客户，经确认，账户中心里客户资料里的附加信息中有客户属性的项目，其中就有账单不打印，如果勾选了以后会同步给V6S，如下图<br /></p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/452547538/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902532%3B1774075392%26q-key-time%3D1773902532%3B1774075392%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D3278ee00aec5d570e9dc07f9765a1f852ded74d5&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="452547538"><img hb_type="file" file_id="452547538" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/452547538/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902532%3B1774075392%26q-key-time%3D1773902532%3B1774075392%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3Dba9dd66acb3d806f1b2fbe695960deb28ee166e4&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a><br /></p><p>继而在账户中心系统管理-附加资料配置中有账单不打印的默认值<img src="" alt="" /></p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/605506886/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902532%3B1774075392%26q-key-time%3D1773902532%3B1774075392%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D6230faa1fc1a49d5a66fd5734af580afeb66a0ce&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22W%2528VDGRM7_6W9%255D%2560L2WW%257BZ2BE.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27W%2528VDGRM7_6W9%255D%2560L2WW%257BZ2BE.png" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="605506886"><img hb_type="file" file_id="605506886" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/605506886/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902532%3B1774075392%26q-key-time%3D1773902532%3B1774075392%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D81e2ac462fbba09ac0508fe3772ae71ca8b0b2da&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22W%2528VDGRM7_6W9%255D%2560L2WW%257BZ2BE.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27W%2528VDGRM7_6W9%255D%2560L2WW%257BZ2BE.png&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a><br /></p><p>如果默认值是1，那么新开客户的客户属性就都是账单不打印了，并且会同步给V6S，如果需要的话，这里的默认值需要做调整。</p><p>以上，打完收工。<br /></p>

data.problem: <p>广期所linux报盘，行情从报盘用TMC拉不起来<br /></p>
data.solution: <p>远程上去以后，到agent目录下手工停了再起成功，但是到TMC上发现虽然从行情报盘起来了，但从的交易报盘被停了，从agent的日志上来看，似乎是zookeeper把交易报盘停了，手工把交易报盘起了以后又发现行情报盘被停了，以此往复。</p><p>喊针遇到过这个问题，并且和杜爱月反馈过了，相关的修复已经在8509的linux报盘了做了修正了，具体变更是</p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/452291376/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902532%3B1774075392%26q-key-time%3D1773902532%3B1774075392%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D831e8075743622a067bd95b6f66e94488cc06487&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="452291376"><img hb_type="file" file_id="452291376" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/452291376/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902532%3B1774075392%26q-key-time%3D1773902532%3B1774075392%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D82fc233843396a92115f242a8f826637837b5285&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a><br /></p><p>原因是内存里两个程序tag标识重复导致的，差不多这么个意思</p><p>临时的解决方案是</p><p>在行情从报盘已经停了的情况下，到offer_2目录下，依次执行以下命令</p><p>mv md mdbk</p><p>cp mdbk md</p><p>rm -rf mdbk</p><p>再用TMC开启从报盘的agent即可解决。<br /></p>

data.problem: <p>linux报盘怎么看程序版本<br /></p>
data.solution: <p>交易报盘：      ./offer ver<br /></p><p>行情报盘：      ./recv_dcemd ver<br /></p>

data.problem: <p>存量一般法人户重做适当性，提交之后经营范围看不到</p>
data.solution: <p>一般法人不能选非银金融，适当性评测选了非银金融，跟客户资料里面不一样，所以看不到</p>

data.problem: <p>一个统一社会信用代码特法户，做了适当性，在经纪业务开户界面根据客户统一社会信用代码进行开户，自动获取出来的是其他客户资料，非本客户资料。<br /></p>
data.solution: <p>经排查，账户系统【适当性流水查询】界面查询出来该客户的适当性记录证件类型为空，理应证件类型是必填项，做适当性时应该是填写的。不知道为何为空。（待账户开发李斌寻找原因）</p><p>此处是手工将客户证件类型添加到账户表里CF_ACCOUNT.T_CLIENT、cf_account.t_appropriateness_root、cf_account.t_final_registrationagroot 、cf_account.t_final_client。</p><p>重新做经纪业务开户就能获取正确客户资料了。</p>

data.problem: <p>特殊单位客户开证件类型为特殊机构代码（QFII,RQFII)经纪业务开户，发现开户地域这里只能选择“境内”，不能选择“境外”或其他地域。<br /></p>
data.solution: <p>经和监控中心确定，特殊单位RQFII客户开户地域问题，需要选择境内。<br /></p>

data.problem: <p>做v6s持仓结算时报”正在进行持仓结算“，更改完交易参数里所有CCJIESUAN参数代码为0后，重做持仓结算，CCJIESUAN参数代码对应席位代码为0的参数值又变成当天日期了。<br /></p>
data.solution: <p>查看数据库的日志SYBASE.log可以看到报错： SQL causing error : exec p852007 'thl','20230306','20230306','','','',11276,2</p><p>原因是因为数据库里deal_sfe_file_exch_s_to_h的 sp失效了，此sp在61008包里发布，重刷之后再做结算就可以了。</p>

data.problem: <p>测试招行2.0接口时，替换升级完毕，启动ksmbcc4报错“bankbu_cmd.exe-无法找到入口</p><p>                                                无法定位程序输入点EVP_PKEY_set_alias_type于动态链接库D:\招行2.0测试\一线通银期接口测试\bankbu_cmb.exe上。</p>
data.solution: <p>其原因是由于后续银期开发那边将所有银行接口都要用一套代码，工行增加了国密调用库，之后所有比工行国密版本更新的银期接口程序，都需要增加这个动态库，而招行2.0接口开发就在基于工行国密接口包基础上修改了招行2.0接口更新包，修改后的2.0接口包需要兼容工行国密接口包里的文件libcrypto-1_1.dll（文件大小2361k),从工行国密接口包里将此文件拷贝到招行2.0测试接口上，ksmbcc4就能启动了。后续开发那边将此libcrypto-1_1.dll提交到一线通基础接口下。<br /></p>

data.problem: <p>特殊法人上报失败 返回提示xml错误</p>
data.solution: <p>常见问题 查看上报报文，检查投资品种、投资比例，注册地址能信息是否超过100个字符长度（50个汉字字符）</p>

data.problem: <p>客户信息界面双击点开界面空白</p>
data.solution: <p>1.法人户一般为具体经营范围录入了特殊字符 回车、英文的标点符号等。如果是录入及审批中的流程点不开 则检查流水表 </p><p>select a.businessscopes_detail,a.*,a.rowid from cf_account.t_domesticcompany a where a.root_id in (select id from cf_Account.t_Registrationaggregationroot</p><p>where client_no=''）--客户号</p><p>如果是审批完成的，比如投资者查询界面双击打开空白，则检查落地表数据 </p><p>select a.businessscopes_detail,a.*,a.rowid from cf_account.t_final_domesticcompany a where a.client_id in (select client_id from cf_Account.t_Final_Registrationagroot</p><p>where client_no=''）--客户号</p><p>2.自然人户出现这种情况需检查身份证地址、办公地址、联系地址等信息是否存在特殊字符</p><p>流水</p><p>select s.card_address,s.address,s.*,s.rowid from cf_account.t_additionalregistration s where root_id in (select id from cf_Account.t_Registrationaggregationroot</p><p>where client_no=''）--客户号</p><p>落地</p><p>select s.card_address,s.address,s.*,s.rowid from cf_account.t_final_additionalregistration s where client_id in select client_id from cf_Account.t_Final_Registrationagroot</p><p>where client_no=''）--客户号</p><p> </p>

data.problem: <p>                        </p><p>为什么新开特法上报的customer客户名称后面还加了个“无”<br /></p>
data.solution: <p>特法户在证监会上报customer中客户名称=客户名称+分户管理资产名称，所以如果这个特法没有分户管理资产名称就不需要填写，否则在上报的时候就会把填入的内容拼到客户名称后面去了。<br /></p>

data.solution: <p>通过这个网址登进去<a href="https://unicenter.xmrd.net:9000/ks/m?xwl=Unicenter/black_test/TEST_DATA" target="_blank">https://unicenter.xmrd.net:9000/ks/m?xwl=Unicenter/black_test/TEST_DATA</a><br /></p>

data.problem: <p><font>客户在只有郑州套保持仓，无投机持仓的情况下，通过文华终端对应金仕达后台系统下郑州保值平仓，报错</font><font>“可平数量不足。”对应</font><font>CTP</font><font>后台系统下郑州保值平仓正常。</font><br /></p>
data.solution: <p><b><font>处理：</font></b><font>最终客户通过文华终端对应金仕达后台系统下郑州保值平仓，选择投机属性平仓完成。</font></p><p><b><font>原因：</font></b><font>文华终端在下郑州保值平仓时，会获取主系统查持仓</font><font>854048</font><font>功能号应答包里保值属性对应的可平数量，而我们在客户只有套保仓，无投机仓的情况下，应答查持仓包里给予保值属性的可平数量即为</font><font>0</font><font>，此<font>需求在开发提供的需求变更下，应该是</font><font>2019</font><font>年修改郑州保值转投机时修改的代码，当时对</font><font>周边网关</font><font>857017</font><font>查可开可平和</font><font>854058</font><font>查可平做了修改，</font><font>854048</font><font>查持仓这块没有改，导致提供给终端的套保可平数量不准确。正常可平数量在没有挂单的情况下是投机+套保的总持仓手数。</font></font></p><p><font><font>最后结果：<font>金仕达</font><font>V8T</font><font>后台会修改</font><font>854048</font><font>查持仓的可平数量不准确缺陷，计划在</font><font>V8T8601</font><font>版本解决。升级包未发布之前，</font><font>文</font><font>华运维先在文华金仕达网关配置</font><font>6068</font><font>，对应我们后台</font><font>857017</font><font>功能查询可平数量临时解决。</font></font></font></p><p><font><br /></font></p>

data.problem: <p>V8T的交易员查出来的持仓保证金和CTP上看到的持仓保证金，小数点后两位的值不一样</p>
data.solution: <p>V8T这边交易员查询是在开盘之前查的，所以持仓保证金是直接用的V6S的数据，V6S的cust_hold表里面是根据成交列出的持仓明细，每条记录的持仓保证金都是这条记录的手数按照两位小数近似值计算出来的，柜台查询再将同合约同买卖方向同投保属性的持仓保证金做汇总按照两位小数近似值计算。而CTP是按总手数合计之后再按照两位小数近似值计算。计算过程上有差异，从而导致精度有差异。</p>

data.problem: <p>工行国密上线前，收到银行的反馈，银行将不在直接提供sm2公钥信息，只提供证书文件，咨询银期接口里的公钥信息是否需要配置<br /></p>
data.solution: <p>银行的证书文件cbft.cer里会包含公钥信息，需将公钥信息拷贝出来，去掉前缀的04数字，将剩下信息黏贴到bank.ini配置里的公钥信息位置，再将字符间的空格去掉即可。<br /></p>

data.problem: <p>咨询v8t的8508p1里的二代行情里的interface信息的A路和B路是否需要配置两个不同的组播网卡地址<br /></p>
data.solution: <p>得知客户一台机器上只有一个组播网卡地址，因此两个interface地址配成一致即可。<br /></p>

data.problem: <p>工行国密测试，银行端发起请求都没问题，但是期货端发起的请求，都发不到银期接口上，柜台银期监控显示都是处理中。</p>
data.solution: <p>20221128_工行银期转账接口国密版这个包里ksmbcc.ini里的功能号和数据分发服务器功能号重复了，客户部署的话，要让他们改掉，比如9780，但需要注意，最好看下bank_func表，也不能和其他重复。</p>

data.problem: <p>错误的新增了机构版里的主账号，要怎么删除</p>
data.solution: <p>首先，不知道什么原因，在设置主账号的界面只有查询和新增，没有删除的操作，所以通过界面无法删除新增的主账号。</p><p>另外新增主账号会生成很多表的数据，包括但不限于操作员表，客户资料表等，可通过下述语句进行删除</p><blockquote><p>DECLARE @mi_main_no VARCHAR(16),@tmp_cust_no varchar(16)</p><p>SELECT @mi_main_no = '007'	--主账号，自行修改</p><p>--子账户</p><p>select @tmp_cust_no = @mi_main_no + '000'</p><p>--operator</p><p>DELETE FROM operator WHERE oper_code = @mi_main_no</p><p>--operator_auth</p><p>DELETE FROM operator_auth WHERE oper_code = @mi_main_no</p><p>--cust_whole</p><p>DELETE FROM cust_whole WHERE cust_no = @tmp_cust_no</p><p>--cust_basic</p><p>DELETE FROM cust_basic WHERE cust_no = @tmp_cust_no</p><p>--cust_real_fund</p><p>DELETE FROM cust_real_fund WHERE cust_no = @tmp_cust_no</p><p>--oper_all_cust</p><p>DELETE FROM oper_all_cust WHERE cust_no = @tmp_cust_no</p><p>--pre_cffe_cust_basic</p><p>DELETE FROM pre_cffe_cust_basic WHERE cust_no = @tmp_cust_no</p><p>--oper_cust</p><p>DELETE FROM oper_cust WHERE cust_no = @tmp_cust_no</p><p>--main_account</p><p>DELETE FROM main_account WHERE main_no = @mi_main_no</p><p>--oper_main_relation</p><p>DELETE FROM oper_main_relation WHERE main_no = @mi_main_no</p><p>--CustRateSynStatusTbl</p><p>DELETE FROM oper_main_relation WHERE cust_no = @tmp_cust_no</p></blockquote>
