data.problem: <p>发现同一个客户，分别生成当前库的阶段结算单和历史库的阶段结算单，当前库的结算单里有结算单确认人，而历史库里的没有。<br /></p>
data.solution: <p>是由于历史库里的pre_cffe_cust_addinfo_new表里无该客户的结算单确认人导致，而当前库里是有的。目前历史数据分发，不会分发此表，解决方法目前是将当前库的该表数据bcp in到历史库。<br /></p>

data.problem: <p>V8T的操作日志记录里的客户密码修改的pwd_type与数据字典里面的密码类型对不上</p>
data.solution: <p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/437552893/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902534%3B1774075394%26q-key-time%3D1773902534%3B1774075394%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3Dcc7d6c19b295501f3c61b1a002561c5b441f557b&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22803d2c850752c9641aa6d553d03eb5cb.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27803d2c850752c9641aa6d553d03eb5cb.png" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="437552893"><img hb_type="file" file_id="437552893" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/437552893/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902534%3B1774075394%26q-key-time%3D1773902534%3B1774075394%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D0ea0cbc4493885da06b52d7607164288728e4bad&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22803d2c850752c9641aa6d553d03eb5cb.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27803d2c850752c9641aa6d553d03eb5cb.png&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a><br /></p><p>上图是日志的pwd_type的密码类型</p><p>下图是数据字典中的密码类型</p><p>V8T后台把记日志的密码类型写死了，没有用到数据字典里面的子项代码。具体对应关系如上图，1交易2资金3委托4查询</p>

data.problem: <p>为什么保证金优惠参数表里对应期货期权的BFO合约组合保证金优惠比率是N，在结算时，交易所保证金是按0.8的比率进行优惠的。</p>
data.solution: <p>在deal_zhtl_margin（刷库时sp叫cal_zhtl_margin.sql）对组合保证金比率进行处理时，当组合策略是OPL,BLS,CAS,BFO时，如果交易所的保证金优惠参数表中给出的优惠比率是小于0大于1或者为null的值，则会根据comb_margin_rate表中的对应组合策略期货合约的margin_scale值赋予其保证金优惠比率，如下图</p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/437521112/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902534%3B1774075394%26q-key-time%3D1773902534%3B1774075394%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D9bc9b977f02a606f535ea24bd010d9c2df63172d&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22b38cf1f9f035382e0ed23a6b810bc91c.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27b38cf1f9f035382e0ed23a6b810bc91c.png" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="437521112"><img hb_type="file" file_id="437521112" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/437521112/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902534%3B1774075394%26q-key-time%3D1773902534%3B1774075394%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D00b99e750d5f39ad363bc16333c81f80da563bc9&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22b38cf1f9f035382e0ed23a6b810bc91c.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27b38cf1f9f035382e0ed23a6b810bc91c.png&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a><br /></p><p><br /></p><p>这个comb_margin_rate仅能通过V6S保证金优惠比率设置（费率设置→品种费率设置→组合保证金比率设置）的界面新增，当在此处手工增加过相关策略相关合约的优惠比率后，就会出现交易所保证金优惠参数表在为N时，依然会被优惠的情况。</p><p>在系统能导入大商所的保证金优惠参数表后，该界面切勿手工新增相关设置，否则会出现上述保证金计算优惠不正确的情况。</p>

data.problem: <p>客户有1000手c2305持仓，700手和期权形成组合，300手单腿，结算后的交易所保证金怎么算出来的<br /></p>
data.solution: <p>先列出各种条件</p><p>1、当天c2305结算价2871</p><p>2、期货和期权形成组合，保证金收取是期货保证金*保证金优惠比例X</p><p>3、席位保证金率0.08</p><p>4、品种c每手数量10</p><p>所以当天c2305合约保证金收取为</p><p>c2305期货单腿保证金为2871*300*10*0.08</p><p>c2305和期权形成组合后的保证金为2871*700*10*0.08*0.8</p><p>最终保证金为c2305期货单腿保证金+c2305和期权形成组合后的保证金=（2871*300*10*0.08）+（2871*700*10*0.08*0.8）=1975248</p><p>大连六期组合保证金率优惠计算参见下表</p><table><colgroup><col /><col /><col /></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p><b>策略名称</b><b>（策略代码）</b></p></td><td><p><b>策略描述</b></p></td><td><p><b>保证金收取标准</b></p></td></tr><tr><td><p><b><font>买入期货期权（</font><font>BFO）</font></b></p></td><td><p>买入看涨期权，卖出对应期货合约</p><p>买入看跌期权，买入对应期货合约</p><p>买入期权合约对应的标的是买入或卖出的期货合约</p></td><td><p>X*期货保证金</p></td></tr><tr><td><p><b><font>期权对锁（</font><font>OPL）</font></b></p></td><td><p>买入看涨期权，卖出看涨期权</p><p>买入看跌期权，卖出看跌期权</p><p>买卖同一期权合约</p></td><td><p>X*卖期权保证金</p></td></tr><tr><td><p><b><font>买入期权垂直价差（</font><font>B</font></b><b>LS</b><b>）</b></p></td><td><p>买入低执行价格看涨期权，卖出高执行价格看涨期权<br />买入高执行价格看跌期权，卖出低执行价格看跌期权</p><p>买卖相同期货标的的期权合约</p></td><td><p>X*卖期权保证金</p></td></tr><tr><td><p><b>卖出期权垂直价差（</b><b>BES</b><b>）</b></p></td><td><p>卖出低执行价格看涨期权，买入高执行价格看涨期权<br />卖出高执行价格看跌期权，买入低执行价格看跌期权</p><p>买卖相同期货标的、执行价不同的期权合约 </p></td><td><p>min(买卖执行价之差*交易单位，卖方期权保证金)</p></td></tr><tr><td><p><b><font>日历价差（</font><font>CAS）</font></b></p></td><td><p>卖出较近月份的看涨期权合约，买入较远月份相同执行价格的看涨期权合约</p><p>卖出较近月份的看跌期权合约，买入较远月份相同执行价格的看跌期权合约</p><p>买卖相同品种和执行价、不同交割期的期权合约</p></td><td><p>X*卖期权保证金</p></td></tr></tbody></table><p><i>注</i><i>：</i><i>BES策略的执行价格之差为</i><i>=执行价格高的-执行价格低的，交易单位为每手数量。</i></p><p><i>其他组合类型如下</i></p><table><colgroup><col /><col /><col /></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p><b>策略名称</b><b>（策略代码）</b></p></td><td><p><b>策略描述</b></p></td><td><p><b>保证金收取标准</b></p></td></tr><tr><td><p><b><font>期货跨期组合（</font><font>SP）</font></b></p></td><td><p>买入期货，卖出期货</p><p>卖出期货，买入期货</p><p>交割月份不同</p></td><td><p>max(买方保证金，卖方保证金)</p></td></tr><tr><td><p><b><font>期货跨品种组合（</font><font>SPC）</font></b></p></td><td><p>买入期货，卖出期货</p><p>卖出期货，买入期货</p><p>品种不同，交割月份相同</p></td><td><p>max(买方保证金，卖方保证金)</p></td></tr><tr><td><p><b><font>期货对锁组合（</font><font>SPL）</font></b></p></td><td><p>买入期货，卖出期货</p><p>卖出期货，买入期货</p><p>买卖同一个合约</p></td><td><p>max(买方保证金，卖方保证金)</p></td></tr><tr><td><p><b><font>跨式（</font><font>STD）</font></b></p></td><td><p>卖出相同期货合约的、相同执行价格的、看涨期权和看跌期权</p></td><td><p>max(看涨期权保证金，看跌期权保证金)+另一方权利金</p></td></tr><tr><td><p><b><font>宽跨式（</font><font>STG）</font></b></p></td><td><p><font>卖出低执行价格的看跌期权</font> <font>和</font> <font>高执行价格的看涨期权</font></p></td><td><p>max(看涨期权保证金，看跌期权保证金)+另一方权利金</p></td></tr><tr><td rowspan="2"><p><b><font>期货与期权优惠策略（</font><font>SFO）</font></b></p></td><td><p>1、卖出看涨期权，同时买入对应期货合约</p></td><td rowspan="2"><p><font>期货保证金</font><font>+期权权利金</font></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>2、卖出看跌期权，同时卖出对应期货合约</p></td></tr></tbody></table>

data.problem: <p>账户中心新开户默认交易中心和权限模版，需要在账户中心里怎么做设置</p>
data.solution: <p>可以在账户中心账户管理模块下进入系统管理下的附加资料配置菜单进行设置，如下图</p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/437347739/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902534%3B1774075394%26q-key-time%3D1773902534%3B1774075394%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D3971d37480feadf5b64246f1462da0539e2fc2aa&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22image.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27image.png" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="437347739"><img hb_type="file" file_id="437347739" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/437347739/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902534%3B1774075394%26q-key-time%3D1773902534%3B1774075394%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3Da1cd4bde8a5330b9975ac813bb344011a3a4a693&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22image.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27image.png&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a><br /></p>

data.problem: <p>在当前费率查询做导出，没有当天新上市的IF2309合约的费率情况，但是查询的时候又能查到</p>
data.solution: <p>在调用p851377做费率导出时，会根据trade_contract中的合约信息对记录进行导出，如果在V8T做盘后数据回导之前进行当前费率数据导出，那么当天交易时期新上市合约就不会在导出数据中包含了。</p><p>故而在此界面需要等V8T盘后数据回导到V6S数据以后再进行导出，才能保证导出数据的相对完整。</p><p>客户的情况是在回导前做的当前费率导出，而在回导后结算时做的当前费率查询，所以出现了导出的没有2309，而查询时候又有2309的错觉了。</p>

data.problem: <p>V6S生成的中金批量行权数据，上报给中金所后提示数据重复</p>
data.solution: <p>多V8T交易中心部署的客户，由于其多个交易中心都包含全客户数据的，所以当通过V6S生成中金批量行权数据的时候，如果勾选了所有交易中心进行生成数据和导出，会导致所有交易中心对所有客户都生成了数据（只判断客户状态是否正常，根据KHQQJYZX参数判断客户期权买开交易权限是否开启，客户行权手续费是否大于交易所手续费，以上3个判断原则上多交易中心数据时一致的），故而导出上传到交易所后会提示数据重复。</p><p>在生成和查询导出时，只选择其中一个交易中心即可。</p>

data.problem: <p>重新生成中金所的批量行权数据进行导出，需要修改哪些个参数</p>
data.solution: <p>V6S中需修改交易参数BATCHEXP，对应交易所修改成0-未导出</p><p>V8T中需修改交易参数BATCH_GEN，修改为0-未生成；修改交易参数BATCHEXPORTED,对应交易所修改为0-尚未导出批量行权数据。</p>

data.problem: <p>客户做适当性试题的时候发现部分题目下面的选项没有数据，如图第九题所示</p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/432325810/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902534%3B1774075394%26q-key-time%3D1773902534%3B1774075394%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D7b9cc7edc46d8681b17d63b509883d15cf883880&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22QQ%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%258720230118191317.jpg%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27QQ%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%258720230118191317.jpg" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="432325810"><img hb_type="file" file_id="432325810" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/432325810/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902534%3B1774075394%26q-key-time%3D1773902534%3B1774075394%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D869664f6741369bddf6dc6b60332fa6d88bbcb7c&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22QQ%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%258720230118191317.jpg%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27QQ%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%258720230118191317.jpg&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a><br /></p>

data.problem: <p>账户中心投资者查询里只能看到客户的一张银行卡，但是信息变更时，又能看到两张卡号，提交审核的时候，在流水里又只能看到其中一张卡号。</p>
data.solution: <p>由于CF_ACCOUNT.T_BANKACCOUNT表中，该投资者的该卡号相关ID的记录中open_status为2（不为0），在后台将其修改为0即可。</p><p>一般通过ID和卡号就可以定位唯一性了，语句参考如下。<br /></p><blockquote><p>update CF_ACCOUNT.T_BANKACCOUNT a set a.open_status = '0'  --0:处理中, 1:开通成功, 2:已销户</p><p>where a.bank_client_name = '林泽宇'  --客户名称，非必要可以去除，法人客户的该字段未必是客户名称</p><p>and a.id = 'F281029E15BE6934E055E8DF7934CC7C'  --ID号，同一条修改流水，相关ID唯一</p><p>and a.bank_number = '4340613260024659' --卡号</p></blockquote>

data.problem: <p>在有账户中心系统的情况下，在什么样的操作下会出现客户附加资料里没有相关银行卡号，而客户的银期以及报送银行里是有相关卡号数据的？</p>
data.solution: <p>1、客户去银行签约银期的时候，如果银行参数HZ是N，就是不进行一致性校验，那么就能把银期开出来，并且插入报送表，但是附加资料里没有；<br /></p><p>2、客户在银期尚未解约的情况下，到云开户去修改或者删除了自己的银行卡，云开户将资料变更给到账户中心后，账户中心通过p859583同步数据给V6S。p859583在处理时，仅增、改时，会在增加、修改附加资料的时候，将新增卡号、变更后卡号加到报送数据中，删掉的银行卡和修改前的卡号不会在报送数据中销（删）掉，故而会造成附加资料里卡号没了，但是银期和报送数据中有此卡号。</p><p>后面会考虑删除也体现，但这变更会有一个问题，客户可能会自己到云开户系统上修改删除已签约银期银行卡，这时候如果做卡号销户，那么客户一但用这张卡发起银期，会出现报送问题。</p>

data.problem: <p>V8T系统里TtEntrust的inner_entrust_no、entrust_no、sys_no和TtCustDone中的entrust_no、sys_no是怎么个对应关系，与V6S的trd_cust_entrust以及trd_cust_real_done中的entrust_no、sys_no是怎么个对应关系。</p>
data.solution: <p>V8T的inner_entrust_no、entrust_no、sys_no分别是：</p><blockquote><p>inner_entrust_no：内部委托号；<br /></p><p>entrust_no：委托号；<br /></p><p>sys_no：系统号；<br /></p></blockquote><p>TtEntrust的entrust_no、sys_no和TtCustDone中的entrust_no、sys_no是能一一对应的</p><p>针对系统内部委托，inner_entrust_no和entrust_no是相同的</p><p>针对外部系统委托（如金仕达二席，CTP二席等），entrust_no是对应席位的相关委托号（CTP系统叫报单号）从报盘收到交易所委托（成交）回报后直接落表不做处理，而（TtEntrust表的）inner_entrust_no是系统内部委托号，是根据当前系统内的最大内部委托号派生的，所以inner_entrust_no和entrust_no大概率是不相同的。</p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/431176931/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDaxFHfoJWvA3jAKfuKVWIn1NTJuHXBHtd%26q-sign-time%3D1673852472%3B1673856132%26q-key-time%3D1673852472%3B1673856132%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D9f34f1c2ac56f9d6cc8191e67c7f5c8f170e5199&amp;response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22O0QMOUU%2524%257B%257D5CNMJRURV~9G9.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27O0QMOUU%2524%257B%257D5CNMJRURV~9G9.png" target="_blank"></a><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/431176931/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902535%3B1774075395%26q-key-time%3D1773902535%3B1774075395%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3Ddbdd81c9cf9acadd372cdc291db605ab8f4ad623&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22O0QMOUU%2524%257B%257D5CNMJRURV~9G9.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27O0QMOUU%2524%257B%257D5CNMJRURV~9G9.png" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="431176931"><img hb_type="file" file_id="431176931" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/431176931/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902535%3B1774075395%26q-key-time%3D1773902535%3B1774075395%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D5b91b64a4025182108567926d9d41acda97cf38f&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22O0QMOUU%2524%257B%257D5CNMJRURV~9G9.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27O0QMOUU%2524%257B%257D5CNMJRURV~9G9.png&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a><br /></p><p>到了V6S系统，由于trd_cust_entrust只有entrust_no、sys_no，V6S在处理V8T回导的数据时，在处理v8t_tt_entrust数据导入trd_cust_entrust时，会将v8t_tt_entrust的inner_entrust_no值赋予trd_cust_entrust的entrust_no。</p><p>故而会出现回导到V6S系统后，根据历史委托单查询和历史成交单查询，外部系统委托无法通过委托号进行一一对应，因为这时候trd_cust_entrust的entrust_no是内部委托号，而trd_cust_real_done中的entrust_no是（外部写入的）委托号。</p><p>这时候要核对外部系统委托和成交时，目前只能通过系统号来做一一对应，后续在61009的后续紧急包中会考虑增加相关表来将inner_entrust_no、entrust_no、sys_no进行对应，具体实现情况以V6S最终补丁呈现为准。</p><p>另注：</p><p>这不是某个版本改出来的问题，而是从有V8T进行交易结算分离后就一直存在的现象。</p><p>注2：</p><p>V6S历史成交单查询：</p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/431180910/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902535%3B1774075395%26q-key-time%3D1773902535%3B1774075395%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D5d8fb9d98227ed9de0f3422a04a2c4dfdba45505&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22image.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27image.png" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="431180910"><img hb_type="file" file_id="431180910" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/431180910/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902535%3B1774075395%26q-key-time%3D1773902535%3B1774075395%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3Dde93496fdaa701c1be80b9b81496b5c8bb3deac3&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22image.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27image.png&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a><br data.problem: <p>中金所开户申请交易编码上报失败，报错如下如所示：</p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/429104984/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902535%3B1774075395%26q-key-time%3D1773902535%3B1774075395%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D2f4ad64886403c5ec49207544093f98e22474784&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22QQ%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%258720230112134940.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27QQ%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%258720230112134940.png" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="429104984"><img hb_type="file" file_id="429104984" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/429104984/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902535%3B1774075395%26q-key-time%3D1773902535%3B1774075395%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D3b87df644535fa9c5866c978e589325e6ffd6321&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22QQ%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%258720230112134940.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27QQ%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%258720230112134940.png&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a><br /></p>
data.solution: <p>这个报错是中金营业部没有填正常，客户在系统配置中设置好中金营业部之后没有重启系统或者刷新系统，导致开户的时候选择的中金营业部是测试数据，跟实际的不符，所以上报与交易所设置的对不上，刷新一下系统或重启一下之后在开户流水中修改中金营业部为正确的值之后，将流程状态改成审批完成，最后在申请上报管理中将那条失败的中金所记录选中重新上报即可。<br /></p>

data.problem: <p>账户中心给V6S同步数据的功能号列表是什么？</p>
data.solution: <p>账户中心后台没有，是在tomcat的配置文件中，路径如下</p><p>/unicenter/tomcat/webapps/ks/WEB-INF/config/drtp-config.properties<br /></p><p>现阶段列表如下</p><p>851005    客户状态维护</p><p>851007    重置客户密码</p><p>851008    交易编码查询</p><p>851010    交易编码增加、删除</p><p>851018    客户销户</p><p>851217    结算、交易参数查询</p><p>851277    客户多点登录查询</p><p>851278    客户多点登录设置</p><p>851342    客户手续费率模板增加、修改、删除</p><p>851343    客户手续费率模板查询</p><p>851348    客户保证金率模板增加、修改、删除</p><p>851349    客户保证金率模板查询</p><p>851400    客户资金对账（按随机阶段）</p><p>854151    客户品种限制设置</p><p>854152    客户品种限制查询</p><p>854227    客户期权交易管理查询</p><p>854228    客户期权交易管理设置</p><p>855605    查询申请单</p><p>855607    申请单复核</p><p>855608    复核明细查询</p><p>858202    柜台转帐查询</p><p>858222    查询银期开户信息(简易)</p><p>859514    资产管理客户特殊资料查询</p><p>859515    资产管理客户特殊资料增删改</p><p>859516    特殊法人特有基本资料查询</p><p>859517    特殊法人特有基本资料增删改</p><p>859523    统一开户原油资料查询</p><p>859524    统一开户原油资料维护</p><p>859526    统一开户原油董事会资料维护</p><p>859531    查询输入客户号是否有效</p><p>859537    激活客户筛选</p><p>859542    休眠激活规范电子回报处理</p><p>859551    开户申请查询</p><p>859553    统一开户基本资料维护</p><p>859556    统一开户资料复核</p><p>859580    客户附加资料新表查询</p><p>859581    客户附加资料新表维护</p><p>859582    开户申请_客户银行信息查询</p><p>859583    开户申请_客户银行信息设置</p><p>859598    适当性评估数据回写接口</p><p>859605    税务和反洗钱资料管理查询</p><p>859606    税务和反洗钱资料管理设置</p><p>859711    统一开户原油参考证件信息增删改</p><p>859779    资管开户申请银行账号重复性校验</p><p>859783    开户申请_资管客户银行信息设置</p><p>859801    产品发行人资料增删改</p>

data.problem: <p>周边网关启用流控后，流控针对的是网关全局还是值对应到相关客户？</p><p>比如设置5001每秒10次，是所有客户针对5001这个请求功能每秒全部加起来只能发起10次，还是说单个客户只能发起10次。</p>
data.solution: <p>流控是设置到该网关全局的，不针对某一客户。</p>

data.problem: <p>资管转特法后，进行信息变更修改附加码时，会提示ORA-20004：数据存储出错，</p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/427414848/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902535%3B1774075395%26q-key-time%3D1773902535%3B1774075395%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D3513312449cc70b67d66cd933280b0113a605aad&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22image.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27image.png" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="427414848"><img hb_type="file" file_id="427414848" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/427414848/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902535%3B1774075395%26q-key-time%3D1773902535%3B1774075395%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3Db338d4df2ffc0eb7ce17321025e125c8b2e4f5f7&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22image.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27image.png&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a><br /></p><p>或者客户基本资料缺失</p>
data.solution: <p>这样的情况一般会出现在一对多的资管转特法的情况下。</p><p>由于资管客户的单位信息表（CF_ACCOUNT.T_FINAL_DOMESTICCOMPANY，只存了单位名称信息）在进行资管转特法后的相关数据不会被清除，导致资管转特法后发起信息变更，即会修改特法相关表数据，也会对资管的单位信息表数据进行修改，就导致在业务流水中生成了两条一模一样的记录（通过前台看）。</p><p>要解决问题的话</p><p>1、删掉业务流水表（cf_account.T_REGISTRATIONAGGREGATIONROOT）中只有机构名称的那条记录</p><p>2、删掉已经做完资管转特法客户单位信息表（CF_ACCOUNT.T_FINAL_DOMESTICCOMPANY）中的相关数据</p><p>查哪些是资管一对多，非销户客户，机构表中存在数据的</p><blockquote><p>select r.client_no,t.* from cf_account.t_final_registrationagroot r</p><p>left join cf_Account.t_Final_Domesticcompany t</p><p>on t.client_id=r.client_id</p><p>where r.client_type='4'</p><p>and r.assets_customer_type='5'</p><p>and r.isactive&lt;&gt;'C';</p></blockquote><p>对已经产生重复流水的</p><blockquote><p>select t.*,t.rowid from CF_ACCOUNT.T_DOMESTICCOMPANY t</p><p>where t.root_id in (</p><p>select t.root_id from CF_ACCOUNT.T_DOMESTICCOMPANY t</p><p>  group by t.root_id</p><p>having count(t.root_id)&gt;1)</p></blockquote><p>删除CF_ACCOUNT.T_FINAL_DOMESTICCOMPANY表中的数据需要在做完资管转特法，在操作信息变更前进行删除，后续账户中心会针对这块代码进行调整，调整前就需要手工删数据。</p>

data.problem: <p>冻结客户在V8T盘中是否可以登录终端</p>
data.solution: <p>不可以，会报错</p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/425843542/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902535%3B1774075395%26q-key-time%3D1773902535%3B1774075395%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D2f5c5a19e1b929a793cea43c3862715fbe521bf8&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%224c05a06bec8419c4931c30ed66fb9533.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%274c05a06bec8419c4931c30ed66fb9533.png" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="425843542"><img hb_type="file" file_id="425843542" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/425843542/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902535%3B1774075395%26q-key-time%3D1773902535%3B1774075395%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3Db690914ff8e2621fe8ffad7b9e72e8c9c93db8e1&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%224c05a06bec8419c4931c30ed66fb9533.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%274c05a06bec8419c4931c30ed66fb9533.png&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a><br /></p>

data.problem: <p>主板V8T8508系统升级到8508P1，覆盖升级完大连行情报盘之后，使用TMC启动Linux报盘，发现大连行情报盘起不来。日志中提示，监测到进程自己消失【dir_path=../../recv_dcemd,exe_name=recv_dcemd，pid=2408】</p>
data.solution: <p>经排查是由于大连linux行情报盘的执行程序缺少可执行权限，增加可执行权限之后，使用TMC即可启动。</p>

data.problem: <p>开户云报错：柜台错误，请及时联系期货公司或柜台厂商处理:客户未通过黑名单筛查!<br /></p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/424356189/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902535%3B1774075395%26q-key-time%3D1773902535%3B1774075395%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D91ce5c3d2e2f24b81f35688242e2b2d5fc9bc747&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22N%2525UY%2525J30%2524SIJLH%2528%2540U3%2529K9BA.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27N%2525UY%2525J30%2524SIJLH%2528%2540U3%2529K9BA.png" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="424356189"><img hb_type="file" file_id="424356189" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/424356189/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902535%3B1774075395%26q-key-time%3D1773902535%3B1774075395%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D6f8090c2b3868ad31c36c7f79ddc225dae90012f&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22N%2525UY%2525J30%2524SIJLH%2528%2540U3%2529K9BA.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27N%2525UY%2525J30%2524SIJLH%2528%2540U3%2529K9BA.png&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a><br /></p>

data.problem: <p>账户中心修改了客户的具体经营范围，复核时直接白屏了<br /></p>
data.solution: <p>通过以下语句查询相关数据</p><blockquote><p>select a.businessscopes_detail,a.*,a.rowid from cf_account.t_domesticcompany a</p><p>where a.root_id in (select id from cf_account.t_registrationaggregationroot where client_no='')--客户号</p></blockquote><p>将其中的第一个字段businessscopes_detail查询结果复制出来如下：</p><blockquote><p>"有色金属冶炼及经营(国家有专项审批的除外)，化工原料(不含化学危险品及易燃易爆品)的销售：贵金属冶炼(以上范围按国家有关规定)；金银制品销售。商品及技术的进出口业务(国家限定商品或禁止的除外)；从事境外期货套期保值业务：硫酸、氧[压缩的]。氮[压缩的]，氧[液化的]、氢[液化的]、二氧化硫生产、销售(凭许可证经营) ；废旧铅蓄电池收集、贮存、处置:铜、铅、废渣回收销售：液体硫酸锌的生产和销售：贸易、技术服务。(涉及许可经营项目， 应取得相关部门许可后方可经营) (涉及许可经营项目，应取得相关部门</p><p>许可后方可经营)(依法须经批准的项目，经相关部门批准后方可开展经营活动)"</p></blockquote><p>在<b>“应取得相关部门”</b>和<b>“许可后”</b>之间有一个换行符导致了这个问题，废弃掉重新录入资料后问题解决。</p>

data.problem: <p>给反洗钱采集数据的系统，在进行V6S的数据导入时卡住了，不继续导入数据了，并且提示以下错误</p><p>The transaction 1og in database master is almost full. </p><p>Your transaction is being suspended until space is made available in the 1og.<br /></p>
data.solution: <p>以下语句任选其一执行即可</p><p>dump transaction master with truncate_only</p><p>dump transaction master with no_log</p><p>执行完以后导入继续了。</p>

data.problem: <p>广期所上报期权交易权限，监控中心返回CFMMC处理出错</p>
data.solution: <p>看了报文，广期的期权交易权限上报了两条记录，是程序bug，二次复核时会产生两条记录在交易权限表里面。</p><p>select t.*, t.rowid from CF_ACCOUNT.T_FINAL_TRADE_AUTHORITY t</p><p>where t.root_id in (select id from cf_account.t_final_registrationagroot a where a.client_no='')可以用该语句把记录查出来，然后把多余的记录删掉，再重新上报</p>

data.problem: <p>咨询V8T8508P1包中相关终端\CMDSIII_V2\标准安装包_全量包\win版本\cmdserver\mduine\conf目录下的ineconf.xml.sample文件里记录的能源交易所采集器&lt;MDQP&gt;段的HOST中的IP和端口是合并一起的，而文档里截图的此段IP和端口是分开的，以哪个为准？</p><p>V8T8508_P1\相关终端\CMDSIII_V2\标准安装包_全量包\win版本\cmdserver\mdushf\conf目录下的sfeconf.xml.sample文件里记录的上海交易所采集器&lt;MDQP&gt;段的HOST中的IP和Port端口与上海交易所采集器文档中截图是一致，分开的。是否需要改动？<br /></p>
data.solution: <p>经和开发确定，能源交易所采集器的ineconf.xml.sample的xml文件里IP和端口合并一起是准确的，格式是对的，以能源交易所采集器的XML文件为准。文档截图不准确。</p><p><br /></p><p>上海交易所采集器的格式IP和端口分开记录是不对的，是老的格式，应该当时开发提交错了，客户需要采纳能源交易所采集器格式配置上交所采集器的XML文件。</p>

data.problem: <p>V8T柜台帐户站点绑定时发现，IP为强制填入项，个人移动办公时候IP地址是随机会变的，造成移动办公人要经常修改IP,对工作造成极大不便，请把IP项改成非必填项</p>
data.solution: <p>1、V8T的设置站点的数据每天初始化的时候都会被清理，最终留下来的都是V6S当天上场的数据。</p><p>2、V6S设置站点时，IP地址为空、网卡有值时，可以增加成功。（注意：<b>V6S这边设置站点的时候，ip和网关至少填一个。</b>）</p><p>3、应急情况下需要在V8T设置站点时，可以将ip地址设置成范围，不用填一个精确的地址，如10.10.10.255表示10.10.10下所有网址，<b>255.255.255.255可以表示所有ip地址</b>。</p>

href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/420548691/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902535%3B1774075395%26q-key-time%3D1773902535%3B1774075395%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3Da24a12e8ee00f910b87237dfc29e3d1149588bc3&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22GG35%257DT7L0%2524EYRF0GX8R4TIT.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27GG35%257DT7L0%2524EYRF0GX8R4TIT.png" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/420548691/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902535%3B1774075395%26q-key-time%3D1773902535%3B1774075395%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D177b835707328b2973690bba0a940fd2ebef8686&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22GG35%257DT7L0%2524EYRF0GX8R4TIT.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27GG35%257DT7L0%2524EYRF0GX8R4TIT.png&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a><br /></p><p>故而考虑是否是V8T初始化过程中发生了什么导致转换V6S分发给V8T的席位保证金率未按愿想正常上场。</p><p>从V8T的V6USER中的PKT_INIT_MARGIN.bdy保证金初始化主程序看席位保证金率数据生成逻辑如下<br /></p><blockquote><p>    insert into temp_exch_ftr_margin(</p><p>            exch_code,</p><p>            trade_type,</p><p>            contract_code,</p><p>            vari_code,</p><p>            deliv_date,</p><p>            b_spec_margin_amt,</p><p>            b_spec_margin_rate,</p><p>            b_hedge_margin_amt,</p><p>            b_hedge_margin_rate,</p><p>            s_spec_margin_amt,</p><p>            s_spec_margin_rate,</p><p>            s_hedge_margin_amt,</p><p>            s_hedge_margin_rate,</p><p>			b_arbitrage_margin_amt  ,</p><p>		    b_arbitrage_margin_rate ,</p><p>		    s_arbitrage_margin_amt   ,</p><p>		    s_arbitrage_margin_rate,</p><p>            set_oper_code,</p><p>            oper_date,</p><p>            oper_time,</p><p>            rate_type</p><p>    )</p><p>    --席位保证金率表</p><p>    select</p><p>            a.exch_code,</p><p>            a.trade_class,--交易类型，</p><p>            '%', --(trim(a.vari_code) \\ '%')as contract_code,</p><p>            a.vari_code,</p><p>            '%',</p><p>            spec_margin_amt,</p><p>            spec_margin_rate,</p><p>            hedge_margin_amt,</p><p>            hedge_margin_rate,</p><p>            spec_margin_amt,</p><p>            spec_margin_rate,</p><p>            hedge_margin_amt,</p><p>            hedge_margin_rate, </p><p>			arbitrage_margin_amt,</p><p>            arbitrage_margin_rate,</p><p>            arbitrage_margin_amt,</p><p>            arbitrage_margin_rate,</p><p>            '',    </p><p>            '',              </p><p>            '',</p><p>            rate_type         </p><p>    from seat_margin a, exchange_seat b</p><p>    where a.exch_code = b.exch_code</p><p>    and a.seat_no = b.seat_no</p><p>    and b.if_main = '1'</p><p>    union</p><p>	--品种表</p><p>	SELECT *</p><p>	  FROM (SELECT ev.exch_code, --交易所</p><p>	               ev.trade_class, --交易类型,0-期货</p><p>	               '%' AS contract_code, --(trim(a.vari_code) \\ '%')as contract_code,</p><p>	               info.vari_code,</p><p>	               '%' AS deliv_date,</p><p>	               spec_margin_amt AS b_spec_margin_amt,                      </p><p>	               spec_margin_rate AS b_spec_margin_rate,                    </p><p>	               hedge_margin_amt AS b_hedge_margin_amt,                    </p><p>	               hedge_margin_rate AS b_hedge_margin_rate,                  </p><p>	               spec_margin_amt AS s_spec_margin_amt,                      </p><p>	               spec_margin_rate AS s_spec_margin_rate,                    </p><p>	               hedge_margin_amt AS s_hedge_margin_amt,                    </p><p>	               hedge_margin_rate AS s_hedge_margin_rate,                  </p><p>	               arbitrage_margin_amt AS b_arbitrage_margin_amt,    	</p><p>	               arbitrage_margin_rate AS b_arbitrage_margin_rate,  		  </p><p>	               arbitrage_margin_amt AS s_arbitrage_margin_amt,    		  </p><p>	               arbitrage_margin_rate AS s_arbitrage_margin_rate,  		  </p><p>	               '' AS set_oper_code, --设置操作员</p><p>	               '' AS oper_date, --操作日期</p><p>	               '' AS oper_time, --操作时间</p><p>	               nvl(TRIM(c.contract_suffix), '0') AS rate_type</p><p>	          FROM variety_info info</p><p>	         INNER JOIN exch_variety ev</p><p>	            ON info.vari_code = ev.vari_code</p><p>	           AND info.trade_class = ev.trade_class</p><p>	          LEFT JOIN v8user.tt_vari_trade_rule c</p><p>	            ON info.vari_code = c.vari_code</p><p>	           AND info.trade_class = c.trade_type) temp</p><p>	       WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1</p><p>	                         FROM seat_margin d, exchange_seat e</p><p>	                        WHERE temp.vari_code = d.vari_code</p><p>	                          AND temp.trade_class = d.trade_class</p><p>				  AND temp.rate_type = d.rate_type</p><p>				  AND temp.exch_code = d.exch_code									</p><p>	                          AND d.seat_no = e.seat_no</p><p>	                          AND e.if_main = '1');</p><p>    commit; --</p></blockquote><p>从以上代码中整理逻辑如下</p><p>1、关联seat_margin, exchange_seat表输出席位保证金率<br /></p><p>2、当上述关联没有数据，则根据variety_info设置交易品种中的保证金率来取值</p><p>根据之前的数据可得seat_margin和variety_info中的数据是已知的，那么问题可能出在exchange_seat上</p><p>exchange_seat不是通过V6S分发给V8T的，是V8T的V6USER自行维护的</p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/420547853/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902535%3B1774075395%26q-key-time%3D1773902535%3B1774075395%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D0310fee4b1556d30d0d7f8569c18dc9da1b8f9d8&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%2241ZXY%253F8626B5%2528272%2524CXAT.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%2741ZXY%253F8626B5%2528272%2524CXAT.png" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="420547853"><img hb_type="file" file_id="420547853" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/420547853/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902535%3B1774075395%26q-key-time%3D1773902535%3B1774075395%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D44d41180a0961c472a6f926a43207357e242e403&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%2241ZXY%253F8626B5%2528272%2524CXAT.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%2741ZXY%253F8626B5%2528272%2524CXAT.png&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a><br /></p><p>从上图不难看出，有一条奇怪的空值记录，而没有J广期所的数据，到此位置就可以解释为什么客户保证金率会为0.01了。</p><p>由于exchange_seat中没有广期所的数据，导致V8T初始化在获取广期所席位保证金率时，用的是设置交易品种里的保证金率，而客户未设置，所以到了V8T中，交易所当日交易保证金设置里查到的si费率就为0，最终导致相对席位收取的客户保证金率由于交易保证金设置里查到的si费率就为0，就变成只收取0+0.01的值了。</p><p>接下来的问题是exchange_seat中为什么没有J的数据。</p><p>到这里其实就简单了，exchange_seat是广期所基础数据包刷的广期所数据，从V6USER的20220304-0002-R202202140232.sql可以看出来，这个插入数据是需要基于V8USER的基准的。必须按《使用说明.docx》中阐述的这个升级顺序来</p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/420556192/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902535%3B1774075395%26q-key-time%3D1773902535%3B1774075395%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3Da083358f8bd11fbb821c66eed787f99ed5b39e0d&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22Z92SL%255BU%255BWKK%2529H9HYV6J_OUL.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27Z92SL%255BU%255BWKK%2529H9HYV6J_OUL.png" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="420556192"><img hb_type="file" file_id="420556192" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/420556192/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902535%3B1774075395%26q-key-time%3D1773902535%3B1774075395%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D82f952069e18da12330efc6f58a396bd1835cc58&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22Z92SL%255BU%255BWKK%2529H9HYV6J_OUL.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27Z92SL%255BU%255BWKK%2529H9HYV6J_OUL.png&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a><br /></p><p>与客户沟通后也确定是没按这个顺序来，他们是先刷了V6user的脚本，再刷的V8user的脚本导致基础数据确实，最终影响了V6user的数据刷入。</p><p>要彻底解决的话，就要把V6USER的这个sql在初始化前重新刷入到系统。</p>

data.problem: <p>资管转特法后，在待办事项中进行处理时，提示ORA-30926:无法在原表中获得一组稳定的行ORA-21000：-30926的rais_application_error错误号参数超出范围ORA-21000：-21000的raise_application_error错误号参数超出范围</p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/419350274/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902536%3B1774075396%26q-key-time%3D1773902536%3B1774075396%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3Da7f4004a4678ac84ce673e29c57899e9a3689768&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22image.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27image.png" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="419350274"><img hb_type="file" file_id="419350274" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/419350274/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902536%3B1774075396%26q-key-time%3D1773902536%3B1774075396%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3Da9834fe5f6aa58e1a30de3a87a080d63991861ef&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22image.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27image.png&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a><br /></p>
data.solution: <p>是因为在结算银行中有两张卡号相同支行不同的银行卡，这里认的是卡号，所以就报错了。</p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/419354609/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902536%3B1774075396%26q-key-time%3D1773902536%3B1774075396%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3Dd2c4543a223765afed037bd8222f9cd1d33ec61b&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22image.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27image.png" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="419354609"><img hb_type="file" file_id="419354609" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/419354609/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902536%3B1774075396%26q-key-time%3D1773902536%3B1774075396%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D789c587e1627e8d86ee4f378687f9e80fd0f22ec&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22image.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27image.png&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a><br /></p>

data.problem: <p>广期所上线第一天，V8T交易管理终端查询行情没有广期所数据</p>
data.solution: <p>检查物理库tt_real_quot表内没有广期所数据<br /></p><p>内存库TtRealQuot中有广期数据，但是没有买卖价，且行情不更新</p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/417075472/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902536%3B1774075396%26q-key-time%3D1773902536%3B1774075396%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3Dafbd907af176dacacb4249e00ed7b14c8b69003c&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22_BJ92BYF%255DR4T%25257%2524GFFI~OJW.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27_BJ92BYF%255DR4T%25257%2524GFFI~OJW.png" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="417075472"><img hb_type="file" file_id="417075472" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/417075472/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902536%3B1774075396%26q-key-time%3D1773902536%3B1774075396%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3Dc1e7edd80d6bf3dc732664bac7dd994ed9f77335&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22_BJ92BYF%255DR4T%25257%2524GFFI~OJW.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27_BJ92BYF%255DR4T%25257%2524GFFI~OJW.png&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a><br /></p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/417075488/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902536%3B1774075396%26q-key-time%3D1773902536%3B1774075396%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3Db278a02d9f921f4645057061ff225c70373aa89e&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22_WB%2525%2528%2540QV%257BQX%2540NXJ%257B6JGY%255DRL.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27_WB%2525%2528%2540QV%257BQX%2540NXJ%257B6JGY%255DRL.png" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="417075488"><img hb_type="file" file_id="417075488" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/417075488/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902536%3B1774075396%26q-key-time%3D1773902536%3B1774075396%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D99207a180b6aa9af82524452d4759935bad6b92a&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22_WB%2525%2528%2540QV%257BQX%2540NXJ%257B6JGY%255DRL.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27_WB%2525%2528%2540QV%257BQX%2540NXJ%257B6JGY%255DRL.png&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a><br /></p><p>其中hq_time和last_syn_time为空和为0</p><p>此时怀疑是行情写库没写到系统里来了，但是sendhqtodb的日志里没有报错，很玄妙，当时就懵了，毕竟说是交易员等终端行情收取都正常，但是行情写库却没有写广期所日志，就匪夷所思了。</p><p>在沟通过程中，客户突然提起说他们备的CMDS上没有广期所行情，需要把写库问题解决掉以后再解决备的CMDS问题</p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/417084283/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902536%3B1774075396%26q-key-time%3D1773902536%3B1774075396%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3Deb5af785e7bfed6c278cb17538f4a023b639ef18&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22D_%257BM%2560J9%257B%257D5L5H~%2529Q%2529S0BP9F.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27D_%257BM%2560J9%257B%257D5L5H~%2529Q%2529S0BP9F.png" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="417084283"><img hb_type="file" file_id="417084283" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/417084283/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902536%3B1774075396%26q-key-time%3D1773902536%3B1774075396%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D9b0b5a396fd4ba728e4b385edbb5f0287b2628da&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22D_%257BM%2560J9%257B%257D5L5H~%2529Q%2529S0BP9F.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27D_%257BM%2560J9%257B%257D5L5H~%2529Q%2529S0BP9F.png&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a><br /></p><p>突然灵光乍现，考虑到主备CMDS可能是通过DNS任意分配给终端进行连接获取行情的，那么对应的sendhqtodb也会有可能连上了备的CMDS导致没有获取到广期所的行情从而无法写库。</p><p>故此，让其关闭备的CMDS重启行情写库后，一起恢复正常。</p><p>检查备的CMDS配置没发现异常，但是在检查recv_gfexmd.ini时，发现其配置出现了问题，如下图</p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/417088955/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902536%3B1774075396%26q-key-time%3D1773902536%3B1774075396%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3Df1d461b35e7241e1179f1ca056c1cd9c666fa4e0&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22image.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27image.png" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="417088955"><img hb_type="file" file_id="417088955" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/417088955/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902536%3B1774075396%26q-key-time%3D1773902536%3B1774075396%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D3342e9d6f47a288f17c323400900221a1fc20839&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22image.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27image.png&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a><br /></p><p>以上配置有两处配置异常</p><p>1、mdu_name根据cmdsserver的cmds.ini中的配置，需设置为GFEXHQ，如下图</p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/417092024/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902536%3B1774075396%26q-key-time%3D1773902536%3B1774075396%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3Ddf57b9fea31999cf5c8641bf2c8b6bfab714672c&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22image.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27image.png" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="417092024"><img hb_type="file" file_id="417092024" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/417092024/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902536%3B1774075396%26q-key-time%3D1773902536%3B1774075396%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3Dc42bce471d013fa4f0f3813ff2d50223d2f3764f&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22image.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27image.png&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a><br /></p><p>如果一定要使用QHHQ，则需要在MDUName为QHHQ的MDUNIT1的后面加上GFEX的设置，否则会有异常</p><p>所以建议按linux报盘安装手册中的配置进行设置，如下图</p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/417093337/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902536%3B1774075396%26q-key-time%3D1773902536%3B1774075396%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3Df2e94c93020acda3d11311fc063b11dbb2df1fb5&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22lQLPJwxtQrj9BTDMtc0C97CH2kKATtTFCgOfh35qgIQA_759_181.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27lQLPJwxtQrj9BTDMtc0C97CH2kKATtTFCgOfh35qgIQA_759_181.png" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="417093337"><img hb_type="file" file_id="417093337" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/417093337/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902536%3B1774075396%26q-key-time%3D1773902536%3B1774075396%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3Df788dcdacffc70ff8311a48cab39a7fc89b8d14a&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22lQLPJwxtQrj9BTDMtc0C97CH2kKATtTFCgOfh35qgIQA_759_181.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27lQLPJwxtQrj9BTDMtc0C97CH2kKATtTFCgOfh35qgIQA_759_181.png&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a><br /></p><p>2、mdu_name2配置的是IP:PORT，这样就导致mdu_name2的配置项目是失效的，所以这个配置的错误就造成了其备的cmds收不到广期所行情了。</p><p>————————题外话————————</p><p>国都的recv_gfexmd.ini配置的mdu_name是QHHQ,但是该CMDS也能正常提供广期所行情，这可能又是玄学了……</p>

data.problem: <p>热备前台登录报错提示“无法连接主机和备机的数据库，系统无法登录，退出。”</p><p>点击热备前台‘数据库密码设置’界面的“测试”按钮，提示“和SQL服务器[172.16.135.6.2048][ksqhdb]连接失败，请检查登录参数设置是否正确。</p>
data.solution: <p>经排查是因为当天备机数据库没有Load完成导致，将当天主库重新load一次到备库，热备前台跟备库测试就能连通，就可以正常登录热备前台程序了。</p>

data.problem: <p>账户中心职业由自由职业变更为个体工商户，在客户信息里自由职业者这个职业依旧存在<br /></p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/416132934/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902536%3B1774075396%26q-key-time%3D1773902536%3B1774075396%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D70cd1cca7e824ce87a520677fb867c413dae0845&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22image.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27image.png" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="416132934"><img hb_type="file" file_id="416132934" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/416132934/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902536%3B1774075396%26q-key-time%3D1773902536%3B1774075396%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3Dfd0d5c4c20ac007821708394ee4c55cdc040322e&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22image.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27image.png&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a><br /></p>
data.solution: <p>数据迁移过程中出现的问题，“自由职业者”这个职业在修改上报和同步给V6S时不会生效，后续开发会对这部分数据做统一处理。</p>

data.problem: <p>数据分发导出，提示压缩失败</p>
data.solution: <p>我们现在数据分发的脚本里面都是用zip命令作为压缩命令的，zip有个缺陷就是当被压缩文件超过4G时就会无法压缩，所以做数据分发时对数据量是有限制的，导出的文件大小不能超过4G，否则就会压缩失败</p>

data.problem: <p>V6S生产系统导入大连交易所成交文件，点击查询，一直卡在那个界面，平常8分钟基本结束，这次过了10分钟，界面依然卡着，出现白屏现象。<br /></p>
data.solution: <p>原因是因为导入大连交易所成交文件设置的路径是D盘，D盘没有空间了，清除了d盘空间后，再导就没有问题了。<br /></p>

data.problem: <p>admin用户被锁定了24小时，怎么办<br /></p>
data.solution: <p>通过有权限管理工具权限的操作员登录账户中心</p><p>到管理工具→用户账户菜单下，用账户解锁功能进行解锁</p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/413953299/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902536%3B1774075396%26q-key-time%3D1773902536%3B1774075396%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3Df735f902538efe1fd956ed646cf7e58fd7dc3ba3&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22image.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27image.png" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="413953299"><img hb_type="file" file_id="413953299" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/413953299/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902536%3B1774075396%26q-key-time%3D1773902536%3B1774075396%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D68d4d26194ab2675c143a6f6f15168b381aa24b1&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22image.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27image.png&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a><br /></p><p>后台的话通过一下脚本进行修改</p><blockquote><p>update wolf.wb_user t set t.status = '1' where t.user_name = 'admin'</p></blockquote>

data.problem: <p>8系列后，盘中申报费如何收取</p>
data.solution: <p>由于除原有中金所之外，其他各个交易所（上、大、郑）都开启了申报费收取业务，故而在8系列后变更了原有申报费收取逻辑。</p><p>原逻辑通过交易参数BUY_FEE、CANCLE_FEE、SELL_FEE构成，如下图</p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/411893251/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902536%3B1774075396%26q-key-time%3D1773902536%3B1774075396%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3Dfbbefd83d22967fb862e7a13c59e0a62cbabb259&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22image.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27image.png" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="411893251"><img hb_type="file" file_id="411893251" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/411893251/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902536%3B1774075396%26q-key-time%3D1773902536%3B1774075396%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D9d312903dff669de382f266db7c1b913e3d69ed0&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22image.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27image.png&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a><br /></p><p>在盘中中金申报费通过这三个参数进行收取。</p><p>8系列后，新增了以下界面</p><p>V6S：客户申报费设置、客户申报费免收设置</p><p>V8T：客户申报费设置、公司申报费设置、客户申报费免收设置</p><p>其中V8T公司申报费设置对应的是V6S中客户申报费设置中的公司默认标准值，即勾选查询公司默认标准勾选框后查询得到的无客户号的条目。</p><p>以上设置情况通过V6s给V8T的每日初始化数据导出给到V8T系统，通过V8T初始化过程上场生效。</p><p>申报费设置的内容包括（投机、保值、套利）买卖委托申报费按笔数、（投机、保值、套利）买卖委托申报费按手数、（投机、保值、套利）撤单申报费按笔数、（投机、保值、套利）撤单申报费按手数、（投机、保值、套利）询价申报费按笔数。 </p><p>选择交易类别，为必填项。交易类别为“期货”以及“TAS”时，“询价申报费”灰化不可输入； </p><p>针对每个客户各个交易品种的不同收费情况，在新增记录时，除客户号与品种外，其他均为必填项。故系统提供多种设置方法方便管理：设置单个客户的费率、所有客户的费率、单一品种的费率、多品种的费率。 </p><ol><li>针对单一客户设置费率：可以输入或者选择单一客户进行设置。 </li><li>针对所有客户的费率（公司默认标准）：不输入客户号，不选择客户进行设置。 </li><li>针对单一品种设置：选择交易所、交易类别、品种进行设置。 </li><li>针对多个品种设置：选择交易所、交易类别，不选择品种，对此交易所指定交易类别的所有品种进行设置。</li></ol><p>申报费收取公式：申报费（按笔数）+申报费（按手数）*手数</p><p>新增加交易所级交易参数：FAKFOK_CAN_FEE（FOK 及 FAK 撤单申报费收取） </p><ul><li>参数值为 0 时，不收取 FAKFOK 撤单申报费； </li><li>参数值为 1 时，收取 FAKFOK 撤单申报费； </li></ul><p>上期/能源、大连、郑州交易所该参数值默认为 1；中金所该参数值默认为 0；</p><p>（本系统）委托请求时，直接收取委托申报费，即客户实时资金的总手续费中增加该笔委托买委托申报费或者卖委托申报费；</p><p>（本系统）委托回报 </p><p>成功，不做任何处理； </p><p>失败（比如场内拒绝等），释放该笔委托买委托申报费或者卖委托申报费； </p><p>（外系统）委托回报补单 </p><p>只针对成功的委托回报进行补单，并收取该笔委托的买委托申报费或者卖委托申报费； </p><p>失败的委托回报，不补单，也不收取申报费； </p><p>（本系统）撤单请求 </p><p>如果委托状态为“等待发出”，则释放该笔委托（买委托或者卖委托）申报费； </p><p>（本系统）撤单回报 </p><p>成功，则需判断其委托是否为 FAK 或者是 FOK，当为 FAK、FOK，则需按照席位参数 FAKFOK_CAN_FEE 进行判断，参数为 0 时，则 FAK、FOK不收取撤单申报费；当参数为 1 时，则 FAK、FOK 收取撤单申报费；当为非 FAK、FOK，则收取该笔撤单申报费； </p><p>失败，原已收取的委托申报费则依旧收取，不收取撤单申报费； </p><p>（外系统）撤单回报补单 </p><p>补单时，针对该笔撤单收取该笔委托的买委托或者卖委托的申报费；以及撤单的申报费 </p><p>（本系统）询价请求 </p><p>询价请求时，直接收取询价申报费，即客户实时资金的总手续费中增加该笔询价申报费； </p><p>成功，不做任何处理； </p><p>失败（如场内拒绝），释放该笔询价申报费；</p><p><b>以上描述多可见于《使用指南_盘中申报费收取业务.pdf》（61008的业务使用指南目录），更多详情可参见该文档，此处列出只是希望通过一个方法就能查到相关使用情况，不用到处找手册。</b></p><p>需注意，当出现客户盘中没有收取申报费的情况，可以依次检查以下内容</p><p>1、V8T客户申报费免收设置中是否设置了该客户为免收客户（可能性较小，一般很少有客户会这么设置）</p><p>2、V8T客户申报费设置中是否设置了相关客户的记录，即按客户号查询看看是否有设置项目（可能性也相对较小，通常申报费都设置为统一值进行收取）</p><p>3、V8T公司申报费设置中是否设置了相关记录，如到交易所或者到品种的记录，甚至到交割期的记录</p><p>一般来说，常见于公司默认标准设置到品种后，交易所新上市交易品种后未对新增品种进行额外设置导致申报费未在盘中收取，继而导致客户盘中平仓出金后结算时由于申报费收取导致穿仓。</p><p><b>后台表：</b></p><p>V6S：</p><p>公司申报费表comp_declaration、客户申报费表cust_declaration、客户申报费免收表cust_declaration_free</p><p>V8T：</p><p>V6USER</p><p>公司申报费表comp_declaration、客户申报费表cust_declaration、客户申报费免收表cust_declaration_free<br /></p><p>V8USER</p><p>公司申报费表tt_comp_application_fee、客户申报费表tt_cust_application_fee、客户申报费免收表tt_cust_application_fee_except<br /></p><p><b>功能号：</b></p><p>V6S：</p><p>客户申报费查询851817、客户申报费设置851818、客户申报费免收查询851819、客户申报费免收设置851820<br /></p><p>V8T：<br /></p><p>客户申报费查询3208020、客户申报费增加3208021、客户申报费删除3208022、客户申报费修改3208023、客户申报费免收查询3208024、客户申报费免收增加3208025、客户申报费免收删除3208026<br /></p>

data.problem: <p>部分交易员连一级CMDS上有上海和广期的行情，连二级CMDS的只有上海的行情，没有广期的，原来连二级的改到连一级后连不上一级CMDS。</p>
data.solution: <p>重启一级CMDS后解决，不明所以。</p>

data.problem: <p>条件单误操作初始化到了下一交易日，需要怎么操作</p>
data.solution: <p>之前有一个很常规的操作，就是需要update system_para表，将初始化日期修改到上一交易日，再重新做当日初始化即可，参考语句如下</p><p>这里为了方便讨论案例，我们定义一个日期</p><p>上一交易日20221206，当前交易日20221207，下一交易日20221208</p><p>另外要注意，以下所有修改数据库数据，都请关闭条件单前置，等改完了再重新打开，以避免不必要的麻烦。</p><blockquote><p>update	system_para set	value = ‘20221206’ where	code = 'trade_date'</p></blockquote><p>但是只修改这个表仅适合于在做条件单初始化时从20221206直接误操作到了下个交易日20221208，或者已经初始化到当日20221207，但是由于某些原因初始化当日没有条件单、盈损单等情况，又误操作到了下个交易日20221208的情况。</p><p>可以通过以下语句判断当天有没有客户做过条件单</p><blockquote><p>select count(1) from  his_zszy_order where trade_date = '20221207'</p><p>select count(1) from  his_basic_infomation where trade_date = '20221207'<br /></p></blockquote><p>只要客户玩的不花，上述两个表查出来的数据如果为0，后面就都不用看了，到此结束，完结撒花，如果有值，那么就要接着往下看了。</p><p>当初始化到当日20221207，已经有了条件单、盈损单的情况，又误操作到了下一日20221208，这时候仅仅修改system_para，虽然在当时能初始化完成，但当20221207交易日结束再做下一交易日20221208条件单初始化时，就会由于索引重复的原因导致初始化失败。</p><p>参考下图</p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/408956139/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDaxFHfoJWvA3jAKfuKVWIn1NTJuHXBHtd%26q-sign-time%3D1684734478%3B1684738138%26q-key-time%3D1684734478%3B1684738138%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D99d333f62478e85e033599e09ace272d35ac1aa9&amp;response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22image.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27image.png" target="_blank"><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/408956139/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902536%3B1774075396%26q-key-time%3D1773902536%3B1774075396%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D4de3f423e24c276e14cfe58e0bb2e88048c3bb65&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22image.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27image.png" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="408956139"><img hb_type="file" file_id="408956139" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/408956139/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902536%3B1774075396%26q-key-time%3D1773902536%3B1774075396%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3Dda96524576630fa3c4cf359fa5e1d6f5f893802a&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22image.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27image.png&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a></a><br /></p><p>那是由于his_trig_entrust历史触发委托表、his_basic_infomation历史基本信息表、his_zszy_order历史止损止盈单表等表中已经有了误操作20221208初始化后，将20221207日数据给到历史表的数据了。</p><p>故而在做完20221207日的条件单初始化后，需要将条件单中的流水表数据进行更新，设计到两张表max_zszy_serialno最大止损止盈单流水号表，max_co_cmdno最大条件单指令编码表。</p><p>一方面可以直接硬钢一把流水号，因为max_zszy_serialno的max_serial_no和max_co_cmdno的max_cmd_no字段都是int型，而Int 保存整型数据,范围为-2147483647到+2147483647，所以可以直接update成10000或者更大，避免流水号和已经做过的重复，也推荐这种方式，止损止盈的号也就算了，条件指令的表忒多，cmd_no纷繁复杂，未必his_basic_infomation里的max(cmd_no)就是最大值。</p><blockquote><p>		update	max_zszy_serialno set	max_serial_no = 10000</p><p>		update	max_co_cmdno set	max_cmd_no = 10000</p></blockquote><p>如果客户用的都是盈损单，那么条件单的数量大约是盈损单的两倍，因为止损和止盈都各是一笔条件单，所以可以考虑把max_cmd_no改成20000，但以上值仅供参考，到时候根据实际情况酌情处理。</p><p>如果要切合一下实际，可以考虑从his_basic_infomation的cmd_no和his_zszy_order的cmd_no去查当日最大流水记录，并且+1赋值给max_zszy_serialno的max_serial_no和max_co_cmdno的max_cmd_no字段，这种方式不咋推荐，如果终端客户玩的比较花，容易翻车。</p><blockquote><p>update max_zszy_serialno set max_serial_no = (select max(cmd_no)+1 from his_zszy_order where trade_date = '20221207')</p><p>update max_co_cmdno set max_cmd_no = (select max(cmd_no)+1 from his_basic_infomation where trade_date = '20221207')</p></blockquote><p>到这里为止，做错当天日期的数据应该是整完了，但还有个问题，比如我做错到了下一个交易日20221208，然后这时候已经有客户用条件单盈损单了，这时候虽然恢复了当天20221207的条件单数据，但还是得注意，因为在恢复system_para表到20221206后，这时候做20221207日初始化的时候，会由于历史表里已经有20221206数据，从而导致做20221207日初始化的时候会报错，提示索引重复，这就坑爹了，我建议初始化前就把这些表数据直接清了完事，否则太难搞了，一旦数据修改的不好，容易翻车。</p><blockquote><p>delete from trig_entrust --触发委托表<br /></p><p>delete from batch_detail_cond --分批明细条件表</p><p>delete from basic_infomation --基本信息表</p><p>delete from price_diff_cond --价差条件表</p><p>delete from pyramid_detail_cond --金字塔明细条件表</p><p>delete from open_trig_cond --开盘触发条件表</p><p>delete from time_cond --时间条件表<br /></p><p>delete from quota_cond --行情条件表<br /></p><p>delete from zszy_order --止损止盈单表<br /></p><p>delete from basic_infomation_combin --组合条件单表<br /></p><p>delete from trig_entrust_combin  --组合条件单触发委托表<br /></p></blockquote><p>恢复就更难搞了，也更容易翻车，不推荐，也不是不能，无非就是几张表来回捣腾在插回实时表，由于没有官方版本，所以不建议这么折腾。</p><p>当然，一定有客户想要保留历史数据，毕竟可能会有客户触发了这种错误情况下的条件单、盈损单，那需要咋弄呢？</p><p><b><font color="#dc0000">以下内容未经实践，纯属YY，谨慎使用，边用边改，谢谢！</font></b></p><p>因为误操作初始化到了20221208，需要先改初始化时间到20221206才能初始化到20221207，由于上述delete的几个表本身是没有trade_date的，实在进行初始化时，将system_para中的初始化时间带过去的，所以在进行20221207的初始化时，就会把已有数据插入到历史表的20221206这一天中去，那这时候又有两种情况</p><p>1、客户如果不介意这些数据进入20221206，那我们只通过对各个表的cmd_no做调整，然后做20221207的初始化把这些数据插入到20221206这一天的历史数据中就完了</p><blockquote><p>update trig_entrust set cmd_no = cmd_no + 10000 --触发委托表<br /></p><p>update batch_detail_cond set cmd_no = cmd_no + 10000 --分批明细条件表</p><p>update basic_infomation  set cmd_no = cmd_no + 10000 --基本信息表</p><p>update price_diff_cond set cmd_no = cmd_no + 10000 --价差条件表</p><p>update pyramid_detail_cond set cmd_no = cmd_no + 10000 --金字塔明细条件表</p><p>update open_trig_cond set cmd_no = cmd_no + 10000 --开盘触发条件表</p><p>update time_cond set cmd_no = cmd_no + 10000 --时间条件表<br /></p><p>update quota_cond set cmd_no = cmd_no + 10000 --行情条件表<br /></p><p>update zszy_order set cmd_no = cmd_no + 10000 --止损止盈单表<br /></p><p>update basic_infomation_combin set cmd_no = cmd_no + 10000 --组合条件单表<br /></p><p>update trig_entrust_combin set cmd_no = cmd_no + 10000  --组合条件单触发委托表</p></blockquote><p>到这里还没完，由于zszy_order中有zs_co和zy_co分别对应的止损单号和止盈单号，是可以对应到相关条件单号的，所以还需要对这两个字段做处理，当然，不处理也行，回头查起来就没法直接根据止损单号和止盈单号对应相关条件单，无伤大雅，但就怕纠结。</p><blockquote><p>update zszy_order set zs_co = (case isnull(zs_co,'') when '' then zs_co when 0 then zs_co else (zs_co + 10000) end)--止损止盈单表止损单号<br /></p><p>update zszy_order set zy_co = case isnull(zy_co,'') when '' then zy_co when 0 then zy_co else (zy_co + 10000) --止损止盈单表止盈单号<br /></p></blockquote><p>然后就可以做20221207的初始化了</p><p>2、如果他介意，现在心里骂他100遍（或者更多），然后拒绝他，如果拒绝不了，那我们继续YY。</p><p>情况1种的操作是必做的，否则初始化都过不去，等做完20221207初始化以后，那就还需要把上面的数据全部改成对应his表的20221207日的数据，WTF……</p><blockquote><p>declare @init_date char(8).<br /></p><p>@last_date char(8)，</p><p>@cmd_no int</p><p>select @init_date = '20221207' --目标日期</p><p>select @last_date= '20221206'  --源日期<br /></p><p>select @cmd_no= 10000  --流水号<br /></p><p>update trig_entrust set trade_date = @init_date where trade_date = @last_date and cmd_no &gt;@cmd_no --触发委托表<br /></p><p>update batch_detail_cond set trade_date = @init_date where trade_date = @last_date and cmd_no &gt;@cmd_no --分批明细条件表</p><p>update basic_infomation  set trade_date = @init_date where trade_date = @last_date and cmd_no &gt;@cmd_no --基本信息表</p><p>update price_diff_cond set trade_date = @init_date where trade_date = @last_date and cmd_no &gt;@cmd_no --价差条件表</p><p>update pyramid_detail_cond set trade_date = @init_date where trade_date = @last_date and cmd_no &gt;@cmd_no --金字塔明细条件表</p><p>update open_trig_cond set trade_date = @init_date where trade_date = @last_date and cmd_no &gt;@cmd_no --开盘触发条件表</p><p>update time_cond set trade_date = @init_date where trade_date = @last_date and cmd_no &gt;@cmd_no  --时间条件表<br /></p><p>update quota_cond set trade_date = @init_date where trade_date = @last_date and cmd_no &gt;@cmd_no --行情条件表<br /></p><p>update zszy_order set trade_date = @init_date where trade_date = @last_date and cmd_no &gt;@cmd_no --止损止盈单表<br /></p><p>update basic_infomation_combin set trade_date = @init_date where trade_date = @last_date and cmd_no &gt;@cmd_no --组合条件单表<br /></p><p>update trig_entrust_combin set trade_date = @init_date where trade_date = @last_date and cmd_no &gt;@cmd_no  --组合条件单触发委托表</p></blockquote><p>好了，这样就把相关流水都改到20221207的历史数据里去了，然后还记得要改max_zszy_serialno的max_serial_no和max_co_cmdno的max_cmd_no么，这里别忘了做了，忘记怎么改的向上翻一翻，需要注意update的值，上面写的是10000，由于现在已经加入了更复杂的场景，这个值也请酌情修改，别无脑使用，这样又会给后来者埋坑。</p><p>当然，还有客户肯定在20221207已经有客户条件单的情况下误做了20221208的初始化并且也有了条件单后，还有以下憧憬</p><p>1、恢复20221207初始化</p><p>2、恢复客户在20221207初始化后的各个表数据，比如条件单、盈损单等，使其在恢复20221207初始化日期后依旧生效</p><p>3、将误操作到20221208后客户的条件单、盈损单保留恢复到20221207初始化日期后的实时表中，确保客户可以正常触发条件单、盈损单</p><p>以上客户的憧憬，目前有思路，但不想继续YY了，请及时把客户拍死在沙滩上，谢谢。</p><p>如果拍死不了，请后来者接着奏乐接着舞，把这段补齐，谢谢。</p>

data.problem: <p>通惠期货灾备V8T的交易备（门户+推送+交易）经常发生主备切换，导致总线时候备节点就红色了或则是主的总线变成单节点了<br /></p>
data.solution: <p>从arbiter的日志看是发生DoPing Error，金总怀疑是写日志线程阻塞导致就升级了总线，升级后的总线日志可以看出来写日志花了多久时间<br /></p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/408019858/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902536%3B1774075396%26q-key-time%3D1773902536%3B1774075396%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3Db06c433f580689a68b27f4b4e92d1afe6570d4b9&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22image.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27image.png" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="408019858"><img hb_type="file" file_id="408019858" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/408019858/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902536%3B1774075396%26q-key-time%3D1773902536%3B1774075396%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3Dc06e77dae975561415931ca15ad2d33f6fd61ea7&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22image.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27image.png&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a><br /></p><p>（9）说明写日志写了9秒导致DoPing时间超过5秒于是就发生切换了<br /></p><p>通惠之所以经常出现此现象，是由于服务器磁盘问题导致，更换磁盘之后，此现象消失。</p>

data.problem: <p>工行国密测试bank.ini中配置项BANK_SM2_PUBLICKEY配置的银行端的公钥，银行给的公钥不能直接用<br /></p>
data.solution: <p>需要将银行给的公钥最前面的04去掉之后，在配置在bank.ini中配置项BANK_SM2_PUBLICKEY中<br /></p>

data.problem: <p>账户中心后台负责交易所代码和V6S对应的字典表是哪张</p>

data.solution: <p>这个是客户用的win10环境测试的，在bank.ini配置中JAVA_ENV_DLL_PATH的 配置路径中win10不能有空格，Program Files (x86)这个是有空格的需要改掉，重新换个其他地址安装jre，要是换了地址还是报错那就是系统环境变量没有改，改掉之后就可以。客户要是win10环境最好是测试之前安装jre就让他们换个其他地址，不要按照默认地址安装，默认地址有空格win10不支持。</p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/403776417/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902537%3B1774075397%26q-key-time%3D1773902537%3B1774075397%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D9c0d02e85d7540446115ca90653a9abe3a8a70c6&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="403776417"><img hb_type="file" file_id="403776417" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/403776417/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902537%3B1774075397%26q-key-time%3D1773902537%3B1774075397%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D1a4e217d2b00bd24de97c41d1bdbb4cce3916536&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27%25E5%259B%25BE%25E7%2589%2587.png&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a><br /></p>

data.solution: <p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/403656754/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902537%3B1774075397%26q-key-time%3D1773902537%3B1774075397%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D13c99f074a7dedfff54bb0c88ef5a884e2d1e9a2&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22YRGV3%2540%2529IOZYRS8U1%2540%257D5Z%2528%2560W.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27YRGV3%2540%2529IOZYRS8U1%2540%257D5Z%2528%2560W.png" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="403656754"><img hb_type="file" file_id="403656754" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/403656754/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902537%3B1774075397%26q-key-time%3D1773902537%3B1774075397%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3De9ea285f6393cef98aa53f53c042e46abf77d8f4&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22YRGV3%2540%2529IOZYRS8U1%2540%257D5Z%2528%2560W.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27YRGV3%2540%2529IOZYRS8U1%2540%257D5Z%2528%2560W.png&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a><br /></p><p>sysconfig\transfer这个目录下面英文简称_vcs_transform.xml有的就是2.0接口<br /></p><p>如上图所示，招行不是2.0的银期接口，所以不会更新那两个字段</p>

data.problem: <p>应该是一般信息修改上报的记录在账户中心变成了身份信息修改上报，并且被上报驳回了，怎么处理</p>
data.solution: <p>在业务流水查询里修改这条上报驳回记录的状态为审核完成</p><p>同时到后台查询该客户的申请上报记录</p><blockquote><p>select * from  cf_account.t_report_task t where t.client_no = '90192686'</p></blockquote><p>report_type = '3'则代表上报类型为身份信息修改上报<br /></p><p>t.report_status = '1'则代表上报状态为已上报<br /></p><p>分别修改为4-一般信息修改和0-未上报</p><p>在进行重新上报即可</p><blockquote><p>update cf_account.t_report_task t set t.report_type = '4',t.report_status = '0' where t.client_no = '90192686'</p></blockquote>

data.problem: <p>广期所风险隔离测试，二次结算交易所提供的分项资金文件和原有文件不同，全删后导入分项资金文件可能会有如下图报错，提示执行CustMoneyInOut时cust_money_io索引i_O重复数据</p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/401572232/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902537%3B1774075397%26q-key-time%3D1773902537%3B1774075397%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3Db90a609cad5d738cd33d2264b0dfa9266720def6&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22lQLPJxbiZSZcmInNAYrNAn-w74E-sASTVbkDc_33n4AQAA_639_394.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27lQLPJxbiZSZcmInNAYrNAn-w74E-sASTVbkDc_33n4AQAA_639_394.png" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="401572232"><img hb_type="file" file_id="401572232" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/401572232/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902537%3B1774075397%26q-key-time%3D1773902537%3B1774075397%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3Dbb2762aed452780751051319cbf1f40142a68490&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22lQLPJxbiZSZcmInNAYrNAn-w74E-sASTVbkDc_33n4AQAA_639_394.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27lQLPJxbiZSZcmInNAYrNAn-w74E-sASTVbkDc_33n4AQAA_639_394.png&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a><br /></p>
data.solution: <p>由于全删插入上一日数据时，会分别获取客户出入金以及分项资金2个表的当日最大流水记录进行流水号获取，获取表是settle_daily_jour</p><blockquote><p>SELECT * FROM </p><p>settle_daily_jour</p><p>WHERE tx_date = '20211025'	--日期自己改</p></blockquote><p>查询结果中的jour_no时出入金流水，join_no是分项资金流水</p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/401578067/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902537%3B1774075397%26q-key-time%3D1773902537%3B1774075397%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D4b93e441b651dd0a235d9cd257f3101dc01ae6b2&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22image.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27image.png" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="401578067"><img hb_type="file" file_id="401578067" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/401578067/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902537%3B1774075397%26q-key-time%3D1773902537%3B1774075397%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3Df17d5c1265bb5e75baa80c08887141717cfa17e5&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22image.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27image.png&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a><br /></p><p>如果提示了这个报错，需要更新这两个字段为当日最大流水记录</p><p></p><blockquote><p>UPDATE settle_daily_jour </p><p>SET jour_no = (SELECT max(jour_no)+1 FROM cust_money_io WHERE tx_date = '20211025'), --日期自己改</p><p>join_no = (SELECT max(jour_no)+1 FROM zjh_sub_zj WHERE date = '20211025') --日期自己改</p><p>WHERE tx_date = '20211025' --日期自己改</p></blockquote>

data.problem: <p>账户中心的数据字典是哪个表</p>

data.solution: <p>由于生成工程文件时，TMC新增的关于zpuser的数据库用户名和密码时，节点的配置项类别选错了，应该是用户选择用户节点，密码选择密码节点，而他们新增时设置为了连接节点，故而在校验时报错了。</p><p>需要重新设置上述设置错了的节点，并且重新生成工程文件，再进行校验即可。</p>

data.problem: <p>数据库执行存储过程时报605</p>
data.solution: <p>sybase错误码605意味着数据库本身物理存储有问题，一旦出现很难修复，只能通过重建新库把数据迁移过去</p>

data.problem: <p>二席资金同步程序在CTP升级到CTP2.0后，打开程序日志中会有“调用存储过程: PRGB_ FundChangeMgrt.up_ In3O_ InvestorPundChange 异常信息未将对象引用设置到对象的实例。”的提示。如下图</p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/399570302/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902537%3B1774075397%26q-key-time%3D1773902537%3B1774075397%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D608e7dd3755014457551a39d5880de558916e06c&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22image.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27image.png" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="399570302"><img hb_type="file" file_id="399570302" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/399570302/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902537%3B1774075397%26q-key-time%3D1773902537%3B1774075397%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3Da4c0a8cec405b785ddbfefb8fb99723e40836bee&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22image.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27image.png&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a><br /></p>
data.solution: <p>和金仕达概念不一样 ctp结算后是切启动 然后做初始化 好像是只有已初始化的状态才能同步，所以只有当CTP2.0系统做完了初始化，二席资金同步程序才能正常同步数据。<br /></p>

data.solution: <p>这是账户中心目前版本的一个bug。在同步适当性时 select a.* from  cf_account.t_client_business a该表出现数据缺失，需要手工在后台加上。不然开户时会找不到适当性记录而报错。</p>

data.problem: <p>广期所结算完之后，持仓盈亏值为0</p>
data.solution: <p>V6S后台有一张information的表，是系统配置表，里面每个交易所有一个code为BB的参数值，该参数是用来记录该交易所结算的起始日期用的。新上交易所的话，必须在正式上线前某日进行席位的空结算，从而给这个交易所BB参数赋上值，有这个起始日，才会计算持仓盈亏。如果没有在之前日期做过空结算，当日结算时就会出现持仓盈亏为0的情况。</p>

data.problem: <p>广期所风险品种测试，第二天给了新的分享资金文件需要重导，全删上一日已复核的分享资金文件时，提示如下图错误</p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/397246567/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902537%3B1774075397%26q-key-time%3D1773902537%3B1774075397%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D6645dabffb532374efe0400383258841534aed80&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22~INI%25243%2540I%257BEHU%2560O%2560FIJ%25243%2560RM.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27~INI%25243%2540I%257BEHU%2560O%2560FIJ%25243%2560RM.png" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="397246567"><img hb_type="file" file_id="397246567" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/397246567/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902537%3B1774075397%26q-key-time%3D1773902537%3B1774075397%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D6e11b2c486407200856ffb91109d0a6bd6449039&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22~INI%25243%2540I%257BEHU%2560O%2560FIJ%25243%2560RM.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27~INI%25243%2540I%257BEHU%2560O%2560FIJ%25243%2560RM.png&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a><br /></p>
data.solution: <p>可以用下述语句更新sync_max_no表</p><p>UPDATE sync_max_no SET jour_no = (SELECT max(jour_no) FROM real_sync_jour WHERE tx_date = '20221117')  --上一个结算日日期<br /></p>

data.problem: <p>客户历史委托单里11月15日的交易中的mac在操作日志15日的记录里没有</p>
data.solution: <p>该客户是连续交易日15日21点多做的交易，即14日晚21点多做的交易，操作日志的oper_date记录的是自然日日期，所以要在操作日志管理中查14日21点左右客户的操作情况。</p>

data.problem: <p>切换CTP2.0后，除了要更新二席资金同步程序，还需要修改什么配置</p>
data.solution: <p>需更新CTP二席目标数据库用户名和CTP二席目标数据库密码为CTP2.0对应数据库用户名和密码，如下图</p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/396186630/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902537%3B1774075397%26q-key-time%3D1773902537%3B1774075397%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D0d0eb7d1938a82eb91244e7fca6cf290d56a6f3e&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22image.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27image.png" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="396186630"><img hb_type="file" file_id="396186630" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/396186630/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902537%3B1774075397%26q-key-time%3D1773902537%3B1774075397%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D565f61c9a53c18b667574788479dabcb986751e4&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22image.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27image.png&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a><br /></p>

data.problem: <p>工行国密接口部署，怎么获取公钥和私钥</p>

href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/396010029/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDaxFHfoJWvA3jAKfuKVWIn1NTJuHXBHtd%26q-sign-time%3D1688554305%3B1688557965%26q-key-time%3D1688554305%3B1688557965%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D399ed1c479c3cc1be95a6f46d552885b691a66c6&amp;response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22image.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27image.png"
