data.problem: <p>账户中心客户银行信息有两条一样的记录，删掉其中一条，在待办中通过后，依然还是能查到有两条记录<br /></p>
data.solution: <p>select * from cf_account.t_final_bankaccount t</p><p>left join cf_account.t_final_registrationagroot r</p><p>on r.id = t.root_id</p><p>where r.client_id = '客户号'</p><p>用上述语句找出相关重复记录，然后根据id去将对应重复银行卡号删除</p><p>delete from cf_account.t_final_bankaccount t where t.id = 'id号'<br /></p>

data.problem: <p>已销户客户重新申请开户（不同的客户号），做交易权限上报时，无法选择到以前开通过交易权限的项目<br /></p>
data.solution: <p>到交易权限查询界面查询已销户客户号，点选其中一条交易权限，点击交易权限关闭</p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/395582871/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902539%3B1774075399%26q-key-time%3D1773902539%3B1774075399%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3De5f762302876b769575542c0fc8c10bef317d445&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22image.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27image.png" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="395582871"><img hb_type="file" file_id="395582871" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/395582871/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902539%3B1774075399%26q-key-time%3D1773902539%3B1774075399%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D41aec3476ba629e4719ae56e5302a6c57bf54b23&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22image.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27image.png&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a><br /></p><p>勾选所有项目后点确定</p><p>然后再到业务流水处理里，双击打开相关交易权限修改的流水，点上一步，重新勾选需要做权限上报的记录重新性操作。</p>

data.problem: <p>倍特期货大连linux交易报盘起不来</p>
data.solution: <p>连到他们环境上看，发现他们offer_agent进程起不来，看agent的bin目录下面多了一个temp文件，手工删掉agent.-1.shmn和agent.-10.sem还有temp之后，再手工拉agent就起来了。agent起来之后再拉报盘就ok了</p><p>——————</p><p>大概率是手欠用root用户起过linux报盘了</p>

data.problem: <p>大连行情报盘备启动不起来了，手动执行recv_dcemd也起不起来，在执行agent -b的时候看到执行到了agent.-1就停掉了<br /></p>
data.solution: <p>检查发现recv_agent/bin目录下有两个临时文件agent.-1.shm和agent.-10.sem存在，行情报盘启动的时候直接就启动成了agent.-1，将这两个临时文件删除，再启动行情报盘正常了<br /></p>

data.problem: <p>在账户中心-投资者查询界面，进行当天数据导出的时候，提示报错“您发送请求中的参数中含有非法字符”，导致数据无法导出。</p>
data.solution: <p>是由于当天一个客户的资料信息里存在--字符。此情况需要修改tomcat下的web.xml文件来解决</p>

data.problem: <p>某客户在账户中心的查看待办界面，打印客户资料，出现ora-06502的报错</p>
data.solution: <p>是由于该客户的经营范围信息长度过长，将代码里的经营范围字段长度进行了调整，打印正常。<br /></p>

data.problem: <p>某客户在账户中心的适当性流水查询里，保存该客户资料的时候出现了无效字符ora-21000的报错</p>
data.solution: <p>此问题可能会出现在法人户上，是由于该客户的经营范围信息里有分号的字符。此为系统bug，后续版本修复<br /></p>

data.problem: <p>客户下能源期货平仓单提示“平仓计算错误！”</p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/391912055/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902539%3B1774075399%26q-key-time%3D1773902539%3B1774075399%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D2797f00e8b59b84bc009e01fd9a99344cc8b5a7c&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22lQDPJxbbL_xR_t_NB2LNEACwcxBNp6uJFt4DaC7YXUDsAA_4096_1890.jpg%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27lQDPJxbbL_xR_t_NB2LNEACwcxBNp6uJFt4DaC7YXUDsAA_4096_1890.jpg" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="391912055"><img hb_type="file" file_id="391912055" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/391912055/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902539%3B1774075399%26q-key-time%3D1773902539%3B1774075399%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D528f8d3903a2900685a8c48c3de695ba1983a269&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22lQDPJxbbL_xR_t_NB2LNEACwcxBNp6uJFt4DaC7YXUDsAA_4096_1890.jpg%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27lQDPJxbbL_xR_t_NB2LNEACwcxBNp6uJFt4DaC7YXUDsAA_4096_1890.jpg&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a><br /></p>
data.solution: <p>该报错见于针对支持平今以及拆分平今单的交易所（上海、能源）在客户进行高频交易时，系统在处理客户平仓单时，由于老仓&lt;今仓，导致交易核心处理异常引起的，目前尚未解决。</p>

data.problem: <p>在账户中心中修改了客户的附加信息，勾选了“是否允许多点登录”，在处理待办的时候提示ORA-00001:违反唯一约束条件</p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/391276175/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902539%3B1774075399%26q-key-time%3D1773902539%3B1774075399%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3De1c9a49c9f4c60d4c75b45afcb597d5594f81e33&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22image.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27image.png" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="391276175"><img hb_type="file" file_id="391276175" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/391276175/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902539%3B1774075399%26q-key-time%3D1773902539%3B1774075399%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D8ab9f48023cf7e8e81e955642ec9f87fc492fb16&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22image.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27image.png&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a><br /></p>
data.solution: <p>在投资者查询中确定该客户的客户状态为“销户”，销户客户做任何资料的信息变更，进入到待办事项中做通过处理都会提示该报错。</p>

data.problem: <p>客户资金对账里的净手续费+返佣与经纪人返佣查询里的留存数据不一致</p>
data.solution: <p>直接说结论吧</p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/391255251/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902539%3B1774075399%26q-key-time%3D1773902539%3B1774075399%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D920882790708170ee349d9f8b28df64c5903b057&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22image.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27image.png" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="391255251"><img hb_type="file" file_id="391255251" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/391255251/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902539%3B1774075399%26q-key-time%3D1773902539%3B1774075399%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3Dbaaa3faf418f836ce7c17fd8950070400f9379e5&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22image.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27image.png&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a><br /></p><p>结算参数中有两个参数FYBLJG和FYBLZX分别是处理返佣（留存）手续费是不是包含交割（留存）、执行（留存）手续费的。</p><p>当设置都为1时：</p><p>①客户资金对账的手续费=经纪人返佣手续费</p><p>②客户资金对账的净手续费+返佣=留存手续费</p><p>当设置都为0时：</p><p>①客户资金对账的手续费-执行手续费-交割手续费=经纪人返佣手续费</p><p>②客户资金对账的净手续费+返佣-（执行手续费-执行上交手续费）-（交割手续费-交割上交手续费）=留存手续费</p><p>当参数设置为1的时候，计算返佣时的手续费会相应增加行权和交割的手续费，客户有交割、行权的情况下会导致返佣比设置为0的时候多。</p><p>当计算返佣转账时参数为0，而后续将参数都改为1后，由于返佣金额变多，那就基本上对不上帐了，除非重新做返佣转账，设计到按月汇总数据的话需要重新生成按月汇总数据。</p><p>另外客户资金对账的净手续费是怎么来的呢</p><p>净手续费=手续费-上交手续费-附加费-返佣</p><p>另外再补充一个参数ZJDZFYXS-资金对账返佣显示方式</p><p>①设置为1-出金方式时</p><blockquote><p>out_money = out_money + #act_ret.ret_amt, --出金</p><p>rem_commi = rem_commi - #act_ret.ret_amt, --留存手续费</p><p>				pure_commi= pure_commi- #act_ret.ret_amt, --净手续费</p><p>				ret_amt = #cust_fund.ret_amt + #act_ret.ret_amt</p></blockquote><p>即：出金中体现返佣、留存中扣除返佣、净手续费中扣除返佣</p><p>②设置为2-从净手续费中扣除</p><blockquote><p>rem_commi = rem_commi - #act_ret.ret_amt, --留存手续费</p><p>				pure_commi= pure_commi- #act_ret.ret_amt, --净手续费</p><p>				ret_amt = #cust_fund.ret_amt + #act_ret.ret_amt</p></blockquote><p>即：留存中扣除返佣、净手续费中扣除返佣，比用参数1少了在出金中体现返佣</p><p>③设置为3-从留存手续费中扣除</p><blockquote><p>pure_commi= pure_commi- #act_ret.ret_amt, --净手续费</p><p>				ret_amt = #cust_fund.ret_amt + #act_ret.ret_amt</p></blockquote><p>即：净手续费中扣除返佣，比用参数2少了在留存中扣除返佣</p>

data.problem: <p>在适当性管理-试题试卷管理-试卷管理存在多条已启用的自然人试卷，那么在用掌厅或者html5进行自然人开户时，默认使用的是哪个问卷</p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/391211173/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902539%3B1774075399%26q-key-time%3D1773902539%3B1774075399%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3Dbf4de7a8531184a742316d1bf82999cd78c014f0&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22lQLPJxbaWP1kJd7NAR3NBrCwtdWlPK8HozMDZs6ZvsCJAA_1712_285.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27lQLPJxbaWP1kJd7NAR3NBrCwtdWlPK8HozMDZs6ZvsCJAA_1712_285.png" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="391211173"><img hb_type="file" file_id="391211173" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/391211173/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902539%3B1774075399%26q-key-time%3D1773902539%3B1774075399%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D32687ea9aa60ba856e72216be716afd83511ad6c&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22lQLPJxbaWP1kJd7NAR3NBrCwtdWlPK8HozMDZs6ZvsCJAA_1712_285.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27lQLPJxbaWP1kJd7NAR3NBrCwtdWlPK8HozMDZs6ZvsCJAA_1712_285.png&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a><br /></p>
data.solution: <p>可以在适当性管理-系统管理-业务档案配置中找到适当性-适当性基本资料-个人适当性（普通），在流程步骤tab页中，找到问卷调查[自然人方案]，点修改，就可以看对应试卷是哪一套了，如需修改在此处修改即可。</p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/391221554/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902539%3B1774075399%26q-key-time%3D1773902539%3B1774075399%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D37a460ae568d6787ebd92e68326846ea5f7cd8f5&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22image.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27image.png" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="391221554"><img hb_type="file" file_id="391221554" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/391221554/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902539%3B1774075399%26q-key-time%3D1773902539%3B1774075399%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D181c5e002fe2c0022607957cdbb8ec1e57799db1&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22image.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27image.png&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a><br /></p>

data.problem: <p>金仕达作为二席，从主席上同步到系统里出入金记录会存在金仕达席位没有的客户，导致资金结算提示30028：有未复核资金，请复核后进行资金结算</p>
data.solution: <p>由于是主席同步过来的数据，如果同步时直接往库里硬插数据就会有这种情况，需要删掉出入金表中本系统没有的客户的出入金记录，参考语句如下，仅删除当天交易日的数据</p><p>DELETE FROM cust_money_io WHERE tx_date = (SELECT para_value FROM trade_para WHERE para_code = 'INIT') AND cust_no NOT IN (SELECT cust_no FROM cust_basic)<br /></p>

data.problem: <p>客户资金对账中的返佣与经纪人返佣查询之间的关系</p>
data.solution: <p>客户资金对账中的返佣列显示的数据，与经纪人返佣查询的查询结果没有直接的关系。</p><p>其返佣取值是客户返佣转账界面转账后的结果，取的是act_ret表的ret_amt字段。</p><p>其中按日是直接取的act_ret表的ret_amt字段对应日期的sum数据；</p><p>按月汇总取的是生成客户资金对账按月汇总数据时act_ret表当月的ret_amt字段sum数据，落表到month_fund_check的ret_amt字段；</p><p>按随机阶段取的是阶段时间内，act_ret表当月的ret_amt字段sum数据。</p><p>客户返佣转账转账生成的数据，是点击转账按钮后的tab页按确定按钮时，根据上一次返佣转账的后一日到转账日期为止，根据客户经纪人返佣设置中设置的内容，计算的客户返佣数据。</p><p>单客户阶段日期内同品种（区分期货期权tas）返佣数据仅会在act_ret中体现一条trans_date日期为转账日期的一条合计记录，多品种后台就会有多条记录，所以如果是每隔一个阶段才去生成的返佣数据，会导致按日查询客户资金对账时，查不到其中某一日的返佣数据，而仅在阶段返佣日期的时候查到汇总返佣值。</p><p>当调整过经纪人返佣设置的数据时，历史的客户返佣转账数据是不会随之变动的，当通过返佣转账管理删除了历史返佣转账记录后，相关的act_ret表数据即会被删除，这时再去客户返佣转账进行数据生成时，会根据已经调整完的经纪人返佣设置的数据去重新计算生成数据。</p><p>当通过返佣转账管理删除了某个月的返佣转账记录后，再到客户返佣转账中重新做了该月的转账后，已经生成的客户资金对账按月汇总数据中的返佣数值会与经纪人返佣设置、返佣转账管理中的数据不一致。</p><p>总结一下：</p><p>1、客户返佣转账中逐日转账的，当调整过经纪人返佣设置的数据后，再去核对历史记录，会出现客户资金对账（按日）返佣＝客户返佣转账≠经纪人返佣查询的现象；</p><p>2、如果客户确定不需要把历史返佣数据重算的话，那么这个现象是正常的，给客户一个解释，因为已经修改过经纪人返佣设置了，所以不要以修改完的经纪人返佣查询的数据和客户资金对账（按日）返佣和客户返佣转账里的数据进行核对；</p><p>3、如果需要从某一天开始将返佣数据按新设置的经纪人返佣设置重算，就需要到返佣转账管理删除那段时间的转账数据，在重新到客户返佣转账中重新生成转账记录，这里要注意如果要确保每一天的客户资金对账（按日）返佣数据和经纪人返佣查询界面数据对的上，那就要逐日进行返佣数据生成（客户返佣转账时，转账日期逐日增加），否则就只会在转账日期那一天体现阶段返佣数据；</p><p>4、当按月汇总的返佣数据由于重新设置过经纪人返佣设置导致数据不对，则除了需要到客户返佣转账中重新进行转账生成，还需要重新生成该月的月报数据，参考以下语句</p><blockquote><p>declare @ocode int, @omsg varchar(80), @oper_code varchar(20)</p><p>select  @oper_code = '999'   --该操作员必须真实存在，带所有客户的操作员</p><p>exec stat_month_data  @oper_code, '202210', @ocode output, @omsg output</p><p>select @ocode, @omsg</p><p>go</p></blockquote><p>如果只修改了经纪人返佣设置，则客户资金对账（按月）返佣＝客户返佣转账≠经纪人返佣查询；<br /></p><p>如果修改了经纪人返佣设置，也重新做了客户返佣转账，则客户资金对账（按月）返佣≠客户返佣转账＝经纪人返佣查询；</p><p>只有修改了经纪人返佣设置，重新做了客户返佣转账，也重新生成了月报数据，才会客户资金对账（按月）返佣＝客户返佣转账＝经纪人返佣查询。<br /></p><p>由于每个月的最后一个交易日，在进行持仓、资金结算的时候，就会直接生成客户资金对账（按月）的数据了（这里讨论的前提是结算参数YBSC客户用的是1-开启月报生成），这时候取的是结算时，客户返佣转账中的数据，此时的客户返佣转账数据可能不完整或不对，比如当月调整的经纪人返佣设置需要在最后一天重算整月，或者当天还没进行最后一个交易日的返佣转账，这时候生成的客户资金对账（按月）返佣数据会不准确，如要确保数据无误，需要在结算完，客户返佣转账完后，再重新用上面给出的语句重新进行月报数据的生成。</p><p>如果结算参数YBSC客户用的是0-不开启月报生成，那就做完结算、返佣转账后，执行上面给的月报生成脚本。</p><p>交易统计表也存在返佣字段，其逻辑与客户资金对账的内容基本相同，不做赘述。</p>

data.solution: <p>从同步程序日志上来看，是有向V6S同步密码修改的记录的</p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/390626297/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902539%3B1774075399%26q-key-time%3D1773902539%3B1774075399%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3Dbefb90bafe939cc1b3056ecafa03e2d829b5b734&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22image.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27image.png" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="390626297"><img hb_type="file" file_id="390626297" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/390626297/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902539%3B1774075399%26q-key-time%3D1773902539%3B1774075399%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D00a47bedf047aa7d7b1de315282c6a8b5606f2e7&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22image.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27image.png&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a><br /></p><p>p851701客户密码修改实时同步处理和p851702客户密码重置实时同步处理都只会对cust_login表进行update，如果表里没数据就不会insert记录，而V8T的ttcustinfo表里的密码修改时间是依赖于上场的V6S数据的（v6user.v8_cust_basic），该表中的set_pwd_date归根结底来源于cust_login，当这个字段为空时，V8T初始化就会把密码更新日期给清空了。<br /></p><p>可以用下述语句将非销户客户在cust_login里没有的客户都加到表里</p><p>INSERT INTO cust_login (cust_no) SELECT cust_no FROM cust_basic WHERE cust_no NOT IN (SELECT cust_no FROM cust_login) AND cust_status &lt;&gt; '7'<br /></p><p>这样之后就没问题了</p>

data.problem: <p>账户中心1.0.1.4-1的版本，增开交易编码时，无法选到广期所进行编码申请</p>
data.solution: <p>首先确定客户账户中心版本是不是1.0.1.4及以上（现在应该都是了）</p><p>然后到系统管理-系统配置-统一上报检查OPEN-G的设置是否为1，如果为0则不能进行广期所开户，需要在这里设置为1，见下图。</p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/388432376/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902539%3B1774075399%26q-key-time%3D1773902539%3B1774075399%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D3db255d5535dc872626fd22844fc7032d7677cc6&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22image.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27image.png" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="388432376"><img hb_type="file" file_id="388432376" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/388432376/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902539%3B1774075399%26q-key-time%3D1773902539%3B1774075399%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D16a1e9f719ca557c2f35f15a266caa0c912005f6&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22image.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27image.png&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a><br /></p>

data.problem: <p>客户反馈在云开户做了适当性信息的变更，审批完成之后在账户系统里面查询客户适当性发现客户适当性信息没有同步成功<br /></p>
data.solution: <p>云开户做了客户信息变更同步到账户系统之后需要走审批流程之后才会数据到落地表，检查账户适当性业务流水发现云开户适当性变更那条流水确实审批完成，但这条审批完成的记录中处理人为空，且待办和抄送中没有审批记录，由此可以判断是客户是直接跳过了审批流程直接手工改了流程状态，将录入改成审批完成，这个时候要同步可以在开户云适当性同步中做单个客户同步，或者将适当性业务流水中的那条跳过审批的记录流程状态改回录入，然后走完审批流程<br /></p>

data.problem: <p>客户在云开户做了自然人客户基本资料中证件截止日的变更，同步到账户之后发现指定下单人这几类人的证件截止日没有同步修改<br /></p>
data.solution: <p>这个需要到1014-4版本才会支持指定下单人这几类人的同步修改<br /></p>

data.problem: <p>客户审批完业务流水或者开户流水中的记录后在申请上报管理中查询不到上报记录<br /></p>
data.solution: <p>这个问题首先要查report的上报任务中有没有上报任务，若是有但监管那边没有则是report有问题，可以重启report，若是report上报任务中没有则是账户这边卡住了，需要查询一下上报任务select * from CF_ACCOUNT.T_REPORT_TASK t where t.client_no='9110032' 发现有记录且上报状态status是1已上报的话，那就需要将上报状态改成0未上报update CF_ACCOUNT.T_REPORT_TASK t set t.report_status='0' where t.client_no='9110032' 然后查询就会出现未上报的记录，勾选上点重新上报即可</p><p>————————20230704————————</p><p>激活上报这样修改会新生成一条待上报记录，同时原来几条卡状态的申请上报数据依然存在，可以等上报数据返回都成功后，手工删除cf_account.t_cfmmc_repor表中的数据,delete from cf_account.t_cfmmc_report t where t.client_no = '客户号' and t.report_status = '0'<br /></p>

data.problem: <p>未规范客户在账户中心中如何进行账户销户</p>
data.solution: <p>针对未规范客户，上报后销户失败，监控中心让其进行web销户，不通过账户中心上报销户的话，如果交易编码来源是“统一开户”的，那么需要在交易编码管理中将客户的交易编码来源修改为“交易所开户”</p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/388342953/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902539%3B1774075399%26q-key-time%3D1773902539%3B1774075399%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D3838a98965e6ea3fcafb88d2f5cebb5f1587994c&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22image.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27image.png" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="388342953"><img hb_type="file" file_id="388342953" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/388342953/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902539%3B1774075399%26q-key-time%3D1773902539%3B1774075399%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D2267366dcaad4f88e1cafb43d30fe5debefe6d51&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22image.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27image.png&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a><br /></p><p>再进行投资者销户，选择资金账号销户，即可完成编码销户和资金账号销户，并且会同步给V6S。</p><p>如果交易编码来源直接就是“交易所开户”，那直接在投资者销户界面进行资金账号销户即可。</p>

data.problem: <p>账户系统做客户休眠/激活/销户操作时，在没有做完整个流程时做了废弃操作，这个时候在休眠/激活/销户流水查询中还是会保留有一条处理中的记录。导致无法再次做休眠/激活/销户操作<br /></p>
data.solution: <p>这个需要通过脚本将该条处理中的流水处理成失败，以下以销户为例</p><p>--销户处理中流水查询</p><p>select a.client_no,a.status from CF_ACCOUNT.DORMANT_ACTIVATION_RECORD a where a.client_no='1483' and a.option_type='C' and a.status='1'</p><p>--status 操作状态 0-未上报、1-处理中、2-成功、3-失败</p><p>--option_type 操作类型 A:激活 S:休眠 C:销户'</p><p>--销户处理中流水刷新成失败</p><p>update CF_ACCOUNT.DORMANT_ACTIVATION_RECORD set status='3' where client_no='10082919' and option_type='C' and status='1'</p>

data.problem: <p>存量客户进行适当性重新评测提示“当前客户未在当前业务部门进行适当性评测”</p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/388087640/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902539%3B1774075399%26q-key-time%3D1773902539%3B1774075399%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3Ded8b08e5191b05598af59abbaa29982fb487ae0a&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22image.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27image.png" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="388087640"><img hb_type="file" file_id="388087640" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/388087640/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902539%3B1774075399%26q-key-time%3D1773902539%3B1774075399%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D24760988c1c63732c3d543fe1b820f51f7177984&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22image.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27image.png&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a><br /></p>
data.solution: <p>从V6S导入适当性数据到账户中心后，当信息来源（适当性业务流水查询输出项可得）为KSYC，会导致通过适当性重新评测菜单进行重新评测报上述错误。</p><p>一方面可以通过投资者查询，进入到客户详细信息，通过便捷导航的适当性重测对客户进行适当性重新评测，如下图</p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/388088700/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902539%3B1774075399%26q-key-time%3D1773902539%3B1774075399%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3Ddd3b57c4e38c6f0d32540f29b92593f44235bc48&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22lQLPJxbV1-JoafbMkM0BmrAgwyeBjIkshANfbVsdwPQA_410_144.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27lQLPJxbV1-JoafbMkM0BmrAgwyeBjIkshANfbVsdwPQA_410_144.png" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="388088700"><img hb_type="file" file_id="388088700" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/388088700/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902539%3B1774075399%26q-key-time%3D1773902539%3B1774075399%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D3633f989bdc1cafd20a56839172e20dcd58654c4&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22lQLPJxbV1-JoafbMkM0BmrAgwyeBjIkshANfbVsdwPQA_410_144.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27lQLPJxbV1-JoafbMkM0BmrAgwyeBjIkshANfbVsdwPQA_410_144.png&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a><br /></p><p>另一方面，可以通过下述语句对客户后台进行数据补充（insert和update分开执行）</p><blockquote><p>insert into CF_ACCOUNT.T_CLIENT_BUSINESS t</p><p>  select sys_guid() id,</p><p>         c.client_id,</p><p>         'B' business_scope,</p><p>         r.branch_id,</p><p>         'appropriateness' business_class</p><p>    from cf_match.t_client_classify c</p><p>    left join cf_Account.t_Final_Registrationagroot r</p><p>      on c.client_id = r.client_id</p><p>   where c.client_id not in</p><p>         (select client_id</p><p>            from CF_ACCOUNT.T_CLIENT_BUSINESS t</p><p>           where t.business_class = 'appropriateness'</p><p>              or t.business_class = 'Supplement_open')</p><p><br /></p><p>update CF_ACCOUNT.T_CLIENT_BUSINESS t</p><p>set t.business_scope='B'</p><p><br /></p></blockquote>

data.problem: <p>升级完8508后，经常会出现提示“操作员已经登录，不允许重复登陆！”的错误。</p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/388079850/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902539%3B1774075399%26q-key-time%3D1773902539%3B1774075399%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3Df44e8ed02e9e032f0bc8b08e4bc06fba0a514459&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22image.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27image.png" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="388079850"><img hb_type="file" file_id="388079850" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/388079850/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902539%3B1774075399%26q-key-time%3D1773902539%3B1774075399%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3Dade22c92864e79316b5fd604ba6a761b0f396b98&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22image.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27image.png&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a><br /></p>
data.solution: <p>8508为了修复经常会出现的交易管理终端令牌不一致的问题（重复登录，升级、测试等柜台一直不关等情况可能会出现下一交易日交易管理终端提示令牌不一致），当发现交易管理终端已经登录，就不允许再次登录了。</p><p>目前只能通过用另一个有操作员会话的操作员将该操作员会话强制录出后，才能继续登录。</p><p>安粮的问题是自动化运维系统每天在15点30分左右自动关闭交易管理终端的操作，很像是直接kill进程还不是用退出、关闭交易管理终端的方式退出程序，导致程序关闭时不会向后台发起录出指令，所以操作员会话就始终留在系统里了，这时候再去登录交易管理终端就会出现该错误提示。</p><p>故，升级了8508后，建议终端使用客户，通过正常关闭功能对程序进行关闭、退出操作，异常录出（如不关程序直接关机，任务管理器强杀进程等）都会导致在本机再次打开程序提示操作员已经登录，不允许重复登录。</p>

data.problem: <p>合约里面的市价最大手数和限价最大手数几个交易所给不给<br /></p>
data.solution: <p>上海能源，是给的，郑州、大商、中金所只给限价，不给市价，郑州没有给市价，报盘把限价的值给了市价<br /></p>

data.problem: <p>账户中心迁移了V6S的交易资料数据，如果是没有做过交易权限上报的存量客户，在账户中心中是怎么展示这部分数据的<br /></p>
data.solution: <p>客户在V6S中没有做过交易权限上报的，在账户中心的交易权限查询就查不到数据，迁移就没法迁移过来了。</p><p>有做过的客户，可以在交易权限查询这里查到相关数据。<br /></p>

data.problem: <p>修改特法的开户信息中的客户名称，在账户中心中需要调整几张表<br /></p>
data.solution: <p>cf_account.t_final_client的client_name和cf_account.t_final_product_client的client_name两张表。<br /></p><p>一般自然人的话就改cf_account.t_final_client的client_name就可以了。</p><p>一般，改了客户名称，结算银行里的开户人也要进行相应的修改CF_ACCOUNT.T_BANKACCOUNT的bank_client_name，这一条酌情。</p>

data.problem: <p>云晨期货升级V6S61008版本的第三个交易日结算后，生成证监会报送文件缺少delivcontractdata待交割结算合约文件，只能生成证监会28个报送文件。卢宜临时修改了p853140_new，后续正式包放到61009大版本里发布。<br /></p>
data.solution: <p>升级卢宜临时修改了p853140_new<br /></p>

data.problem: <p>账户中心客户销户，在在线销户中显示“请先去柜台检查该账户下是否有尚未完结的交易，并在柜台手动处理执行销户操作”，无法点击提交审核之类的操作。</p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/387295094/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902539%3B1774075399%26q-key-time%3D1773902539%3B1774075399%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D33188a5702da1623891c235bf815edf5ab17586e&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22image.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27image.png" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="387295094"><img hb_type="file" file_id="387295094" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/387295094/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902539%3B1774075399%26q-key-time%3D1773902539%3B1774075399%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D21821543e157394f9cbf4a0c12d95b857f169163&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22image.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27image.png&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a><br /></p>
data.solution: <p>这是两个问题。</p><p>首先，在线销户中显示“请先去柜台检查该账户下是否有尚未完结的交易，并在柜台手动处理执行销户操作”，这只是一个提示，可以无视这个提示继续往下操作。</p><p>其次，通过投资者销户对该客户进行销户，无法点击提交审核之类的，是由于云晨启用了审核功能</p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/387298954/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902539%3B1774075399%26q-key-time%3D1773902539%3B1774075399%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D3cfb1a7514a584fe6934064146a7e2234a747808&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22image.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27image.png" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="387298954"><img hb_type="file" file_id="387298954" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/387298954/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902539%3B1774075399%26q-key-time%3D1773902539%3B1774075399%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D942ce456070a9faaef981d0cb8e6b74e817eb743&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22image.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27image.png&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a><br /></p><p>需要在待办事项中对提交的销户申请记录进行处理通过才可以。</p><p><a data.problem: <p>怎么在账户中心中增加银行代码</p>
data.solution: <p>通过集成开发环境(账户中心地址/ide)中工具里的键值编辑器</p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/386955060/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902539%3B1774075399%26q-key-time%3D1773902539%3B1774075399%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3Db4e7e31791958a80a441b4da28b6e60d9cd1fc8a&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22image.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27image.png" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="386955060"><img hb_type="file" file_id="386955060" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/386955060/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902539%3B1774075399%26q-key-time%3D1773902539%3B1774075399%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3Df1266aad2a7718ad4b7ce96af58c93d8470d6f99&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22image.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27image.png&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a><br /></p><p>找到键名acc_open_bank，根据监控中心的枚举文件enumerate.xml中bankid项，用添加子项的按钮新增客户所需的银行</p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/386955634/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902539%3B1774075399%26q-key-time%3D1773902539%3B1774075399%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D437809331d4bfe9f33a8185bcb165a1b8d9d0f3a&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22image.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27image.png" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="386955634"><img hb_type="file" file_id="386955634" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/386955634/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902539%3B1774075399%26q-key-time%3D1773902539%3B1774075399%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D2584071c05271d32fa5ff6cabf3e7385a307d763&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22image.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27image.png&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a><br /></p><p>键=id，值=value</p><p>新增完后点击保存子项，然后通过工具中的刷新系统功能更新键值</p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/386957649/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902539%3B1774075399%26q-key-time%3D1773902539%3B1774075399%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3Dc9d57f251d9d684585f75cefe3009d5d0d63a4ca&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22image.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27image.png" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="386957649"><img hb_type="file" file_id="386957649" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/386957649/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902539%3B1774075399%26q-key-time%3D1773902539%3B1774075399%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D36724523ed6275c9598e79fc713a1c18acba4558&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22image.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27image.png&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a><br /></p><p>客户需要强制刷新（alt+F5）其打开的网页，即可使更新的键值生效</p>

data.problem: <p>客户无法进行新增交易编码的申请操作，点击要新开的编码交易所，始终点不上</p>
data.solution: <p>由于在开户流水查询里，有上报驳回的记录，导致无法继续增开编码，需要将这条记录处理成审批完成或者废弃后才能继续处理。</p><p>另外如果同时有其他流水，如修改信息的上报驳回记录，也会导致无法增开编码，会提示类似于已经有业务在处理，没有办法增开的报错，这时候也需要将该流水记录临时调整为审核成功、或者废弃，才能继续增开编码。</p>

data.problem: <p>从V6S同步到账户中心的客户，由于特法开通银期，在客户资料维护里改过客户的证件类型和证件号码，导致同步到账户中心的证件类型和证件号码与实际客户证件类型与号码不一致，怎么通过后台修改<br /></p>
data.solution: <p>select t.id_no,t.id_type,t.client_id from cf_account.t_final_registrationagroot t where t.client_no = '客户号'</p><p>select t.id_no,t.id_type,t.client_id,t.* from cf_account.t_final_client t where t.client_id = '账户中心客户ID'<br /></p><p>首先通过上述语句查询客户的t.client_id-账户中心客户ID,t.id_no-证件号码,t.id_type-证件类型</p><p>然后通过update语句进行修改</p><p>证件类型参考枚举文件enumerate.xml</p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/387300222/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902541%3B1774075401%26q-key-time%3D1773902541%3B1774075401%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D9242a7d5671a490b0197649240c50cdd1df90af2&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22image.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27image.png" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="387300222"><img hb_type="file" file_id="387300222" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/387300222/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902541%3B1774075401%26q-key-time%3D1773902541%3B1774075401%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3Dcbbdcab14a9edf1b3aec57350ae4b0807a876fdb&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22image.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27image.png&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a><br /></p><p><br /></p><p><br /></p><p>select t.id_no,t.id_type,t.client_id,t.* from cf_account.t_final_registrationagroot t where t.client_no = '2103706'</p><p>update cf_account.t_final_registrationagroot t set id_no = '31122565-3' where t.client_no = '2103706'</p><p>select t.id_no,t.id_type,t.client_id,t.* from cf_account.t_final_client t where t.client_id = '1092364'</p><p>update cf_account.t_final_client t set id_no = '31122565-3' where t.client_id = '1092364'</p><p>select * from cf_account.t_final_domesticcompany t where t.client_id = '1190281'</p><p>update cf_account.t_final_domesticcompany set license_no = '913301033112256538' where client_id = '1190281'</p><p>update cf_account.t_final_domesticcompany set instrepr_eid = '31122565-3' where client_id = '1190281'</p><p>select * from cf_account.t_final_product_client where product_client_id = '1190281'</p><p>update cf_account.t_final_product_client set id_no = '913301033112256538' where product_client_id = '1190281'</p><p><br /></p><p>特法户cf_account.t_final_product_client的product_client_id等于cf_account.t_final_client的client_id</p>

data.problem: <p>广期结算完盯市盈亏不对，都是0</p>
data.solution: <p>V6S后台information表里面有个BB参数，这个参数是作为整个结算的一个起始点，广期BB值应该是正式上线前的一个日期才行，也就是上线日期之前需要先做一把广期的空结算，空结算时会插入BB的日期</p>

/></p><p>对比客户资金、客户持仓、客户成交记录</p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/384731242/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902541%3B1774075401%26q-key-time%3D1773902541%3B1774075401%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3Ddc859c5a5beecf8d547513319fab43a0cbbb189e&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22lQDPJxbMNpNlF7DNBGTNCYSw9I7Hq2dM0u0DT6YwsoAQAQ_2436_1124.jpg%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27lQDPJxbMNpNlF7DNBGTNCYSw9I7Hq2dM0u0DT6YwsoAQAQ_2436_1124.jpg" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="384731242"><img hb_type="file" file_id="384731242" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/384731242/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902541%3B1774075401%26q-key-time%3D1773902541%3B1774075401%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D6a77ff0c855e6f949348fa82cb50649615314973&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22lQDPJxbMNpNlF7DNBGTNCYSw9I7Hq2dM0u0DT6YwsoAQAQ_2436_1124.jpg%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27lQDPJxbMNpNlF7DNBGTNCYSw9I7Hq2dM0u0DT6YwsoAQAQ_2436_1124.jpg&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a><br /></p><p>其中买保证金为当日买开仓后冻结的买保证金，卖保证金为上日持仓保证金的负数，故此判断是对上日对锁持仓处理时出现的问题。</p><p>最终取数据到本地来核验具体情况时，发现其V8T中郑商所PZDSYH盘中对锁优惠是不开启的，故而造成了这个问题，所以在目前郑州有对锁的情况下，V8T的盘中对锁优惠参数必须设置为1，开启，否则就会有这个问题。</p>

data.problem: <p>投资者查询能查到这个客户的记录，但是投资者销户里面查不到</p>
data.solution: <p>因为这个客户之前做了一把销户没成功，销户流水里面记录是处理中，虽然业务流水里面已经废弃了，只能后台修改销户流水的操作状态，update CF_ACCOUNT.DORMANT_ACTIVATION_RECORD set status='3' where client_no='1001562' and option_type='C' and status='1'</p>

data.problem: <p>存量客户修改在账户中心进行信息修改的时候提示：客户号已存在</p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/383189191/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902541%3B1774075401%26q-key-time%3D1773902541%3B1774075401%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D5b511501f108a71148b31d1979b3e980554dfe23&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22image.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27image.png" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="383189191"><img hb_type="file" file_id="383189191" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/383189191/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902541%3B1774075401%26q-key-time%3D1773902541%3B1774075401%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D7061d8c40b31613d2b6632f589d380f7665d0068&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22image.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27image.png&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a><br /></p>
data.solution: <p>与适当性流水查询中该客户的业务类型有关</p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/383189599/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902541%3B1774075401%26q-key-time%3D1773902541%3B1774075401%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3Dc056ce9701279b5f9a02027351db18ed4f0f6f58&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22lQLPJxbOqjGs5H3NAWTNAtaw6IBUt7KYfMUDU6p7VwCRAA_726_356.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27lQLPJxbOqjGs5H3NAWTNAtaw6IBUt7KYfMUDU6p7VwCRAA_726_356.png" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="383189599"><img hb_type="file" file_id="383189599" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/383189599/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902541%3B1774075401%26q-key-time%3D1773902541%3B1774075401%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D3c35713a6a5c5d4cc995c2cb5fc5168bc5feeef5&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22lQLPJxbOqjGs5H3NAWTNAtaw6IBUt7KYfMUDU6p7VwCRAA_726_356.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27lQLPJxbOqjGs5H3NAWTNAtaw6IBUt7KYfMUDU6p7VwCRAA_726_356.png&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a><br /></p><p>如上图所示，这类信息是由于从异构系统导入的账户系统引起的同一条流水有多个业务类型所致。</p><p>由于账户中心目前处理适当性流水的业务类型是单个业务类型一条记录，所以像这类记录需要到后台修改其业务类型为单一类型才可以继续进行后续业务操作，语句如下</p><p>update  CF_ACCOUNT.T_CLIENT_BUSINESS t</p><p>set t.business_scope='B'</p><p>where t.client_id='90199000'</p><p>update  CF_ACCOUNT.T_APPROPRIATENESS_ROOT t</p><p>set t.business_scope='B'</p><p>where t.client_no='90199000'</p>

data.problem: <p>上了账户中心后，某个存量客户通过网开网页进行后续操作的时候，提示：柜台错误，请既是联系期货公司或者柜台厂商处理：柜台校验客户不存在！</p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/381477891/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902541%3B1774075401%26q-key-time%3D1773902541%3B1774075401%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3Db9731fb6ddc124909cd2ae54c521dade36e9cda1&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22image.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27image.png" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="381477891"><img hb_type="file" file_id="381477891" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/381477891/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902541%3B1774075401%26q-key-time%3D1773902541%3B1774075401%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D64c2f0ea83e49a9b1119183b9d3d180fc61f4123&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22image.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27image.png&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a><br /></p>
data.solution: <p>通过界面中的身份证信息在投资者查询界面检查改客户，发现有确实的信息，且状态是活跃的。</p><p>根据该客户号到开户流水查询中检查其开户流水记录，发现其流水状态为上报驳回</p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/381479412/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902541%3B1774075401%26q-key-time%3D1773902541%3B1774075401%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3Dea9159a4e38ed725a01974295d38990294037585&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22lQLPJxbMZFRNvl9uzQSTsAQaKTlcRd7aA0_xJ5OA-wA_1171_110.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27lQLPJxbMZFRNvl9uzQSTsAQaKTlcRd7aA0_xJ5OA-wA_1171_110.png" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="381479412"><img hb_type="file" file_id="381479412" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/381479412/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902541%3B1774075401%26q-key-time%3D1773902541%3B1774075401%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D95c449f45f4d2a73c11d4d6db1e0b1d00823d809&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22lQLPJxbMZFRNvl9uzQSTsAQaKTlcRd7aA0_xJ5OA-wA_1171_110.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27lQLPJxbMZFRNvl9uzQSTsAQaKTlcRd7aA0_xJ5OA-wA_1171_110.png&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a><br /></p><p>上述报错的原因就是由于这个状态导致的，通过修改流程状态修改为审批完成，即可让客户进行后续操作。</p><p><a data.problem: <p>存量客户在补适当性信息的时候有如下图提示，您发送请求中的参数中含有非法字符，请求被拒绝</p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/381397189/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902541%3B1774075401%26q-key-time%3D1773902541%3B1774075401%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D2787d3d2b0d61b5a3e7b824a760d0ac7f63cebaf&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%2298fd4b637a72a71c360025e10df4559.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%2798fd4b637a72a71c360025e10df4559.png" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="381397189"><img hb_type="file" file_id="381397189" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/381397189/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902541%3B1774075401%26q-key-time%3D1773902541%3B1774075401%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D018afbfcfc13d3c4ecabde7a93c45367bb87cb3d&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%2298fd4b637a72a71c360025e10df4559.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%2798fd4b637a72a71c360025e10df4559.png&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a><br /></p>
data.solution: <p>本问题是由于客户身份地址在修改时，按客户身份证录入地址有--，如下图</p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/381399895/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902541%3B1774075401%26q-key-time%3D1773902541%3B1774075401%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3Db0197d82aa071fc82b68649fe5567470f7dc6a28&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%2261fd9acfa975801a9197086a9205d0c.jpg%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%2761fd9acfa975801a9197086a9205d0c.jpg" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="381399895"><img hb_type="file" file_id="381399895" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/381399895/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902541%3B1774075401%26q-key-time%3D1773902541%3B1774075401%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D676bdf782780872db9c3c57b7aa7bc15e649ea28&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%2261fd9acfa975801a9197086a9205d0c.jpg%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%2761fd9acfa975801a9197086a9205d0c.jpg&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a><br /></p><p>客户身份证中也确实有--，</p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/381401890/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902541%3B1774075401%26q-key-time%3D1773902541%3B1774075401%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3Dd3da74736381ab3d82054573b2a625eda8350cf8&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%228f80cd0fbf22b620d4b99b8a1f168b8.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%278f80cd0fbf22b620d4b99b8a1f168b8.png" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="381401890"><img hb_type="file" file_id="381401890" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/381401890/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902541%3B1774075401%26q-key-time%3D1773902541%3B1774075401%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D46b62843d9759c894f159ec71a38a67a71ea41b5&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%228f80cd0fbf22b620d4b99b8a1f168b8.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%278f80cd0fbf22b620d4b99b8a1f168b8.png&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a><br /></p><p>所以在系统中遇到这样的情况不能按--输入，只能按-输入<br /></p><p>这时由于客户是进行的适当性，适当性流水中没有修改流程状态的按钮进行流程调整，所以只能后台改流程状态，让客户重新修改客户适当性资料再进入流程。</p><p>进入集成开发环境，在数据库浏览器使用下述语句进行调整</p><p>update CF_ACCOUNT.T_APPROPRIATENESS_ROOT t set t.process_status='0'</p><p>where id='EB8597433B196AACE055E8DF7934CC7C'</p><p>注，id这里要修改为对应流水的id号，可以在适当性流水查询中查到对应流水的id信息，如下图</p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/381408257/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902541%3B1774075401%26q-key-time%3D1773902541%3B1774075401%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3De727329b76e1ef830720520e90086b613b903a80&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22lQLPJxbMXH6bftTNA3bNB2qwbwe0rzW-alEDT-RRNsCFAA_1898_886.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27lQLPJxbMXH6bftTNA3bNB2qwbwe0rzW-alEDT-RRNsCFAA_1898_886.png" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="381408257"><img hb_type="file" file_id="381408257" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/381408257/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902541%3B1774075401%26q-key-time%3D1773902541%3B1774075401%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D203bdb83ba7f3e2aaff8294623042b6a78fbf8f4&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22lQLPJxbMXH6bftTNA3bNB2qwbwe0rzW-alEDT-RRNsCFAA_1898_886.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27lQLPJxbMXH6bftTNA3bNB2qwbwe0rzW-alEDT-RRNsCFAA_1898_886.png&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a><br /></p><p>补充一下：</p><p>如果是账户的流水，比如开户、销户、修改上报等，可以通过开户流水查询界面的修改流程状态按钮对相关流水的状态进行调整，无需到后台进行修改状态，如下图</p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/381418422/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902541%3B1774075401%26q-key-time%3D1773902541%3B1774075401%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D8f8512184c76c72e7431465b02bd9e1620f9e41e&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22image.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27image.png" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="381418422"><img hb_type="file" file_id="381418422" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/381418422/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902541%3B1774075401%26q-key-time%3D1773902541%3B1774075401%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D7c8e93b7816f6324668659f87c7fc0aa0f1de856&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22image.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27image.png&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a><br /></p>

data.problem: <p>广期所做了几百手投机转套保，导成交单的时候提示0笔成交0笔导入成功</p>
data.solution: <p>导入时候有投机转套保的成交不体现在这里，也不进成交表，进的是file_exch_s_to_h表，所以前台体现导入成交记录为0，同时也不体现在成交单管理界面。</p><p>要验证投机转套保是否成功，需要将相关交易所（大连、广期）结算参数GFEXFTTTHS、GFEXOPTTHS设置为启用后，正常做完一次成功的持仓结算，再到客户持仓查询里看客户的持仓是否变更为投机或保值即可。</p>

data.problem: <p>客户通过掌厅走在线销户 一直提示“未获取到业务流水号”<br /></p>
data.solution: <p>此客户昨天报的休眠业务还没有做完，状态还是处理中，前一个业务没有做完是没法做下一个业务的。等收到休眠成功回报，再做下销户即可。<br /></p>

data.problem: <p>客户从掌厅发起信息变更，在账户中心页面上看到此客户的重置密码的记录里，资金密码和查询密码的记录数重复。<br /></p>
data.solution: <p>排查了一下，掌厅发起密码重置请求的次数在同一秒内发生多次，也就是手机上可能多点了几下。这个涉及到手机上控件的控制问题，后续会考虑优化。<br /></p>

data.problem: <p>账户中心中只销客户编码，不销账户，怎么操作</p>
data.solution: <p>账户中心投资者销户界面，查询客户数据后，点选交易编码销户即可</p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/380932973/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902541%3B1774075401%26q-key-time%3D1773902541%3B1774075401%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D5495dc47031d6a79292c4684de457261e75e9f50&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22image.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27image.png" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="380932973"><img hb_type="file" file_id="380932973" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/380932973/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902541%3B1774075401%26q-key-time%3D1773902541%3B1774075401%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D66b34a67691867f9c5e7ed04332d94871b813d26&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22image.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27image.png&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a><br /></p><p>资金账户销户和交易编码销户的区别是</p><p>如果选择的销户类型为资金账户销户，则在上报成功后，先更新该客户所拥有的交易所交易编码的状态为销户，待所有交易编码销户完成后，更新该客户状态为销户；</p><p>如果选择销户类型为交易编码销户，则在上报成功，更新选择的该客户的交易所的交易编码的状态为销户<br /></p>

data.problem: <p>在账户中心，没有三证合一过的老机构户，由于没有统一社会信用代码，无法上报销户，要如何操作？</p>
data.solution: <p>没有三证合一过的客户，如果是很老的不是统一开户开户的客户，那就直接在网页上销户再到系统里改销户状态；如果是统一开户以后开的户，要么就也是web上做销户，然后系统里改销户状态，要么就是先做这个客户信息变更，修改上报成功完了以后再做销户上报。目前就这几种处理方法。<br /></p><p>在系统里修改状态的操作，具体如下：</p><p>1、账户中心交易编码管理里改状态</p><p>2、到V6S里把客户交易编码删掉（如果交易编码是统一开户，会生成上报记录，需在申请上报-销户上报管理及销户申请（如有）将相关记录进行删除）</p><p>3、账户中心投资者销户里销资金账号，这个就不会上报了</p><p>4、销户后就会同步给V6S了<br /></p>

data.problem: <p>关于sap收购了sybase,出现漏洞问题CNVD-2022-63619（SAP Adaptive Server Enterprise存在权限提升漏洞），金仕达系统的sybase12.5和sybase15版本，该如何解决处理。</p><h1><br /></h1>
data.solution: <p>经查，sybase漏洞是出现在sybase16版本才有的问题，我们当前版本在用的sybase12.5和sybase15版本，不需要处理，并且 sybctrl 的文件15环境上， 本地找过了，没有发现，应该是16上才有的。<br /></p><p>详见：<a href="https://www.cnvd.org.cn/flaw/show/CNVD-2022-63619" target="_blank">国家信息安全漏洞共享平台 (cnvd.org.cn)：SAP Adaptive Server Enterprise权限提升漏洞</a></p>

data.problem: <p>账户中心销户上报显示上报失败：XML格式错误</p>
data.solution: /></p><p>根据该报错定位到xml文件后，到local_dir目录下找到相应xml导出到本地进行查看</p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/377254496/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902541%3B1774075401%26q-key-time%3D1773902541%3B1774075401%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D768e9fbad41db1e4c7bc621249addca2d618b14c&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22image.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27image.png" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="377254496"><img hb_type="file" file_id="377254496" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/377254496/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902541%3B1774075401%26q-key-time%3D1773902541%3B1774075401%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3Dc1b1b14d133f9fd8606da9cbe689628fc5ef8abc&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22image.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27image.png&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a><br /></p><p>现阶段，该报错常见于</p><p>1、老客户销户没有做适当性的情况，对应xml文件中appropriatype为空（17年适当性前的客户）</p><p>2、老特法或者资管户2021年增加的mom等相关配置未做设置，对应xml文件中has_issuer和mom_assetunit为空（2021年新增这部分资料前开户的客户）</p><p>如下图</p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/377258180/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902541%3B1774075401%26q-key-time%3D1773902541%3B1774075401%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3Dc5682e62a66416c717234519b6710681d4aece28&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22image.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27image.png" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="377258180"><img hb_type="file" file_id="377258180" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/377258180/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902541%3B1774075401%26q-key-time%3D1773902541%3B1774075401%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D41930b7a596ffeb558b32402dbc782b0e98b0be2&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22image.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27image.png&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a><br /></p><p>账户中心的1.0.14-4会修复老客户这部分资料补全导致销户失败的问题</p><p>而新开客户申请编码时如果提示错误，则需要手工补全</p><p>---by the way---</p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/378920524/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902541%3B1774075401%26q-key-time%3D1773902541%3B1774075401%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D80828ece4f157088783e09b4dd623423019cd6fd&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22image.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27image.png" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="378920524"><img hb_type="file" file_id="378920524" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/378920524/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902541%3B1774075401%26q-key-time%3D1773902541%3B1774075401%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3Dcdc7ed44d9a316f76c2755707ec1fb91c68e854c&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22image.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27image.png&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a><br /></p><p>这种情况就是后台字段录入的时候多了一个回车，在进行申请编码的上报是也会出现本QA记录的报错信息</p>

data.problem: <p>客户激活成功后，在账户中心修改客户交易状态为只可平仓，手工同步给V6S后，V6S客户状态为只可平仓，但是当天结算的时候，在V6S里客户的状态又变成正常了。</p>
data.solution: <p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/376746343/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902541%3B1774075401%26q-key-time%3D1773902541%3B1774075401%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3Da4f301fac28891b0095f5151661597a975418d24&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22481d8f212a2aaf01923c2d0897338c2.jpg%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27481d8f212a2aaf01923c2d0897338c2.jpg" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="376746343"><img hb_type="file" file_id="376746343" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/376746343/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902541%3B1774075401%26q-key-time%3D1773902541%3B1774075401%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3Dd87af507caaa2046ec03427beece8d5b468b492f&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22481d8f212a2aaf01923c2d0897338c2.jpg%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27481d8f212a2aaf01923c2d0897338c2.jpg&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a><br /></p><p>从同步流水的记录来看，客户的5个编码其中4个在几分钟内就激活成功了，而最后一个编码直到下午近16点才激活成功。</p><p>而在账户中心中修改客户交易状态进行手工同步的操作是在9点21分，所以实际上在改完这个状态后，账户中心在下午同步给V6S激活成功的记录后，又把客户状态修改为了正常。</p><p>另外补充一下上了账户中心以后休眠激活和没上账户中心的V6S逻辑区别。</p><p>在使用V6S进行休眠激活时，由于会向elec_apply_account插入电子上报流水，所以在收到休眠激活成功的回报后，系统在进行859542-休眠激活规范电子回报处理时，会外调isall_tx_success-判断是否收到所有交易编码的成功信息来对elec_apply_account进行判断是否都成功，所以只有当同一批次所有上报流水都成功，系统才会将休眠、激活状态作为成功处理。</p><p>上了账户中心后，由于使用账户中心进行休眠激活上报处理，其上报流水不会同步给elec_apply_account表，故而当账户中心收到客户休眠激活的某个编码成功的回报，调用859542-休眠激活规范电子回报处理给V6S进行处理时，由于elec_apply_account表没有记录，故而系统会直接将客户休眠、激活成功。</p><p>859542激活代码如下，休眠类似</p><blockquote><p>		else if @mi_apply_type = '9' --激活休眠账户</p><p>		begin</p><p>			if @mi_elec_status = '3'   --激活休眠账户成功</p><p>			begin</p><p>				</p><p>				update elec_apply_account </p><p>				set   elec_status = @mi_elec_status,</p><p>				      notes =@jys+rtrim(ltrim(@note)),--+'|'+notes </p><p>				      return_date = convert(char(8),getdate(),112),	--回报日期 lfd 20160829</p><p>				      return_time = convert(char(8),getdate(),108)	--回报时间 lfd 20160829</p><p>				where  apply_no = @mi_apply_no</p><p>				and    apply_date = @mi_apply_date</p><p>				and    cust_no = @mi_cust_no</p><p>				</p><p>				select @ocode=@@error</p><p>				if @ocode&lt;&gt;0                 </p><p>				begin  </p><p>					select @ocode = 85954218                 </p><p>				  	select @omsg='更新流水表出错!' </p><p>				  	goto l_fatal        </p><p>				end</p><p>				</p><p>				--hes 6.8.4.3 20111202  在调用sp外面添加临时表</p><p>				--delete from  #max_elec_apply_account_status</p><p>				--delete from  #t_max_elec_apply_account_date</p><p>				</p><p>				</p><p>				exec   @ret=	isall_tx_success  	@mi_oper_code,</p><p>							@mi_cust_no,</p><p>							@mi_apply_type,</p><p>							@ocode   output,</p><p>							@omsg output					</p><p>							</p><p>	</p><p>				if @ret = 0  --收到所有交易编码都为成功信息	</p><p>			  	begin	</p><p>				</p><p>								update   cust_basic</p><p>								set      sleep_status = '6'  ,--已激活</p><p>									 cust_status  = '0'   --正常</p><p>								where cust_no = @mi_cust_no</p><p>								and   sleep_status = '5'  --正在激活上报</p><p>								</p><p>								select @ocode=@@error</p><p>								if (@ocode &lt;&gt; 0)</p><p>								begin</p><p>									select @ocode = 85954219</p><p>									select @omsg = '修改客户基本资料表失败,客户号' + @mi_cust_no</p><p>									goto l_fatal</p><p>								end</p><p>								</p><p>								--插入客户通知消息</p><p>								if  not  exists ( select * from cust_notify</p><p>									where	(note_date = convert(varchar(8),getdate(),112))</p><p>									and	(end_note_date = convert( char(8)  ,dateadd(month , 1,getdate())  , 112 ))</p><p>									and	(cust_no = @mi_cust_no)</p><p>									and	(cust_class = @cust_class)</p><p>									)</p><p>								begin	</p><p>									insert into cust_notify (</p><p>										note_date,	--通知开始日期</p><p>										content,        --通知消息</p><p>										oper_code,      --操作员</p><p>										date,</p><p>										cust_no,        --客户号</p><p>										end_note_date,  --通知结束日期</p><p>										cust_class      --客户类</p><p>										)</p><p>									values	(</p><p>										convert(varchar(8),getdate(),112), 	--通知开始日期</p><p>										'客户已激活',                    --通知消息</p><p>										@mi_oper_code,                  --操作员</p><p>										convert(char(8),getdate(),112),</p><p>										@mi_cust_no,	                --客户号</p><p>										convert( char(8)  ,dateadd(month , 1,getdate())  , 112 ),--通知结束日期</p><p>										''		        --客户类</p><p>										)</p><p>								end	</p><p>					end	</p><p>						</p><p>			end</p><p><br /></p></blockquote><p>总结下来也就是只用V6S进行上报时，需要同一批次的上报结果都为成功时才会休眠、激活成功；而上了账户中心后，只要有一条休眠、激活成功的回报通过账户中心同步给v6s，v6s就会以休眠、激活成功做处理。<br /></p>

data.problem: <p>账户中心如何进入IDE界面对数据库进行操作</p>
data.solution: <p>原账户中心网页访问地址xxx.xxx.xxx.xxx/ks/后加上ide即可进入集成开发环境（IDE界面），即xxx.xxx.xxx.xxx/ks/ide</p><p>在工具下拉菜单选择数据库浏览器，如下图</p><p><a data.problem: <p>客户需要修改手机号然后去开户云做适当性测评 但是你们的修改资料必须要做适当性 这样矛盾如何解决呢？<br /></p>
data.solution: <p>有单独的手机号变更界面。</p><p>在投资者查询界面双击需要调整手机号码的客户进入详情界面，在右上角便捷导航菜单内，有手机号变更的功能，如下图<br /></p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/375968942/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902542%3B1774075402%26q-key-time%3D1773902542%3B1774075402%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D00e1125b36e8b33080c748ddfbcd0df5e4638bb9&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22958653b8b0ee8892458e0da6dbe1bbe.jpg%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27958653b8b0ee8892458e0da6dbe1bbe.jpg" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="375968942"><img hb_type="file" file_id="375968942" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/375968942/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902542%3B1774075402%26q-key-time%3D1773902542%3B1774075402%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D18eb3d7dd78cb8d2882248230780278ddcab4c70&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22958653b8b0ee8892458e0da6dbe1bbe.jpg%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27958653b8b0ee8892458e0da6dbe1bbe.jpg&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a><br /></p><p>修改完手机号后，只要审核通过，开户云就可以做业务了，流程状态是审批完成就可以，不用管上报的结果。</p>

data.problem: <p>V6S交易参数中JSXT_JY是做什么用的<br /></p>
data.solution: <p>设置为‘0’-结算系统不交易时，点击“全部进入结算状态”，无论系统状态原来是什么状态，直接进入结算状态。<br /></p><p>设置为‘1’-结算系统需要交易，按原逻辑，都需要在收市收盘状态才能全都进入结算状态</p>

data.problem: <p>结算单查询盘中查月结单提示“错误：-1，不允许进行大跨度时间的查询，您的查询日期天数应该为1”<br /></p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/375386830/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902542%3B1774075402%26q-key-time%3D1773902542%3B1774075402%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3Dcedf25d8322d294ec05778088897971e3cbfe40a&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%225%2529NQPUI0U6DTKQZ%2524%2560%255D7XQ76.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%275%2529NQPUI0U6DTKQZ%2524%2560%255D7XQ76.png" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="375386830"><img hb_type="file" file_id="375386830" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/375386830/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902542%3B1774075402%26q-key-time%3D1773902542%3B1774075402%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D08160bd4b7045af5e11a7fd186b35cda68948dbc&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%225%2529NQPUI0U6DTKQZ%2524%2560%255D7XQ76.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%275%2529NQPUI0U6DTKQZ%2524%2560%255D7XQ76.png&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a><br /></p>
data.solution: <p>在进行结算单查询时，柜台会先向后台发起853015进行结算客户准备，该功能会调用CheckQryTime进行报表查询时间检查。</p><p>853015在查询限制设置（qry_func_set表）中对应的是“交易结算单”功能</p><table><colgroup><col width="72" /></colgroup><tbody><tr><td>func_no</td>  <td>date_range</td>  <td>allow_null</td>  <td>return_record_num</td>  <td>allow_modify</td>  <td>oper_code</td>  <td>oper_date</td>  <td>oper_time</td>  <td>valid_type</td>  <td>sys_date_range</td>  <td>sys_return_num</td>  <td>func_menu_name</td> </tr><tr><td>853015</td>  <td>0</td>  <td>1</td>  <td>0</td>  <td>1</td>  <td></td>  <td></td>  <td></td>  <td>1</td>  <td>1</td>  <td>2000</td>  <td>交易结算单</td> </tr><tr><td>853015</td>  <td>0</td>  <td>1</td>  <td>0</td>  <td>1</td>  <td></td>  <td></td>  <td></td>  <td>2</td>  <td>92</td>  <td>0</td>  <td>交易结算单</td> </tr></tbody></table><p>所以要在盘中做月结单查询的话，需要在查询限制设置中将交易结算单功能盘中查询限制天数放开置31天才可以。</p>

data.problem: <p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/369734034/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902542%3B1774075402%26q-key-time%3D1773902542%3B1774075402%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3Dd28e79c185ab1f4d6967fe7e139ac07fbb65ef9e&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22FE3C51D801CC62E4FA5134A2A3E460E0.jpg%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27FE3C51D801CC62E4FA5134A2A3E460E0.jpg" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="369734034"><img hb_type="file" file_id="369734034" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/369734034/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902542%3B1774075402%26q-key-time%3D1773902542%3B1774075402%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3Da8829afc112e62f14f03be72fda10cbe9d8a91a1&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22FE3C51D801CC62E4FA5134A2A3E460E0.jpg%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27FE3C51D801CC62E4FA5134A2A3E460E0.jpg&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a><br /></p><p>V6S固定保证金率界面将导出的记录修改费率后进行导入有如上图所示报错</p>
data.solution: <p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/369734706/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902542%3B1774075402%26q-key-time%3D1773902542%3B1774075402%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3De65b0551e8b59f2b5e884fb35a391f0b3272dec6&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22image.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27image.png" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="369734706"><img hb_type="file" file_id="369734706" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/369734706/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902542%3B1774075402%26q-key-time%3D1773902542%3B1774075402%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3Dd91b86ad5cd952b429dcaa76e5ed920031799392&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22image.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27image.png&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a><br /></p><p>如上图所示，找到xls对应的记录后发现其客户名称2和号之间有一个空格，经与开发沟通，前台在导入该xls文件时，会调用delphi的函数自动判断分隔符，此时会将逗号和空格识别为分隔符，导致该客户记录从客户名称开始会多分割一个字段，影响后续转换为CPACK给后台发送信息。</p><p>临时方案可将execl中的空格全部查找替换，后续将在61009中修复该问题。</p>

data.problem: <p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/369101604/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902542%3B1774075402%26q-key-time%3D1773902542%3B1774075402%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D8393115128f9588562ddec3dc6cd6d886670f7b3&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22lQDPJxa66imbmGfNBaDNB4Cw6vbM3lwSUDoDM06tp0BAAA_1920_1440.jpg%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27lQDPJxa66imbmGfNBaDNB4Cw6vbM3lwSUDoDM06tp0BAAA_1920_1440.jpg" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="369101604"><img hb_type="file" file_id="369101604" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/369101604/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902542%3B1774075402%26q-key-time%3D1773902542%3B1774075402%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D2e9205805c9071928e471a561026843eabd28a5e&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22lQDPJxa66imbmGfNBaDNB4Cw6vbM3lwSUDoDM06tp0BAAA_1920_1440.jpg%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27lQDPJxa66imbmGfNBaDNB4Cw6vbM3lwSUDoDM06tp0BAAA_1920_1440.jpg&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a><br /></p><p>上图TMC的zookeeper查看器中，程序所在IP地址和交易所前置地址和端口分别显示的什么地址和端口，其获取逻辑是什么？</p>
data.solution: <p>程序所在IP地址：由LINUX报盘获取到的本机IP地址列表，TMC上展示首个地址；</p><p>交易所前置地址和端口：如果是逐次连接成功的话，是能够确切获取连接fens地址的，但是如果都失败的话，由于交易所不会告知具体连接哪个fens地址成功，后面具体连的那个系统就不知道了，当配置了多个fens地址时，TMC上只会展示配置文件中的首个fens地址。<br /></p><p>后续，由于交易所不告知具体fens连接地址，关于交易所前置地址和端口就只展示配置的fens列表而不做实际展示连接地址了。</p>

data.problem: <p>查历史成交中，有备注为“老仓手数不够，都按照平今仓方式下单！”是什么原因<br /></p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/366054895/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902542%3B1774075402%26q-key-time%3D1773902542%3B1774075402%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D8cfde6066b4b40479ed16c98cda8a5201834ff32&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22~3R%257DGN5%255D5%2525%2560%257BORF8RBUPLMP.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27~3R%257DGN5%255D5%2525%2560%257BORF8RBUPLMP.png" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="366054895"><img hb_type="file" file_id="366054895" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/366054895/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902542%3B1774075402%26q-key-time%3D1773902542%3B1774075402%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D7a748b8ae7e7541ef04bcfa65c0d1e5cf06d76fa&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22~3R%257DGN5%255D5%2525%2560%257BORF8RBUPLMP.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27~3R%257DGN5%255D5%2525%2560%257BORF8RBUPLMP.png&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a><br /></p>
data.solution: <p>当V8T交易参数SPLITPJD（是否支持拆分平今单）设置为是-支持拆分平今单，且交易所支持下平今单的情况下，客户下平仓老仓不足就会拆成平今单，这个备注就是当支持下平今单的交易所，客户完全没有老仓时，客户以平仓指令下单系统进行拆单的时候，系统做的备注。<br /></p>

data.problem: <p>为什么在V8T结算单日志管理查客户结算单确认情况开始结束日期输入当天交易日日期查询没有结果</p>
data.solution: <p>这里的开始结束日期对应的是结算单日期，所以在当天查客户的结算单确认情况，客户确认的是上一个交易日的结算单，所以开始结束日期需要输入上一个交易日的日期菜可以。</p>

data.problem: <p>远程登录堡垒机开启同步程序后，复核人员再登录堡垒机发现同步程序在界面上没有了，重新开启程序后提示V8T的操作员已经登录了，需要到V8T交易管理终端上去踢掉才可以。</p>
data.solution: <p>经过检查堡垒机的操作记录发现该操作员登入堡垒机后按过键盘的esc键，到开发那里测试可得当界面焦点在同步程序的时候，esc键会直接终止程序，在操作日志里会记录‘关闭日志’的信息，且不会有录出各个交易中心同步操作员的操作，只有在界面点击‘退出’按钮的时候才会正常关闭程序且录出登录的各个交易中心操作员。</p><p>后续会在9系列对同步程序的esc做修改，或者功能同退出按钮，或者就直接屏蔽esc。</p>

data.problem: <p>机构客户全称26个中文字，兴业银行银行端发起银期开户提示“客户姓名不符”</p>
data.solution: <p>EREQ中&lt;Name&gt;&lt;/Name&gt;中的客户全称是完整的</p><p><a /></p><p>由于cpack包字段scert_no的字段长度为50位，仅支持25个中文字符长度的客户全称进行开户，故而会导致这个问题。</p><p>由于开发没人改这个问题，现在暂时建议客户将银行参数中的M3M4修改为N，即银行端发起开户不校验客户名称、银行端发起销户不校验客户名称，临时解决，后面程序的变更估计遥遥无期了。</p>

data.problem: <p>为什么econsign自选合约里只能增加6个自选合约</p>
data.solution: <p>根据econsign的帮助文件econsign.CHM中的描述：“自选合约是从所有的合约中挑出几个用户最关心，最常用的合约，用于行情的显示。自选合约组数目前无限制，每组最多6个合约。”<br /></p>

data.problem: <p>V8T盘中各交易所平仓顺序<br /></p>
data.solution: <p>大商所：先普通后组合，先开先平，平仓的投保属性要与持仓投保属性一致，投机平投机，保值平保值。结算时先开先平，投机平投机，保值平保值<br /></p><p>广期所：同大商一致<br /></p><p>郑商所：先投机后保值，先单腿后对锁再组合，先开先平。结算时先开先平<br /></p><p>上期所：上期严格区分今仓和昨仓，指令也分平今和平仓，持仓对应指令遵循先开先平原则<br /></p><p>能交所：同上期一致<br /></p><p>中金所：中金盘中只有平仓指令，但盘后导入成交文件会有平今标记。针对数据字典“5005-中金所调整平今手续费品种”中维护的品种，盘中平仓规则是优先平今仓，今仓平完平老仓，平今部分和平昨部分遵循先开先平。不在5005里的只是先开先平。所有品种结算时都是先开先平。<br /></p><div><br /></div>

data.problem: <p>V8T柜台没有广期所组合合约</p>
data.solution: <p>经检查，V6S设置组合合约的数据与交易所文件里的组合合约数据不一致，但是交易合约数据又是一致的，这时候想到的是V8tlinux报盘的高级设置里，是不是没有勾选启用组合报单模式。<br /></p><p>但是从取来的config.ini里发现设置是没问题的。</p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/355227460/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDaxFHfoJWvA3jAKfuKVWIn1NTJuHXBHtd%26q-sign-time%3D1663935705%3B1663939365%26q-key-time%3D1663935705%3B1663939365%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D51a81ce524cec6a682c88c9a3ab74495ecf7f1e9&amp;response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22image.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27image.png" target="_blank"><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/355227460/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902543%3B1774075403%26q-key-time%3D1773902543%3B1774075403%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D495d716f88e38ac5a7301e72b5b6466c6e6cd4cc&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22image.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27image.png" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="355227460"><img hb_type="file" file_id="355227460" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/355227460/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902543%3B1774075403%26q-key-time%3D1773902543%3B1774075403%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D20c6ad68727200f62b8977c6bf26828da1c9d458&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22image.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27image.png&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a></a><br /></p><p>写组合合约时，会根据tt_comb_strategy表根据组合策略的合法性，如果这个表里数据没有或不全，那么也不会写库，所以到物理库查了一下广期所数据，确实没有，那么问题就在这里了。</p><p>select * from tt_comb_strategy where exch_code = 'J';<br /></p><p>这个表广期所的数据是20220722_V8T8508版本\广期基础数据包\V8T_数据库脚本\v8user\20220330-0001-R202202140301.sql这个包刷到系统里的，所以很有可能是准备基础数据的时候没有把这部分内容刷到系统里。</p><p>或者是最初用的是20220326_V8T8508_Beta这个包里的广期所基础数据准备包的内容刷的数据，而V8T是直到20220419_V8T8508支持广期组合_Beta版本包开始有刷tt_comb_strategy这个基础数据到库里的，所以导致其基础数据确实（这种可能性是最大的）。</p><p>刷完基础数据后，由于V8T本身一定是没有组合合约的，也不用再做数据回导了，出现这种问题之后就只能手工到V6S设置组合合约的界面手工增加交易所有的组合合约信息，然后再做持仓结算。</p>

data.problem: <p>广期和大连交易所的linux报盘，断线重连后，关于s/f单（正在申报、等待撤除）是如何处理了？</p>
data.solution: <p>广期和大连报盘，只有在重启的时候才会重新检查本地的s/f单，然后由重连后系统内客户发起的第一笔委托触发异常委托的处理机制，根据报盘配置工具eifconfig.exe的高级配置中的“断线恢复后，报单默认处理方式”的选项进行拒绝或者补发。</p><p><a href="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/354785427/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902543%3B1774075403%26q-key-time%3D1773902543%3B1774075403%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3D6bd872003ccba03e655ba3154418a73b9cb79fde&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22image.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27image.png" target="_blank" hb_type="file" file_id="354785427"><img hb_type="file" file_id="354785427" src="https://hb-v4-attachment-oss.huoban.com/attachment/354785427/0?sign=q-sign-algorithm%3Dsha1%26q-ak%3DAKIDwpKza4Yu8FVfieRyqt8iP8tsrqnrvvpc%26q-sign-time%3D1773902543%3B1774075403%26q-key-time%3D1773902543%3B1774075403%26q-header-list%3Dhost%26q-url-param-list%3Dimagemogr2%252fthumbnail%252f1000x3000%253e%3Bresponse-content-disposition%26q-signature%3Df463db9123535161038ce6a6a88776b6b4d99b61&response-content-disposition=inline%3B%20filename%3D%22image.png%22%3B%20filename%2A%3Dutf-8%27%27image.png&imageMogr2%2Fthumbnail%2F1000x3000%3E"></a><br /></p><p>仅仅是断线重连的话，并不会触发异常委托的处理机制。</p><p>后续考虑会做，但至少在8508正式包这个里是没有的。</p>

data.problem: <p>高频客户平仓委托没有进行校验就发出去了</p>
data.solution: <p>目前V8T自成交平仓校验都是放在bu的，bu进程有多个，处于并发状态，如果你下单够快，比如说像乾坤这个高频客户，两笔平仓委托间隔在一毫秒，就可以绕开v8t的可平手数校验，直接发出去。开仓资金校验放在server里面也校验了一层，server进程只有一个，不存在这个问题</p>

data.problem: <p>银行参数设置界面，如果相关银行对应参数中没有HZ参数设置，那么后台按什么逻辑判断。</p>
data.solution: <p>v60_858302_yq_yhzz_yhkxhqq.sql中关于HZ的判断，当没有HZ参数时，以N处理。<br /></p>

data.problem: <p>一个客户发起了出金1000元，当时是先在次席中进行的出金资金同步，但由于主席里面客户可用不足，这笔出金申请失败了，此时二席上没有自动冲销，人工在二席手工冲销后，下午客户又做了一笔800元的出金，直接走银期转账出掉了，二席资金同步程序也没有同步给二席。<br /></p>
data.solution: <p>一旦二席客户出金失败预约出金额度没有被用完，客户再次发起小于等于之前那一次银期出金额度的银期出金，那直接出金了，由于二席资金同步读取的是预约出金的记录，就导致不能同步给二席。<br /></p><p>遇到这种场景：<br /></p><p>1、直接让客户再做一次原出金金额的出金即可，不用到二席上去冲销相关出金记录；<br /></p><p>2、如果已经冲销二席上的相关出金记录，则客户发起二次出金后，需要在二席系统上手工录入。<br /></p>
